case 0

select(ARP4.rate{unknown} {no declaration} )
case 0
ARP4.mf_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := 960 / 16

case 1
ARP4.mf_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := 960 / 8
ARP4.bar_limit{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.max_eighth_notes{unknown} {no declaration}  * 4
case 2
ARP4.mf_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := 960 / 4

case 3

case 4

on ui_control(ENV2.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration} )

end if

if(((NI_CALLBACK_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration}  # NI_CB_TYPE_INIT{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (NI_CALLBACK_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration}  # NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGED{unknown} {no declaration} )) and (preset.is_loading{unknown} {no declaration}  # 1))

call _update_shown_envelope{UserDefined, None, _update_shown_envelope}
call update_envelope_target{UserDefined, None, update_envelope_target}
end if
end on

end if

on ui_control(GRENV1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration} )
tablequery_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := NI_CONTROL_PAR_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} 
if(((NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration}  = NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWN{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration}  = NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_UP{unknown} {no declaration} )) or (NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration}  = NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_DRAG{unknown} {no declaration} ))
tablequery_min{unknown} {no declaration}  := tablequery_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  - 10
tablequery_max{unknown} {no declaration}  := tablequery_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  + 10
if(tablequery_min{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
tablequery_min{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
end if
if(tablequery_max{unknown} {no declaration}  > 99)
tablequery_max{unknown} {no declaration}  := 99
end if
else
tablequery_min{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
tablequery_max{unknown} {no declaration}  := 99
end if
if(GRENV1.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(GRENV1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_control_par} = 1)
if((GRENV1.shift_all_active{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0) or ((ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration}  - GRENV1.last_touched{unknown} {no declaration} ) > 300))
GRENV1.shift_all_active{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
for tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 100 - 1
if(GRENV1.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration}  = EDIT_A{unknown} {no declaration} )
GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.rhythm[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
shift_buffer[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
else
if(GRENV1.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration}  = EDIT_B{unknown} {no declaration} )
GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.rhythm[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
shift_buffer[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
end if
end if
if((GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) < 0)
GRENV1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + (((GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * CC[dyn_cc_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 127)
else
GRENV1.rhythm_playback[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - (((GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * CC[dyn_cc_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 127)
end if
label_pos_y_A{unknown} {no declaration}  := (GRENV1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y + 3) + real_to_int(height_per_value{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(127 - GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
label_pos_y_B{unknown} {no declaration}  := (GRENV1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y + 3) + real_to_int(height_per_value{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(127 - GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
if((GRENV1.rhythm_A[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - GRENV1.rhythm_B[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) < 0)
if(GRENV1.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration}  = EDIT_A{unknown} {no declaration} )
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{unknown} {no declaration} , "lbl_engine_morph_bottom"){Builtin, None, set_control_par_str}
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
else
if(GRENV1.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration}  = EDIT_B{unknown} {no declaration} )
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{unknown} {no declaration} , "lbl_engine_morph_top"){Builtin, None, set_control_par_str}
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
end if
end if
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y := label_pos_y_B{unknown} {no declaration} 
rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height := label_pos_y_A{unknown} {no declaration}  - rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
else
if(GRENV1.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration}  = EDIT_A{unknown} {no declaration} )
set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{unknown} {no declaration} , "lbl_engine_morph_top"){Builtin, None, set_control_par_str}
GRENV1.morph_label_shift[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3

set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
end for
for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := num_elements[arp_rates_list{unknown} {no declaration} ] to num_elements[arp_rates_list{unknown} {no declaration} ] + (GRENV2.env_entries{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1)
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
end for
if((GRENV2.last_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  # GRENV2.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (GRENV2.last_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1))
GRENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
GRENV2.rhythm[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
end for
end if
for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[_rhythm_steps_list{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV2.rhythm_steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
end for
s{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.time_signature{unknown} {no declaration} 
if(s{unknown} {no declaration}  > 2)
if(GRENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration}  > 4)
GRENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration}  - 3
end if
for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 5 to 7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
end for
else
if(s{unknown} {no declaration}  < 3)
for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 5 to 7
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
end for
end if
end if
a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4
if(GRENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration}  > 4)
n{unknown} {no declaration}  := rhythm_steps_list_triplets[s{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
else
n{unknown} {no declaration}  := rhythm_steps_list[s{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
end if
if(n{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(GRENV2.rhythm_steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_value}
set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(GRENV2.rhythm_steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_str}
set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV2.rhythm_steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
inc(a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
else
set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(GRENV2.rhythm_steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_value}
end if
end for
if(GRENV2.rhythm_steps{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1)
GRENV2.rhythm_steps{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := a{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
end if
GRENV2.last_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
end select
if(((NI_CALLBACK_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration}  # NI_CB_TYPE_INIT{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (NI_CALLBACK_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration}  # NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGED{unknown} {no declaration} )) and (preset.is_loading{unknown} {no declaration}  # 1))
call update_visibility{UserDefined, None, update_visibility}
call _update_shown_envelope{UserDefined, None, _update_shown_envelope}
call update_envelope_target{UserDefined, None, update_envelope_target}
end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_save{unknown} {no declaration} )
preset.overwrite{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
if(saving_preset{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
saving_preset{unknown} {no declaration}  := user.SAVES_NEW{unknown} {no declaration} 
call on_saving_preset_dialog{UserDefined, None, on_saving_preset_dialog}
else
btn_save{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
end if
end on

on ui_control(btn_save_confirm{unknown} {no declaration} )
btn_save_confirm{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
preset.overwrite{unknown} {no declaration}  := (preset.overwrite{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1) mod 2
check.preset_overwrite{UserDefined, None, check.preset_overwrite}
if(preset.overwrite{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
if(saving_preset{unknown} {no declaration}  = user.SAVES_NEW{unknown} {no declaration} )
save.preset{UserDefined, None, save.preset}
else
if(saving_preset{unknown} {no declaration}  = user.EDITS_TAGS{unknown} {no declaration} )
edit.tags{UserDefined, None, edit.tags}
end if
end if

if(sli_bell_freq_max3{unknown} {no declaration}  <= sli_bell_freq_min3{unknown} {no declaration} )
sli_bell_freq_max3{unknown} {no declaration}  := sli_bell_freq_min3{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1
end if
motion_value_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int(((int_to_real(sli_bell_freq_max3{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - 0) / (1e+06 - 0)) * 100){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
set_text(motion_max_value1{unknown} {no declaration} , motion_value_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  & "%"){Builtin, None, set_text}
motion_max_label1{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := real_to_int(int_to_real(motion_value_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} * 1.26){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
call update_fx_motion_values{UserDefined, None, update_fx_motion_values}

function run_ARP1
	ARP1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := NI_CALLBACK_ID{unknown} {no declaration} 
	while((cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0) and (ARP1.latch_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)) 
	ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(ARP1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	call ARP1_sort_fill_buffer{UserDefined, None, ARP1_sort_fill_buffer}
	end if
	if(ARP1.bar_reset_active{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	if(ARP1.bar_count{unknown} {no declaration}  >= ARP1.bar_limit{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP1.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP1.bar_count{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP1.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP1.n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP1.s{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	if((see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_ARP1{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	ARP1.rhythm_indicator{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_BG{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for ARP1.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 31
	ARP1.rhythm_indicator[ARP1.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[ARP1.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 0
	end for
	ARP1.rhythm_indicator[ARP1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[ARP1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 1
	end if
	if(ARP1.rhythm_playback[ARP1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	if(ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	if(ARP1.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 14)
	for s{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ARP1.i{unknown} {no declaration} 
	note_off(ARP1.chord_buffer[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, note_off}
	ARP1.chord_last_notes[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	end for
	ARP1.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP1.i{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	if(ARP1.rhythm_playback[ARP1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	ARP1.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.rhythm_playback[ARP1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(ARP1.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP1.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	if(ARP1.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  < 1)
	ARP1.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	ARP1.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (ARP1.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	ARP1.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + ARP1.transpose{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ARP1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP1.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP1.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP1.chord_last_notes[ARP1.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP1.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	ani_arp_triggered[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	else
	if(ARP1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP1.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP1.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP1.chord_last_notes[ARP1.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP2.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	end if
	else
	if(ARP1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP1.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP1.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP1.chord_last_notes[ARP1.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP3.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	end if
	else
	if(ARP1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP1.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP1.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP1.chord_last_notes[ARP1.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP4.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	ani_arp_triggered[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(ARP1.chord_last_notes[ARP1.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	if(in_range(ARP1.chord_last_notes[ARP1.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , instr_min_key[ARP1.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , instr_max_key[ARP1.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, in_range})
	if(NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	midi_ids[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := mf_insert_event(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} , (NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration}  - transport_stamp{unknown} {no declaration} ) - ms_to_ticks(REC_TIME{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, ms_to_ticks}, MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP1.velo{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, mf_insert_event}
	mf_set_event_par(midi_ids[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP1.mf_length{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, mf_set_event_par}
	midi_pos[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := midi_pos[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1
	end if
	end if
	end if
	ARP1.chord_buffer[ARP1.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP1.i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	if(ARP1.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	ARP1.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	inc(ARP1.aa{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP1.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP1.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP1.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(ARP1.octave{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	inc(ARP1.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP1.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP1.octave{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP1.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	if(ARP1.octave{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	dec(ARP1.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}
	if(ARP1.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP1.octave{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP1.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	else
	if(ARP1.rhythm_playback[ARP1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	ARP1.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.rhythm_playback[ARP1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(ARP1.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP1.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	if(ARP1.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  < 1)
	ARP1.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	if(ARP1.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	ARP1.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP1.n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP1.n{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP1.repeat_max{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP1.n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	inc(ARP1.s{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	ARP1.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.s{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	else
	ARP1.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.aa{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP1.aa{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	ARP1.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (ARP1.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	ARP1.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + ARP1.transpose{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	if(ARP1.last_note_ids[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	note_off(ARP1.last_note_ids[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, note_off}
	ARP1.last_note_ids[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	end if
	end for
	if(ARP1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP1.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP1.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP1.last_note_ids[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP1.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	ani_arp_triggered[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	else
	if(ARP1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP1.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP1.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP1.last_note_ids[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP2.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	end if
	else
	if(ARP1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP1.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP1.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP1.last_note_ids[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP3.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	end if
	else
	if(ARP1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP1.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP1.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP1.last_note_ids[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP4.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	ani_arp_triggered[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(in_range(ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , instr_min_key[ARP1.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , instr_max_key[ARP1.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, in_range})
	if(NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	midi_ids[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := mf_insert_event(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} , (NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration}  - transport_stamp{unknown} {no declaration} ) - ms_to_ticks(REC_TIME{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, ms_to_ticks}, MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP1.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP1.velo{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, mf_insert_event}
	mf_set_event_par(midi_ids[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP1.mf_length{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, mf_set_event_par}
	midi_pos[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := midi_pos[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1
	end if
	end if
	if(ARP1.s{unknown} {no declaration}  >= ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP1.s{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP1.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(ARP1.octave{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	inc(ARP1.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP1.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP1.octave{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP1.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	if(ARP1.octave{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	dec(ARP1.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}
	if(ARP1.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP1.octave{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP1.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	else
	if(ARP1.rhythm_playback[ARP1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	if(ARP1.rhythm_skip{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	if(ARP1.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	if(ARP1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	dec(ARP1.n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}
	if(ARP1.n{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP1.n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	else
	if(ARP1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	dec(ARP1.aa{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}
	end if
	if(ARP1.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP1.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	else
	if(ARP1.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	inc(ARP1.n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP1.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 14)
	inc(ARP1.aa{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	else
	inc(ARP1.aa{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	end if
	if(ARP1.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  # 14)
	if(ARP1.n{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP1.repeat_max{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP1.n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP1.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.s{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(ARP1.bar_reset_active{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	inc(ARP1.bar_count{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	if((see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_SUBMAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	ARP1.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	ARP1.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((ARP1.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(ARP1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) - (floor(ARP1.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * int_to_real(ARP1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	if(ARP1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	ARP1.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := 198
	else
	ARP1.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := (ARP1.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + ARP1.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	end if
	if(ARP1.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP1.t{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP1.t{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(ARP1.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int} + 1
	else
	ARP1.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(ARP1.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	end if
	if(ARP1.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	if(ARP1.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  >= ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP1.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(ARP1.octave{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	inc(ARP1.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP1.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP1.octave{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP1.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	if(ARP1.octave{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	dec(ARP1.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}
	if(ARP1.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP1.octave{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP1.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	inc(ARP1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  >= ARP1.steps{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP1.t{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	select(ARP1.rate{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 0
	ARP1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration}  / 4
	case 1
	ARP1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2
	case 2
	ARP1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 3
	ARP1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 4
	ARP1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_QUARTER{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 5
	ARP1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 6
	ARP1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 7
	ARP1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end select
	if(engine_half_time{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2
	else
	if(engine_double_time{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2
	end if
	end if
	if((ARP1.swing_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  mod 2) = 0)
	ARP1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ((ARP1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * rhythm_swing{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 100)
	else
	ARP1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ((ARP1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * - rhythm_swing{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 100)
	end if
	inc(ARP1.swing_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP1.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	ARP1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  - abs(ARP1.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs}
	end if
	ARP1.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := random(- humanize_max{unknown} {no declaration} , humanize_max{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, random}
	ARP1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ARP1.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ARP1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	wait(ARP1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, wait}
	else
	wait(1){Builtin, None, wait}
	end if
	end while
end function

function set_ARP1_note_selection
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare hold_value : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ARP1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.note_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	if((ARP1.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0) and (ARP1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0))
	sort[ARP1.selected_notes_buffer{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]
	select(ARP1.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 1
	ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[ARP1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 2
	hold_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[ARP1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ARP1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 1)
	if(ARP1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := hold_value{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[ARP1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	case 3
	ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[ARP1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 4
	ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ARP1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 1)
	ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	case 5
	ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 6
	ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ARP1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	if(ARP1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 2)
	ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	else
	if(ARP1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end select
	else
	if((ARP1.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0) and (ARP1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0))
	ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
end function

function ARP1_sort_fill_buffer
	call set_ARP1_note_selection{UserDefined, None, set_ARP1_note_selection}
	while(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < 128) 
	if(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP1.ordered[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	ARP1.ordered[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	inc(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	sort[ARP1.ordered{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]
	ARP1.min_note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.max_note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	select(ARP1.note_order{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 2
	ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) - ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	case 3
	ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	case 4
	ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) - ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	if(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 2)
	ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) - 2
	ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	end if
	case 5
	ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	if(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 2)
	ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) - 2
	ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2) - ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	end if
	case 6
	if(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP1.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	if(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ARP1.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.max_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	end if
	if(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 3)
	ARP1.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	end if
	if(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 3)
	ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 3]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (2 * ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 4
	end if
	case 7
	if(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP1.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	if(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ARP1.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.max_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	end if
	if(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 3)
	ARP1.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	end if
	if(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 3)
	ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (2 * ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 4
	end if
	case 8
	if(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP1.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	if(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ARP1.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.max_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	end if
	if(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 3)
	ARP1.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[3]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 4
	end if
	if(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 3)
	ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 3]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 3)) 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + ((ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2) * 2)]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[((ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + ((ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2) * 2)) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (4 * ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 10
	end if
	case 9
	if(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP1.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	if(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ARP1.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.max_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	end if
	if(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 3)
	ARP1.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[3]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 4
	end if
	if(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 3)
	ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 3)) 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + ((ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2) * 2)]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 3]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[((ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + ((ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2) * 2)) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (4 * ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 10
	end if
	case 10 to 13
	ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while((ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) < ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) - ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if((ARP1.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 11) or (ARP1.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 13))
	ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP1.help_buffer[(ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.help_buffer[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	end if
	if(((ARP1.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 12) or (ARP1.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 13)) and (ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 2))
	ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.loop_buffer[(ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2) - ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) - 2
	end if
	case 14
	ARP1.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP1.loop_buffer[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.ordered[ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	end select
end function

function run_ARP2
	ARP2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := NI_CALLBACK_ID{unknown} {no declaration} 
	while((cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0) and (ARP2.latch_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)) 
	ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(ARP2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	call ARP2_sort_fill_buffer{UserDefined, None, ARP2_sort_fill_buffer}
	end if
	if(ARP2.bar_reset_active{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	if(ARP2.bar_count{unknown} {no declaration}  >= ARP2.bar_limit{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP2.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP2.bar_count{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP2.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP2.n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP2.s{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	if((see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_ARP2{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	ARP2.rhythm_indicator{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_BG{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for ARP2.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 31
	ARP2.rhythm_indicator[ARP2.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[ARP2.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 0
	end for
	ARP2.rhythm_indicator[ARP2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[ARP2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 1
	end if
	if(ARP2.rhythm_playback[ARP2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	if(ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	if(ARP2.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 14)
	for s{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ARP2.i{unknown} {no declaration} 
	note_off(ARP2.chord_buffer[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, note_off}
	ARP2.chord_last_notes[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	end for
	ARP2.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP2.i{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	if(ARP2.rhythm_playback[ARP2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	ARP2.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.rhythm_playback[ARP2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(ARP2.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP2.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	if(ARP2.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  < 1)
	ARP2.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	ARP2.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (ARP2.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	ARP2.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + ARP2.transpose{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ARP2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP2.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP2.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP2.chord_last_notes[ARP2.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP1.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	ani_arp_triggered[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	else
	if(ARP2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP2.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP2.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP2.chord_last_notes[ARP2.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP2.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	end if
	else
	if(ARP2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP2.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP2.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP2.chord_last_notes[ARP2.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP3.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	end if
	else
	if(ARP2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP2.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP2.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP2.chord_last_notes[ARP2.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP4.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	ani_arp_triggered[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(ARP2.chord_last_notes[ARP2.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	if(in_range(ARP2.chord_last_notes[ARP2.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , instr_min_key[ARP2.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , instr_max_key[ARP2.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, in_range})
	if(NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	midi_ids[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := mf_insert_event(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} , (NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration}  - transport_stamp{unknown} {no declaration} ) - ms_to_ticks(REC_TIME{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, ms_to_ticks}, MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP2.velo{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, mf_insert_event}
	mf_set_event_par(midi_ids[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP2.mf_length{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, mf_set_event_par}
	midi_pos[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := midi_pos[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1
	end if
	end if
	end if
	ARP2.chord_buffer[ARP2.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP2.i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	if(ARP2.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	ARP2.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	inc(ARP2.aa{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP2.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP2.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP2.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(ARP2.octave{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	inc(ARP2.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP2.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP2.octave{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP2.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	if(ARP2.octave{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	dec(ARP2.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}
	if(ARP2.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP2.octave{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP2.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	else
	if(ARP2.rhythm_playback[ARP2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	ARP2.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.rhythm_playback[ARP2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(ARP2.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP2.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	if(ARP2.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  < 1)
	ARP2.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	if(ARP2.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	ARP2.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP2.n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP2.n{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP2.repeat_max{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP2.n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	inc(ARP2.s{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	ARP2.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.s{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	else
	ARP2.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.aa{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP2.aa{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	ARP2.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (ARP2.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	ARP2.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + ARP2.transpose{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	if(ARP2.last_note_ids[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	note_off(ARP2.last_note_ids[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, note_off}
	ARP2.last_note_ids[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	end if
	end for
	if(ARP2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP2.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP2.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP2.last_note_ids[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP1.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	ani_arp_triggered[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	else
	if(ARP2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP2.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP2.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP2.last_note_ids[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP2.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	end if
	else
	if(ARP2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP2.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP2.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP2.last_note_ids[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP3.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	end if
	else
	if(ARP2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP2.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP2.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP2.last_note_ids[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP4.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	ani_arp_triggered[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(in_range(ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , instr_min_key[ARP2.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , instr_max_key[ARP2.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, in_range})
	if(NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	midi_ids[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := mf_insert_event(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} , (NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration}  - transport_stamp{unknown} {no declaration} ) - ms_to_ticks(REC_TIME{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, ms_to_ticks}, MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP2.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP2.velo{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, mf_insert_event}
	mf_set_event_par(midi_ids[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP2.mf_length{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, mf_set_event_par}
	midi_pos[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := midi_pos[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1
	end if
	end if
	if(ARP2.s{unknown} {no declaration}  >= ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP2.s{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP2.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(ARP2.octave{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	inc(ARP2.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP2.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP2.octave{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP2.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	if(ARP2.octave{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	dec(ARP2.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}
	if(ARP2.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP2.octave{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP2.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	else
	if(ARP2.rhythm_playback[ARP2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	if(ARP2.rhythm_skip{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	if(ARP2.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	if(ARP2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	dec(ARP2.n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}
	if(ARP2.n{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP2.n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	else
	if(ARP2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	dec(ARP2.aa{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}
	end if
	if(ARP2.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP2.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	else
	if(ARP2.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	inc(ARP2.n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP2.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 14)
	inc(ARP2.aa{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	else
	inc(ARP2.aa{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	end if
	if(ARP2.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  # 14)
	if(ARP2.n{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP2.repeat_max{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP2.n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP2.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.s{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(ARP2.bar_reset_active{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	inc(ARP2.bar_count{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	if((see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_SUBMAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	ARP2.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	ARP2.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((ARP2.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(ARP2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) - (floor(ARP2.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * int_to_real(ARP2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	if(ARP2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	ARP2.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := 198
	else
	ARP2.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := (ARP2.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + ARP2.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	end if
	if(ARP2.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP2.t{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP2.t{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(ARP2.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int} + 1
	else
	ARP2.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(ARP2.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	end if
	if(ARP2.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	if(ARP2.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  >= ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP2.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(ARP2.octave{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	inc(ARP2.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP2.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP2.octave{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP2.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	if(ARP2.octave{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	dec(ARP2.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}
	if(ARP2.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP2.octave{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP2.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	inc(ARP2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  >= ARP2.steps{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP2.t{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	select(ARP2.rate{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 0
	ARP2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration}  / 4
	case 1
