	ARP2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2
	case 2
	ARP2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 3
	ARP2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 4
	ARP2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_QUARTER{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 5
	ARP2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 6
	ARP2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 7
	ARP2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end select
	if(engine_half_time{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2
	else
	if(engine_double_time{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2
	end if
	end if
	if((ARP2.swing_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  mod 2) = 0)
	ARP2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ((ARP2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * rhythm_swing{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 100)
	else
	ARP2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ((ARP2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * - rhythm_swing{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 100)
	end if
	inc(ARP2.swing_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP2.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	ARP2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  - abs(ARP2.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs}
	end if
	ARP2.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := random(- humanize_max{unknown} {no declaration} , humanize_max{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, random}
	ARP2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ARP2.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ARP2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	wait(ARP2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, wait}
	else
	wait(1){Builtin, None, wait}
	end if
	end while
end function

function set_ARP2_note_selection
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare hold_value : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ARP2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.note_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	if((ARP2.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0) and (ARP2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0))
	sort[ARP2.selected_notes_buffer{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]
	select(ARP2.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 1
	ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[ARP2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 2
	hold_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[ARP2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ARP2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 1)
	if(ARP2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := hold_value{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[ARP2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	case 3
	ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[ARP2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 4
	ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ARP2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 1)
	ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	case 5
	ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 6
	ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ARP2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	if(ARP2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 2)
	ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	else
	if(ARP2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end select
	else
	if((ARP2.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0) and (ARP2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0))
	ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
end function

function ARP2_sort_fill_buffer
	call set_ARP2_note_selection{UserDefined, None, set_ARP2_note_selection}
	while(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < 128) 
	if(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP2.ordered[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	ARP2.ordered[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP2.selected_notes_buffer[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	inc(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	sort[ARP2.ordered{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]
	ARP2.min_note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.max_note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	select(ARP2.note_order{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 2
	ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) - ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	case 3
	ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	case 4
	ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) - ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	if(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 2)
	ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) - 2
	ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	end if
	case 5
	ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	if(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 2)
	ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) - 2
	ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2) - ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	end if
	case 6
	if(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP2.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	if(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ARP2.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.max_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	end if
	if(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 3)
	ARP2.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	end if
	if(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 3)
	ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 3]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (2 * ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 4
	end if
	case 7
	if(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP2.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	if(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ARP2.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.max_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	end if
	if(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 3)
	ARP2.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	end if
	if(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 3)
	ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (2 * ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 4
	end if
	case 8
	if(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP2.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	if(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ARP2.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.max_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	end if
	if(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 3)
	ARP2.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[3]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 4
	end if
	if(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 3)
	ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 3]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 3)) 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + ((ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2) * 2)]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[((ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + ((ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2) * 2)) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (4 * ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 10
	end if
	case 9
	if(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP2.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	if(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ARP2.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.max_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	end if
	if(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 3)
	ARP2.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[3]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 4
	end if
	if(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 3)
	ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 3)) 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + ((ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2) * 2)]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 3]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[((ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + ((ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2) * 2)) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (4 * ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 10
	end if
	case 10 to 13
	ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while((ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) < ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) - ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if((ARP2.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 11) or (ARP2.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 13))
	ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP2.help_buffer[(ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.help_buffer[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	end if
	if(((ARP2.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 12) or (ARP2.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 13)) and (ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 2))
	ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.loop_buffer[(ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2) - ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) - 2
	end if
	case 14
	ARP2.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP2.loop_buffer[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.ordered[ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	end select
end function

function run_ARP3
	ARP3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := NI_CALLBACK_ID{unknown} {no declaration} 
	while((cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0) and (ARP3.latch_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)) 
	ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(ARP3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	call ARP3_sort_fill_buffer{UserDefined, None, ARP3_sort_fill_buffer}
	end if
	if(ARP3.bar_reset_active{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	if(ARP3.bar_count{unknown} {no declaration}  >= ARP3.bar_limit{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP3.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP3.bar_count{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP3.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP3.n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP3.s{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	if((see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_ARP3{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	ARP3.rhythm_indicator{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_BG{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for ARP3.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 31
	ARP3.rhythm_indicator[ARP3.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[ARP3.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 0
	end for
	ARP3.rhythm_indicator[ARP3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[ARP3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 1
	end if
	if(ARP3.rhythm_playback[ARP3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	if(ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	if(ARP3.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 14)
	for s{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ARP3.i{unknown} {no declaration} 
	note_off(ARP3.chord_buffer[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, note_off}
	ARP3.chord_last_notes[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	end for
	ARP3.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP3.i{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	if(ARP3.rhythm_playback[ARP3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	ARP3.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.rhythm_playback[ARP3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(ARP3.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP3.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	if(ARP3.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  < 1)
	ARP3.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	ARP3.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (ARP3.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	ARP3.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + ARP3.transpose{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ARP3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP3.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP3.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP3.chord_last_notes[ARP3.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP1.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	ani_arp_triggered[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	else
	if(ARP3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP3.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP3.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP3.chord_last_notes[ARP3.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP2.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	end if
	else
	if(ARP3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP3.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP3.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP3.chord_last_notes[ARP3.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP3.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	end if
	else
	if(ARP3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP3.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP3.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP3.chord_last_notes[ARP3.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP4.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	ani_arp_triggered[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(ARP3.chord_last_notes[ARP3.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	if(in_range(ARP3.chord_last_notes[ARP3.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , instr_min_key[ARP3.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , instr_max_key[ARP3.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, in_range})
	if(NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	midi_ids[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := mf_insert_event(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} , (NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration}  - transport_stamp{unknown} {no declaration} ) - ms_to_ticks(REC_TIME{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, ms_to_ticks}, MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP3.velo{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, mf_insert_event}
	mf_set_event_par(midi_ids[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP3.mf_length{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, mf_set_event_par}
	midi_pos[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := midi_pos[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1
	end if
	end if
	end if
	ARP3.chord_buffer[ARP3.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP3.i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	if(ARP3.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	ARP3.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	inc(ARP3.aa{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP3.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP3.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP3.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(ARP3.octave{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	inc(ARP3.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP3.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP3.octave{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP3.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	if(ARP3.octave{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	dec(ARP3.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}
	if(ARP3.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP3.octave{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP3.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	else
	if(ARP3.rhythm_playback[ARP3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	ARP3.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.rhythm_playback[ARP3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(ARP3.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP3.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	if(ARP3.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  < 1)
	ARP3.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	if(ARP3.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	ARP3.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP3.n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP3.n{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP3.repeat_max{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP3.n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	inc(ARP3.s{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	ARP3.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.s{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	else
	ARP3.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.aa{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP3.aa{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	ARP3.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (ARP3.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	ARP3.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + ARP3.transpose{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	if(ARP3.last_note_ids[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	note_off(ARP3.last_note_ids[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, note_off}
	ARP3.last_note_ids[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	end if
	end for
	if(ARP3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP3.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP3.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP3.last_note_ids[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP1.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	ani_arp_triggered[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	else
	if(ARP3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP3.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP3.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP3.last_note_ids[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP2.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	end if
	else
	if(ARP3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP3.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP3.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP3.last_note_ids[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP3.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	end if
	else
	if(ARP3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP3.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP3.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP3.last_note_ids[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP4.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	ani_arp_triggered[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(in_range(ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , instr_min_key[ARP3.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , instr_max_key[ARP3.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, in_range})
	if(NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	midi_ids[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := mf_insert_event(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} , (NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration}  - transport_stamp{unknown} {no declaration} ) - ms_to_ticks(REC_TIME{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, ms_to_ticks}, MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP3.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP3.velo{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, mf_insert_event}
	mf_set_event_par(midi_ids[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP3.mf_length{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, mf_set_event_par}
	midi_pos[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := midi_pos[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1
	end if
	end if
	if(ARP3.s{unknown} {no declaration}  >= ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP3.s{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP3.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(ARP3.octave{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	inc(ARP3.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP3.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP3.octave{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP3.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	if(ARP3.octave{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	dec(ARP3.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}
	if(ARP3.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP3.octave{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP3.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	else
	if(ARP3.rhythm_playback[ARP3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	if(ARP3.rhythm_skip{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	if(ARP3.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	if(ARP3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	dec(ARP3.n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}
	if(ARP3.n{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP3.n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	else
	if(ARP3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	dec(ARP3.aa{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}
	end if
	if(ARP3.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP3.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	else
	if(ARP3.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	inc(ARP3.n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP3.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 14)
	inc(ARP3.aa{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	else
	inc(ARP3.aa{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	end if
	if(ARP3.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  # 14)
	if(ARP3.n{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP3.repeat_max{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP3.n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP3.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.s{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(ARP3.bar_reset_active{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	inc(ARP3.bar_count{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	if((see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_SUBMAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	ARP3.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	ARP3.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((ARP3.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(ARP3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) - (floor(ARP3.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * int_to_real(ARP3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	if(ARP3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	ARP3.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := 198
	else
	ARP3.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := (ARP3.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + ARP3.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	end if
	if(ARP3.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP3.t{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP3.t{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(ARP3.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int} + 1
	else
	ARP3.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(ARP3.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	end if
	if(ARP3.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	if(ARP3.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  >= ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP3.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(ARP3.octave{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	inc(ARP3.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP3.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP3.octave{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP3.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	if(ARP3.octave{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	dec(ARP3.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}
	if(ARP3.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP3.octave{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP3.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	inc(ARP3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  >= ARP3.steps{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP3.t{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	select(ARP3.rate{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 0
	ARP3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration}  / 4
	case 1
	ARP3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2
	case 2
	ARP3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 3
	ARP3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 4
	ARP3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_QUARTER{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 5
	ARP3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 6
	ARP3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 7
	ARP3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end select
	if(engine_half_time{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2
	else
	if(engine_double_time{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2
	end if
	end if
	if((ARP3.swing_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  mod 2) = 0)
	ARP3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ((ARP3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * rhythm_swing{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 100)
	else
	ARP3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ((ARP3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * - rhythm_swing{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 100)
	end if
	inc(ARP3.swing_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP3.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	ARP3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  - abs(ARP3.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs}
	end if
	ARP3.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := random(- humanize_max{unknown} {no declaration} , humanize_max{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, random}
	ARP3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ARP3.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ARP3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	wait(ARP3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, wait}
	else
	wait(1){Builtin, None, wait}
	end if
	end while
end function

function set_ARP3_note_selection
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare hold_value : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ARP3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.note_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	if((ARP3.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0) and (ARP3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0))
	sort[ARP3.selected_notes_buffer{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]
	select(ARP3.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 1
	ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[ARP3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 2
	hold_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[ARP3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ARP3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 1)
	if(ARP3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := hold_value{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[ARP3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	case 3
	ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[ARP3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 4
	ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ARP3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 1)
	ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	case 5
	ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 6
	ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ARP3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	if(ARP3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 2)
	ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	else
	if(ARP3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end select
	else
	if((ARP3.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0) and (ARP3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0))
	ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
end function

function ARP3_sort_fill_buffer
	call set_ARP3_note_selection{UserDefined, None, set_ARP3_note_selection}
	while(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < 128) 
	if(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP3.ordered[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	ARP3.ordered[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP3.selected_notes_buffer[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	inc(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	sort[ARP3.ordered{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]
	ARP3.min_note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.max_note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	select(ARP3.note_order{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 2
	ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) - ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	case 3
	ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	case 4
	ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) - ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	if(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 2)
	ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) - 2
	ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	end if
	case 5
	ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	if(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 2)
	ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) - 2
	ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2) - ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	end if
	case 6
	if(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP3.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	if(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ARP3.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.max_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	end if
	if(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 3)
	ARP3.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	end if
	if(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 3)
	ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 3]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (2 * ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 4
	end if
	case 7
	if(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP3.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	if(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ARP3.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.max_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	end if
	if(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 3)
	ARP3.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	end if
	if(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 3)
	ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (2 * ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 4
	end if
	case 8
	if(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP3.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	if(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ARP3.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.max_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	end if
	if(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 3)
	ARP3.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[3]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 4
	end if
	if(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 3)
	ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 3]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 3)) 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + ((ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2) * 2)]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[((ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + ((ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2) * 2)) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (4 * ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 10
	end if
	case 9
	if(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP3.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	if(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ARP3.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.max_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	end if
	if(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 3)
	ARP3.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[3]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 4
	end if
	if(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 3)
	ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 3)) 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + ((ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2) * 2)]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 3]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[((ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + ((ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2) * 2)) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (4 * ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 10
	end if
	case 10 to 13
	ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while((ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) < ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) - ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if((ARP3.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 11) or (ARP3.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 13))
	ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP3.help_buffer[(ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.help_buffer[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	end if
	if(((ARP3.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 12) or (ARP3.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 13)) and (ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 2))
	ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.loop_buffer[(ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2) - ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) - 2
	end if
	case 14
	ARP3.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP3.loop_buffer[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.ordered[ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	end select
end function

function run_ARP4
	ARP4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := NI_CALLBACK_ID{unknown} {no declaration} 
	while((cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0) and (ARP4.latch_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)) 
	ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(ARP4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	call ARP4_sort_fill_buffer{UserDefined, None, ARP4_sort_fill_buffer}
	end if
	if(ARP4.bar_reset_active{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	if(ARP4.bar_count{unknown} {no declaration}  >= ARP4.bar_limit{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP4.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP4.bar_count{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP4.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP4.n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP4.s{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	if((see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_ARP4{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	ARP4.rhythm_indicator{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_BG{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for ARP4.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 31
	ARP4.rhythm_indicator[ARP4.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[ARP4.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 0
	end for
	ARP4.rhythm_indicator[ARP4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[ARP4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 1
	end if
	if(ARP4.rhythm_playback[ARP4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	if(ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	if(ARP4.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 14)
	for s{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ARP4.i{unknown} {no declaration} 
	note_off(ARP4.chord_buffer[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, note_off}
	ARP4.chord_last_notes[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	end for
	ARP4.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP4.i{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	if(ARP4.rhythm_playback[ARP4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	ARP4.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.rhythm_playback[ARP4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(ARP4.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP4.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	if(ARP4.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  < 1)
	ARP4.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	ARP4.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (ARP4.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	ARP4.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + ARP4.transpose{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ARP4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP4.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP4.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP4.chord_last_notes[ARP4.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP1.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	ani_arp_triggered[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	else
	if(ARP4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)

	else

	ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if

	end if

	if(ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0

	ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127

	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if

	end if
	end if
	end if

	end while
	if(ARP4.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	ARP4.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else

	inc(ARP4.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP4.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP4.octave{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP4.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0

	ARP4.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0

	end if

	end if
	if(ARP4.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP4.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	if(ARP4.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  < 1)
	ARP4.velo{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	if(ARP4.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	ARP4.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP4.n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP4.n{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP4.repeat_max{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP4.n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	inc(ARP4.s{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	ARP4.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.s{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	else
	ARP4.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.aa{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP4.aa{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	ARP4.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (ARP4.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	ARP4.note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + ARP4.transpose{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	if(ARP4.last_note_ids[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	note_off(ARP4.last_note_ids[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, note_off}
	ARP4.last_note_ids[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	end if
	end for
	if(ARP4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP4.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP4.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP4.last_note_ids[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP1.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	ani_arp_triggered[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	else
	if(ARP4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP4.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP4.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP4.last_note_ids[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP2.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	end if
	else
	if(ARP4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP4.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP4.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP4.last_note_ids[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP3.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	end if
	else
	if(ARP4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ARP4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	if(assigned_instruments[1, ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.note{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ARP4.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP4.velo{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ARP4.last_note_ids[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[1, ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(1, ARP4.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	ani_arp_triggered[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(in_range(ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , instr_min_key[ARP4.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , instr_max_key[ARP4.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, in_range})
	if(NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	midi_ids[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := mf_insert_event(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} , (NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration}  - transport_stamp{unknown} {no declaration} ) - ms_to_ticks(REC_TIME{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, ms_to_ticks}, MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP4.note_to_engine{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP4.velo{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, mf_insert_event}
	mf_set_event_par(midi_ids[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP4.mf_length{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, mf_set_event_par}
	midi_pos[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := midi_pos[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1
	end if
	end if
	if(ARP4.s{unknown} {no declaration}  >= ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP4.s{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP4.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(ARP4.octave{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	inc(ARP4.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP4.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP4.octave{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP4.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	if(ARP4.octave{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	dec(ARP4.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}
	if(ARP4.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP4.octave{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP4.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	else
	if(ARP4.rhythm_playback[ARP4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	if(ARP4.rhythm_skip{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	if(ARP4.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	if(ARP4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	dec(ARP4.n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}
	if(ARP4.n{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ARP4.n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	else
	if(ARP4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	dec(ARP4.aa{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}
	end if
