	ARP4.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	else
	if(ARP4.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	inc(ARP4.n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}

	inc(ARP4.aa{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	else
	inc(ARP4.aa{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	end if
	if(ARP4.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  # 14)
	if(ARP4.n{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP4.repeat_max{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP4.n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP4.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.s{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(ARP4.bar_reset_active{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	inc(ARP4.bar_count{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	if((see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_SUBMAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	ARP4.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	ARP4.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((ARP4.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(ARP4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) - (floor(ARP4.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * int_to_real(ARP4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	if(ARP4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	ARP4.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := 198
	else
	ARP4.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := (ARP4.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + ARP4.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	end if
	if(ARP4.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP4.t{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP4.t{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(ARP4.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int} + 1
	else
	ARP4.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(ARP4.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	end if
	if(ARP4.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	if(ARP4.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  >= ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP4.aa{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(ARP4.octave{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	inc(ARP4.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP4.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP4.octave{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP4.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	if(ARP4.octave{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	dec(ARP4.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}
	if(ARP4.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP4.octave{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP4.oct_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	inc(ARP4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  >= ARP4.steps{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP4.t{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	select(ARP4.rate{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 0
	ARP4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration}  / 4
	case 1
	ARP4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2
	case 2
	ARP4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 3
	ARP4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 4
	ARP4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_QUARTER{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 5
	ARP4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 6
	ARP4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 7
	ARP4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end select
	if(engine_half_time{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2
	else
	if(engine_double_time{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2
	end if
	end if
	if((ARP4.swing_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  mod 2) = 0)
	ARP4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ((ARP4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * rhythm_swing{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 100)
	else
	ARP4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ((ARP4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * - rhythm_swing{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 100)
	end if
	inc(ARP4.swing_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ARP4.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	ARP4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  - abs(ARP4.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs}
	end if
	ARP4.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := random(- humanize_max{unknown} {no declaration} , humanize_max{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, random}
	ARP4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ARP4.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ARP4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	wait(ARP4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, wait}
	else
	wait(1){Builtin, None, wait}
	end if
	end while
end function

function set_ARP4_note_selection
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare hold_value : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ARP4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.note_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	if((ARP4.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0) and (ARP4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0))
	sort[ARP4.selected_notes_buffer{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]
	select(ARP4.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 1
	ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[ARP4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 2
	hold_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[ARP4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ARP4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 1)
	if(ARP4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := hold_value{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[ARP4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	case 3
	ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[ARP4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 4
	ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ARP4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 1)
	ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	case 5
	ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 6
	ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ARP4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	if(ARP4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 2)
	ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	else
	if(ARP4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end select
	else
	if((ARP4.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0) and (ARP4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0))
	ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
end function

function ARP4_sort_fill_buffer
	call set_ARP4_note_selection{UserDefined, None, set_ARP4_note_selection}
	while(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < 128) 
	if(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP4.ordered[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	ARP4.ordered[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	inc(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	sort[ARP4.ordered{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]
	ARP4.min_note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.max_note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	select(ARP4.note_order{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 2
	ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) - ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	case 3
	ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	case 4
	ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) - ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	if(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 2)
	ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) - 2
	ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	end if
	case 5
	ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	if(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 2)
	ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) - 2
	ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2) - ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	end if
	case 6
	if(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP4.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	if(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ARP4.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.max_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	end if
	if(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 3)
	ARP4.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	end if
	if(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 3)
	ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 3]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (2 * ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 4
	end if
	case 7
	if(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP4.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	if(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ARP4.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.max_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	end if
	if(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 3)
	ARP4.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	end if
	if(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 3)
	ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (2 * ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 4
	end if
	case 8
	if(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP4.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	if(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ARP4.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.max_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	end if
	if(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 3)
	ARP4.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[3]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 4
	end if
	if(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 3)
	ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 3]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 3)) 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + ((ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2) * 2)]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[((ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + ((ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2) * 2)) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (4 * ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 10
	end if
	case 9
	if(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ARP4.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	if(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ARP4.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.max_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.min_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	end if
	if(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 3)
	ARP4.loop_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[3]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 4
	end if
	if(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 3)
	ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 3)) 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + ((ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2) * 2)]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 3]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[((ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + ((ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2) * 2)) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (4 * ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 10
	end if
	case 10 to 13
	ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while((ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) < ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) - ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if((ARP4.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 11) or (ARP4.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 13))
	ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP4.help_buffer[(ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ) - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.help_buffer[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	end if
	if(((ARP4.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 12) or (ARP4.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 13)) and (ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 2))
	ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < (ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2)) 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  + ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.loop_buffer[(ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2) - ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := (ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2) - 2
	end if
	case 14
	ARP4.loop_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	ARP4.loop_buffer[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.ordered[ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ARP4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	end select
end function

function run_ENV1
	ENV1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := NI_CALLBACK_ID{unknown} {no declaration} 
	while((cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0) and (ENV1.latch_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)) 
	call set_ENV1_note_selection{UserDefined, None, set_ENV1_note_selection}
	if(ENV1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ENV1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	else
	if(ENV1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	if(ENV1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(assigned_instruments[2, ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	ENV1.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_instruments[ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	mf_insert_event(ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration} , (NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration}  - transport_stamp{unknown} {no declaration} ) - ms_to_ticks(12000){Builtin, None, ms_to_ticks}, MIDI_COMMAND_CC{unknown} {no declaration} , dyn_cc_num{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV1.rhythm_playback[ENV1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, mf_insert_event}
	for ENV1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ENV1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	ENV1.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[ENV1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if((ENV1.active_notes[0, ENV1.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1) and (ENV1.last_note_ids[ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV1.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0))
	ENV1.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ENV1.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ENV1.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ENV1.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ENV1.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ENV1.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ENV1.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration} , 50, 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ENV1.current_engine_notes[ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV1.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV1.active_notes[1, ENV1.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	ENV1.last_note_ids[ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV1.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(2, ENV1.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	midi_ids[ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := mf_insert_event(ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration} , (NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration}  - transport_stamp{unknown} {no declaration} ) - ms_to_ticks(12000){Builtin, None, ms_to_ticks}, MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV1.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration} , 100){Builtin, None, mf_insert_event}
	ENV1.mf_note_ids[ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV1.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := midi_ids[ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV1.note_entry_time[ENV1.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration} 
	midi_pos[ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := midi_pos[ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1
	end if
	end for
	end if
	if(ENV1.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	if(ENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > ENV1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} )
	for ENV1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 127
	if(ENV1.last_note_ids[ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	ENV1.note_check{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	for ENV1.m{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ENV1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	if(ENV1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[ENV1.m{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV1.note_check{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end for
	if(ENV1.note_check{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	mf_set_event_par(ENV1.mf_note_ids[ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration}  - ENV1.note_entry_time[ENV1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, mf_set_event_par}
	note_off(ENV1.last_note_ids[ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, note_off}
	ENV1.last_note_ids[ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV1.active_notes[1, ENV1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV1.current_engine_notes[ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	end for
	end if
	end if
	if((see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_ENV1{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	ENV1.rhythm_indicator{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_BG{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	ENV1.rhythm_indicator[ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 0
	end for
	ENV1.rhythm_indicator[ENV1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[ENV1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 1
	end if
	if(ENV1.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH{unknown} {no declaration}  * ENV1.eight_notes_bar_amount{unknown} {no declaration} 
	select(ENV1.rate{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 95
	ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2
	case 97
	ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2
	case 98
	ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 3
	case 99
	ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 4
	end select
	ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  / 100
	else
	if(ENV1.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	select(ENV1.rate{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 0
	ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration}  / 4
	case 1
	ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2
	case 2
	ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 3
	ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 4
	ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_QUARTER{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 5
	ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 6
	ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 7
	ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end select
	end if
	end if
	if(ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  < 5000)
	ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := 5000
	end if
	if((see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_SUBMAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	ENV1.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	ENV1.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((ENV1.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(ENV1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) - (floor(ENV1.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * int_to_real(ENV1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	if(ENV1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	ENV1.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((ENV1.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(ENV1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) - (floor(ENV1.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * int_to_real(ENV1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	ENV1.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := 198
	else
	if(ENV1.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	if((ENV1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  mod 2) = 0)
	ENV1.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((ENV1.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(ENV1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) - (floor(ENV1.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * int_to_real(ENV1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	ENV1.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := (ENV1.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + ENV1.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	end if
	else
	ENV1.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((ENV1.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(ENV1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) - (floor(ENV1.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * int_to_real(ENV1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	ENV1.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := (ENV1.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + ENV1.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	end if
	end if
	if(ENV1.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  > ENV1.t{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV1.t{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV1.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(ENV1.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int} + 1
	else
	ENV1.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(ENV1.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	end if
	if(engine_half_time{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2
	else
	if(engine_double_time{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2
	end if
	end if
	if(ENV1.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	if((ENV1.swing_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  mod 2) = 0)
	ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ((ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * rhythm_swing{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 100)
	else
	ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ((ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * - rhythm_swing{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 100)
	end if
	inc(ENV1.swing_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ENV1.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  - ENV1.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	if(ENV1.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ENV1.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	ENV1.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := random(- humanize_max{unknown} {no declaration} , humanize_max{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, random}
	ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ENV1.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(ENV1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_controller(102, ENV1.rhythm_playback[ENV1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_controller}
	else
	if(ENV1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_controller(103, ENV1.rhythm_playback[ENV1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_controller}
	else
	if(ENV1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_controller(104, ENV1.rhythm_playback[ENV1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_controller}
	else
	if(ENV1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_controller(105, ENV1.rhythm_playback[ENV1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_controller}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	inc(ENV1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ENV1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  >= ENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV1.t{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(ENV1.retrigger{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	for ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	for ENV1.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 127
	if(ENV1.last_note_ids[ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	note_off(ENV1.last_note_ids[ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, note_off}
	ENV1.last_note_ids[ENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV1.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end for
	end for
	end if
	end if
	if(ENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	wait(ENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, wait}
	else
	wait(1){Builtin, None, wait}
	end if
	end while
end function

function set_ENV1_note_selection
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare hold_value : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.note_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	if((ENV1.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0) and (ENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0))
	sort[ENV1.selected_notes_buffer{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]
	select(ENV1.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 1
	ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[ENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 2
	hold_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[ENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 1)
	if(ENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := hold_value{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[ENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	ENV1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	ENV1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	case 3
	ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[ENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 4
	ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 1)
	ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	ENV1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	case 5
	ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 6
	ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	if(ENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 2)
	ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	else
	if(ENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ENV1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end select
	else
	if((ENV1.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0) and (ENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0))
	ENV1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
end function

function run_ENV2
	ENV2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := NI_CALLBACK_ID{unknown} {no declaration} 
	while((cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0) and (ENV2.latch_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)) 
	call set_ENV2_note_selection{UserDefined, None, set_ENV2_note_selection}
	if(ENV2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ENV2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	else
	if(ENV2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	if(ENV2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(assigned_instruments[2, ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	ENV2.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_instruments[ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	mf_insert_event(ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration} , (NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration}  - transport_stamp{unknown} {no declaration} ) - ms_to_ticks(12000){Builtin, None, ms_to_ticks}, MIDI_COMMAND_CC{unknown} {no declaration} , dyn_cc_num{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV2.rhythm_playback[ENV2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, mf_insert_event}
	for ENV2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ENV2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	ENV2.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[ENV2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if((ENV2.active_notes[0, ENV2.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1) and (ENV2.last_note_ids[ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV2.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0))
	ENV2.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ENV2.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ENV2.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ENV2.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ENV2.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ENV2.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ENV2.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration} , 50, 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ENV2.current_engine_notes[ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV2.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV2.active_notes[1, ENV2.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	ENV2.last_note_ids[ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV2.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(2, ENV2.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	midi_ids[ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := mf_insert_event(ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration} , (NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration}  - transport_stamp{unknown} {no declaration} ) - ms_to_ticks(12000){Builtin, None, ms_to_ticks}, MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV2.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration} , 100){Builtin, None, mf_insert_event}
	ENV2.mf_note_ids[ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV2.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := midi_ids[ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV2.note_entry_time[ENV2.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration} 
	midi_pos[ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := midi_pos[ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1
	end if
	end for
	end if
	if(ENV2.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	if(ENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > ENV2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} )
	for ENV2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 127
	if(ENV2.last_note_ids[ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	ENV2.note_check{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	for ENV2.m{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ENV2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	if(ENV2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[ENV2.m{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV2.note_check{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end for
	if(ENV2.note_check{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	mf_set_event_par(ENV2.mf_note_ids[ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration}  - ENV2.note_entry_time[ENV2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, mf_set_event_par}
	note_off(ENV2.last_note_ids[ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, note_off}
	ENV2.last_note_ids[ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV2.active_notes[1, ENV2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV2.current_engine_notes[ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	end for
	end if
	end if
	if((see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_ENV2{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	ENV2.rhythm_indicator{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_BG{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	ENV2.rhythm_indicator[ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 0
	end for
	ENV2.rhythm_indicator[ENV2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[ENV2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 1
	end if
	if(ENV2.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH{unknown} {no declaration}  * ENV2.eight_notes_bar_amount{unknown} {no declaration} 
	select(ENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 95
	ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2
	case 97
	ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2
	case 98
	ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 3
	case 99
	ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 4
	end select
	ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  / 100
	else
	if(ENV2.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	select(ENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 0
	ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration}  / 4
	case 1
	ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2
	case 2
	ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 3
	ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 4
	ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_QUARTER{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 5
	ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 6
	ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 7
	ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end select
	end if
	end if
	if(ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  < 5000)
	ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := 5000
	end if
	if((see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_SUBMAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	ENV2.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	ENV2.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((ENV2.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(ENV2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) - (floor(ENV2.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * int_to_real(ENV2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	if(ENV2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	ENV2.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((ENV2.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(ENV2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) - (floor(ENV2.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * int_to_real(ENV2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	ENV2.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := 198
	else
	if(ENV2.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	if((ENV2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  mod 2) = 0)
	ENV2.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((ENV2.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(ENV2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) - (floor(ENV2.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * int_to_real(ENV2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	ENV2.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := (ENV2.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + ENV2.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	end if
	else
	ENV2.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((ENV2.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(ENV2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) - (floor(ENV2.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * int_to_real(ENV2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	ENV2.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := (ENV2.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + ENV2.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	end if
	end if
	if(ENV2.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  > ENV2.t{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV2.t{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV2.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(ENV2.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int} + 1
	else
	ENV2.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(ENV2.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	end if
	if(engine_half_time{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2
	else
	if(engine_double_time{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2
	end if
	end if
	if(ENV2.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	if((ENV2.swing_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  mod 2) = 0)
	ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ((ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * rhythm_swing{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 100)
	else
	ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ((ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * - rhythm_swing{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 100)
	end if
	inc(ENV2.swing_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ENV2.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  - ENV2.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	if(ENV2.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ENV2.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	ENV2.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := random(- humanize_max{unknown} {no declaration} , humanize_max{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, random}
	ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ENV2.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(ENV2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_controller(102, ENV2.rhythm_playback[ENV2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_controller}
	else
	if(ENV2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_controller(103, ENV2.rhythm_playback[ENV2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_controller}
	else
	if(ENV2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_controller(104, ENV2.rhythm_playback[ENV2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_controller}
	else
	if(ENV2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_controller(105, ENV2.rhythm_playback[ENV2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_controller}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	inc(ENV2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ENV2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  >= ENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV2.t{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(ENV2.retrigger{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	for ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	for ENV2.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 127
	if(ENV2.last_note_ids[ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	note_off(ENV2.last_note_ids[ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, note_off}
	ENV2.last_note_ids[ENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV2.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end for
	end for
	end if
	end if
	if(ENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	wait(ENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, wait}
	else
	wait(1){Builtin, None, wait}
	end if
	end while
end function

function set_ENV2_note_selection
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare hold_value : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.note_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	if((ENV2.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0) and (ENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0))
	sort[ENV2.selected_notes_buffer{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]
	select(ENV2.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 1
	ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[ENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 2
	hold_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[ENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 1)
	if(ENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := hold_value{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[ENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	ENV2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	ENV2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	case 3
	ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[ENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 4
	ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 1)
	ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	ENV2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	case 5
	ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 6
	ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	if(ENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 2)
	ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	else
	if(ENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ENV2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end select
	else
	if((ENV2.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0) and (ENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0))
	ENV2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
end function

function run_ENV3
	ENV3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := NI_CALLBACK_ID{unknown} {no declaration} 
	while((cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0) and (ENV3.latch_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)) 
	call set_ENV3_note_selection{UserDefined, None, set_ENV3_note_selection}
	if(ENV3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ENV3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	else
	if(ENV3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	if(ENV3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(assigned_instruments[2, ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	ENV3.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_instruments[ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	mf_insert_event(ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration} , (NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration}  - transport_stamp{unknown} {no declaration} ) - ms_to_ticks(12000){Builtin, None, ms_to_ticks}, MIDI_COMMAND_CC{unknown} {no declaration} , dyn_cc_num{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV3.rhythm_playback[ENV3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, mf_insert_event}
	for ENV3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ENV3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	ENV3.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[ENV3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if((ENV3.active_notes[0, ENV3.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1) and (ENV3.last_note_ids[ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV3.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0))
	ENV3.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ENV3.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ENV3.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ENV3.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ENV3.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ENV3.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ENV3.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration} , 50, 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ENV3.current_engine_notes[ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV3.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV3.active_notes[1, ENV3.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	ENV3.last_note_ids[ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV3.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(2, ENV3.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	midi_ids[ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := mf_insert_event(ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration} , (NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration}  - transport_stamp{unknown} {no declaration} ) - ms_to_ticks(12000){Builtin, None, ms_to_ticks}, MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV3.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration} , 100){Builtin, None, mf_insert_event}
	ENV3.mf_note_ids[ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV3.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := midi_ids[ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV3.note_entry_time[ENV3.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration} 
	midi_pos[ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := midi_pos[ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1
	end if
	end for
	end if
	if(ENV3.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	if(ENV3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > ENV3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} )
	for ENV3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 127
	if(ENV3.last_note_ids[ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	ENV3.note_check{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	for ENV3.m{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ENV3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	if(ENV3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[ENV3.m{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV3.note_check{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end for
	if(ENV3.note_check{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	mf_set_event_par(ENV3.mf_note_ids[ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration}  - ENV3.note_entry_time[ENV3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, mf_set_event_par}
	note_off(ENV3.last_note_ids[ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, note_off}
	ENV3.last_note_ids[ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV3.active_notes[1, ENV3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV3.current_engine_notes[ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	end for
	end if
	end if
	if((see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_ENV3{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	ENV3.rhythm_indicator{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_BG{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	ENV3.rhythm_indicator[ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 0
	end for
	ENV3.rhythm_indicator[ENV3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[ENV3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 1
	end if
	if(ENV3.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH{unknown} {no declaration}  * ENV3.eight_notes_bar_amount{unknown} {no declaration} 
	select(ENV3.rate{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 95
	ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2
	case 97
	ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2
	case 98
	ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 3
	case 99
	ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 4
	end select
	ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  / 100
	else
	if(ENV3.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	select(ENV3.rate{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 0
	ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration}  / 4
	case 1
	ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2
	case 2
	ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 3
	ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 4
	ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_QUARTER{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 5
	ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 6
	ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 7
	ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end select
	end if
	end if
	if(ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  < 5000)
	ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := 5000
	end if
	if((see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_SUBMAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	ENV3.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	ENV3.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((ENV3.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(ENV3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) - (floor(ENV3.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * int_to_real(ENV3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	if(ENV3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	ENV3.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((ENV3.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(ENV3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) - (floor(ENV3.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * int_to_real(ENV3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	ENV3.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := 198
	else
	if(ENV3.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	if((ENV3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  mod 2) = 0)
	ENV3.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((ENV3.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(ENV3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) - (floor(ENV3.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * int_to_real(ENV3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	ENV3.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := (ENV3.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + ENV3.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	end if
	else
	ENV3.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((ENV3.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(ENV3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) - (floor(ENV3.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * int_to_real(ENV3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	ENV3.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := (ENV3.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + ENV3.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	end if
	end if
	if(ENV3.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  > ENV3.t{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV3.t{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV3.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(ENV3.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int} + 1
	else
	ENV3.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(ENV3.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	end if
	if(engine_half_time{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2
	else
	if(engine_double_time{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2
	end if
	end if
	if(ENV3.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	if((ENV3.swing_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  mod 2) = 0)
	ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ((ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * rhythm_swing{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 100)
	else
	ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ((ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * - rhythm_swing{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 100)
	end if
	inc(ENV3.swing_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ENV3.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  - ENV3.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	if(ENV3.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ENV3.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	ENV3.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := random(- humanize_max{unknown} {no declaration} , humanize_max{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, random}
	ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ENV3.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(ENV3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_controller(102, ENV3.rhythm_playback[ENV3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_controller}
	else
	if(ENV3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_controller(103, ENV3.rhythm_playback[ENV3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_controller}
	else
	if(ENV3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_controller(104, ENV3.rhythm_playback[ENV3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_controller}
	else
	if(ENV3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_controller(105, ENV3.rhythm_playback[ENV3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_controller}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	inc(ENV3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ENV3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  >= ENV3.steps{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV3.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV3.t{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(ENV3.retrigger{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	for ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	for ENV3.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 127
	if(ENV3.last_note_ids[ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	note_off(ENV3.last_note_ids[ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, note_off}
	ENV3.last_note_ids[ENV3.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV3.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end for
	end for
	end if
	end if
	if(ENV3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	wait(ENV3.step_length{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, wait}
	else
	wait(1){Builtin, None, wait}
	end if
	end while
end function

function set_ENV3_note_selection
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare hold_value : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ENV3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.note_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	if((ENV3.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0) and (ENV3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0))
	sort[ENV3.selected_notes_buffer{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]
	select(ENV3.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 1
	ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[ENV3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 2
	hold_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[ENV3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ENV3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 1)
	if(ENV3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := hold_value{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[ENV3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	ENV3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	ENV3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	case 3
	ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[ENV3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 4
	ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ENV3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 1)
	ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	ENV3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	case 5
	ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 6
	ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ENV3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	if(ENV3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 2)
	ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	else
	if(ENV3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ENV3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end select
	else
	if((ENV3.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0) and (ENV3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0))
	ENV3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
end function

function run_ENV4
	ENV4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := NI_CALLBACK_ID{unknown} {no declaration} 
	while((cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0) and (ENV4.latch_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)) 
	call set_ENV4_note_selection{UserDefined, None, set_ENV4_note_selection}
	if(ENV4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ENV4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	else
	if(ENV4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
