	if(ENV4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(assigned_instruments[2, ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	ENV4.instr_in_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_instruments[ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	mf_insert_event(ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration} , (NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration}  - transport_stamp{unknown} {no declaration} ) - ms_to_ticks(12000){Builtin, None, ms_to_ticks}, MIDI_COMMAND_CC{unknown} {no declaration} , dyn_cc_num{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV4.rhythm_playback[ENV4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, mf_insert_event}
	for ENV4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ENV4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	ENV4.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[ENV4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if((ENV4.active_notes[0, ENV4.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1) and (ENV4.last_note_ids[ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV4.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0))
	ENV4.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  + (assigned_octave_shifts[ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12)
	if(ENV4.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ENV4.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(ENV4.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration}  > 127)
	ENV4.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration}  := 127
	end if
	end if
	ENV4.note_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := play_note(ENV4.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration} , 50, 0, - 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
	ENV4.current_engine_notes[ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV4.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV4.active_notes[1, ENV4.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	ENV4.last_note_ids[ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV4.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	_allow_groups(2, ENV4.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, _allow_groups}
	midi_ids[ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := mf_insert_event(ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration} , (NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration}  - transport_stamp{unknown} {no declaration} ) - ms_to_ticks(12000){Builtin, None, ms_to_ticks}, MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV4.octaved_note{unknown} {no declaration} , 100){Builtin, None, mf_insert_event}
	ENV4.mf_note_ids[ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV4.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := midi_ids[ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV4.note_entry_time[ENV4.engine_note_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration} 
	midi_pos[ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := midi_pos[ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1
	end if
	end for
	end if
	if(ENV4.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	if(ENV4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > ENV4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} )
	for ENV4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 127
	if(ENV4.last_note_ids[ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	ENV4.note_check{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	for ENV4.m{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ENV4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	if(ENV4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[ENV4.m{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV4.note_check{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end for
	if(ENV4.note_check{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	mf_set_event_par(ENV4.mf_note_ids[ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration}  - ENV4.note_entry_time[ENV4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, mf_set_event_par}
	note_off(ENV4.last_note_ids[ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, note_off}
	ENV4.last_note_ids[ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV4.active_notes[1, ENV4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV4.current_engine_notes[ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	end for
	end if
	end if
	if((see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_ENV4{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	ENV4.rhythm_indicator{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_BG{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	ENV4.rhythm_indicator[ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 0
	end for
	ENV4.rhythm_indicator[ENV4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[ENV4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 1
	end if
	if(ENV4.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH{unknown} {no declaration}  * ENV4.eight_notes_bar_amount{unknown} {no declaration} 
	select(ENV4.rate{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 95
	ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2
	case 97
	ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2
	case 98
	ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 3
	case 99
	ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 4
	end select
	ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  / 100
	else
	if(ENV4.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	select(ENV4.rate{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 0
	ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration}  / 4
	case 1
	ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2
	case 2
	ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 3
	ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 4
	ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_QUARTER{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 5
	ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 6
	ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 7
	ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end select
	end if
	end if
	if(ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  < 5000)
	ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := 5000
	end if
	if((see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_SUBMAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	ENV4.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	ENV4.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((ENV4.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(ENV4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) - (floor(ENV4.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * int_to_real(ENV4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	if(ENV4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	ENV4.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((ENV4.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(ENV4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) - (floor(ENV4.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * int_to_real(ENV4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	ENV4.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := 198
	else
	if(ENV4.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	if((ENV4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  mod 2) = 0)
	ENV4.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((ENV4.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(ENV4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) - (floor(ENV4.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * int_to_real(ENV4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	ENV4.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := (ENV4.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + ENV4.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	end if
	else
	ENV4.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((ENV4.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(ENV4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) - (floor(ENV4.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * int_to_real(ENV4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	ENV4.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := (ENV4.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + ENV4.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	end if
	end if
	if(ENV4.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  > ENV4.t{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV4.t{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.indicator_hold{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV4.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(ENV4.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int} + 1
	else
	ENV4.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(ENV4.real_hold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	end if
	if(engine_half_time{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2
	else
	if(engine_double_time{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2
	end if
	end if
	if(ENV4.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	if((ENV4.swing_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  mod 2) = 0)
	ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ((ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * rhythm_swing{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 100)
	else
	ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ((ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * - rhythm_swing{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 100)
	end if
	inc(ENV4.swing_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ENV4.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  - ENV4.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	if(ENV4.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  < 0)
	ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ENV4.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	ENV4.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := random(- humanize_max{unknown} {no declaration} , humanize_max{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, random}
	ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  + ENV4.humanize_hold{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(ENV4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_controller(102, ENV4.rhythm_playback[ENV4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_controller}
	else
	if(ENV4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_controller(103, ENV4.rhythm_playback[ENV4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_controller}
	else
	if(ENV4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_controller(104, ENV4.rhythm_playback[ENV4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_controller}
	else
	if(ENV4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = ENV4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_controller(105, ENV4.rhythm_playback[ENV4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_controller}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	inc(ENV4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(ENV4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  >= ENV4.steps{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ENV4.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV4.t{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(ENV4.retrigger{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	for ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	for ENV4.a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 127
	if(ENV4.last_note_ids[ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	note_off(ENV4.last_note_ids[ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, note_off}
	ENV4.last_note_ids[ENV4.i{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV4.a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end for
	end for
	end if
	end if
	if(ENV4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	wait(ENV4.step_length{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, wait}
	else
	wait(1){Builtin, None, wait}
	end if
	end while
end function

function set_ENV4_note_selection
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare hold_value : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ENV4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.note_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	if((ENV4.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0) and (ENV4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0))
	sort[ENV4.selected_notes_buffer{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]
	select(ENV4.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 1
	ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[ENV4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 2
	hold_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[ENV4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ENV4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 1)
	if(ENV4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := hold_value{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[ENV4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	ENV4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	ENV4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	case 3
	ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[ENV4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 4
	ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ENV4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 1)
	ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	ENV4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	case 5
	ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 6
	ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ENV4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	if(ENV4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 2)
	ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	else
	if(ENV4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ENV4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end select
	else
	if((ENV4.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0) and (ENV4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0))
	ENV4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
end function

function run_GRENV1
	GRENV1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := NI_CALLBACK_ID{unknown} {no declaration} 
	while((search[KEY_DOWN{unknown} {no declaration} , 1] # - 1) and (GRENV1.latch_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)) 
	if(GRENV1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = GRENV1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	GRENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(GRENV1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = GRENV2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	GRENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	end if
	if((see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_GRAIN1{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (loaded_instruments[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1))
	if(btn_engine_page_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	GRENV1.rhythm_indicator{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_BG{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	for GRENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	GRENV1.rhythm_indicator[GRENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[GRENV1.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 0
	end for
	GRENV1.rhythm_indicator[GRENV1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[GRENV1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 1
	end if
	if(GRENV1.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	GRENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH{unknown} {no declaration}  * GRENV1.eight_notes_bar_amount{unknown} {no declaration} 
	select(GRENV1.rate{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 95
	GRENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2
	case 97
	GRENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2
	case 98
	GRENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 3
	case 99
	GRENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 4
	case 100
	GRENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 6
	case 101
	GRENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 8
	end select
	GRENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  / 100
	else
	if(GRENV1.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	select(GRENV1.rate{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 0
	GRENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration}  / 4
	case 1
	GRENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2
	case 2
	GRENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 3
	GRENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 4
	GRENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_QUARTER{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 5
	GRENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 6
	GRENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 7
	GRENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end select
	end if
	end if
	if(GRENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  < 5000)
	GRENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := 5000
	end if
	if(GRAIN1.position_choice{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	if(GRAIN1.position_A{unknown} {no declaration}  <= GRAIN1.position_B{unknown} {no declaration} )
	GRAIN1.pos{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRAIN1.position_A{unknown} {no declaration}  + real_to_int((int_to_real(GRAIN1.position_B{unknown} {no declaration}  - GRAIN1.position_A{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / 127) * int_to_real(GRENV1.rhythm_playback[GRENV1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	else
	GRAIN1.pos{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRAIN1.position_A{unknown} {no declaration}  - real_to_int((int_to_real(GRAIN1.position_A{unknown} {no declaration}  - GRAIN1.position_B{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / 127) * int_to_real(GRENV1.rhythm_playback[GRENV1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	end if
	GRAIN1.pos_knob{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1000 - real_to_int((1000 / int_to_real(GRAIN1.position_B{unknown} {no declaration}  - GRAIN1.position_A{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) * int_to_real(GRAIN1.position_B{unknown} {no declaration}  - GRAIN1.pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	end if
	inc(GRENV1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(GRENV1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  >= GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration} )
	GRENV1.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	if(search[KEY_DOWN{unknown} {no declaration} , 1] # - 1)
	wait(GRENV1.step_length{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, wait}
	else
	wait(1){Builtin, None, wait}
	end if
	end while
end function

function set_GRENV1_note_selection
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare hold_value : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to GRENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	GRENV1.selected_notes_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.note_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	if((GRENV1.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0) and (GRENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0))
	sort[GRENV1.selected_notes_buffer{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]
	select(GRENV1.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 1
	GRENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.selected_notes_buffer[GRENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRENV1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 2
	hold_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.selected_notes_buffer[GRENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(GRENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 1)
	if(GRENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	GRENV1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := hold_value{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	GRENV1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.selected_notes_buffer[GRENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	GRENV1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	GRENV1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	case 3
	GRENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.selected_notes_buffer[GRENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRENV1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 4
	GRENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(GRENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 1)
	GRENV1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRENV1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	GRENV1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	case 5
	GRENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRENV1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 6
	GRENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(GRENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	GRENV1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRENV1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	if(GRENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 2)
	GRENV1.selected_notes_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.selected_notes_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRENV1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	else
	if(GRENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	GRENV1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end select
	else
	if((GRENV1.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0) and (GRENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0))
	GRENV1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
end function

function run_GRENV2
	GRENV2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := NI_CALLBACK_ID{unknown} {no declaration} 
	while((search[KEY_DOWN{unknown} {no declaration} , 1] # - 1) and (GRENV2.latch_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)) 
	if(GRENV2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = GRENV1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	GRENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(GRENV2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = GRENV2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	GRENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	end if
	if((see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_GRAIN2{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (loaded_instruments[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1))
	if(btn_engine_page_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	GRENV2.rhythm_indicator{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_BG{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	for GRENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	GRENV2.rhythm_indicator[GRENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[GRENV2.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 0
	end for
	GRENV2.rhythm_indicator[GRENV2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[GRENV2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 1
	end if
	if(GRENV2.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	GRENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH{unknown} {no declaration}  * GRENV2.eight_notes_bar_amount{unknown} {no declaration} 
	select(GRENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 95
	GRENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2
	case 97
	GRENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 2
	case 98
	GRENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 3
	case 99
	GRENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 4
	case 100
	GRENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 6
	case 101
	GRENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  * 8
	end select
	GRENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  / 100
	else
	if(GRENV2.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	select(GRENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 0
	GRENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration}  / 4
	case 1
	GRENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2
	case 2
	GRENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 3
	GRENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 4
	GRENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_QUARTER{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 5
	GRENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 6
	GRENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 7
	GRENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end select
	end if
	end if
	if(GRENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  < 5000)
	GRENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration}  := 5000
	end if
	if(GRAIN2.position_choice{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	if(GRAIN2.position_A{unknown} {no declaration}  <= GRAIN2.position_B{unknown} {no declaration} )
	GRAIN2.pos{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRAIN2.position_A{unknown} {no declaration}  + real_to_int((int_to_real(GRAIN2.position_B{unknown} {no declaration}  - GRAIN2.position_A{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / 127) * int_to_real(GRENV2.rhythm_playback[GRENV2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	else
	GRAIN2.pos{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRAIN2.position_A{unknown} {no declaration}  - real_to_int((int_to_real(GRAIN2.position_A{unknown} {no declaration}  - GRAIN2.position_B{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / 127) * int_to_real(GRENV2.rhythm_playback[GRENV2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	end if
	GRAIN2.pos_knob{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1000 - real_to_int((1000 / int_to_real(GRAIN2.position_B{unknown} {no declaration}  - GRAIN2.position_A{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) * int_to_real(GRAIN2.position_B{unknown} {no declaration}  - GRAIN2.pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	end if
	inc(GRENV2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(GRENV2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  >= GRENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration} )
	GRENV2.act_step{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	if(search[KEY_DOWN{unknown} {no declaration} , 1] # - 1)
	wait(GRENV2.step_length{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, wait}
	else
	wait(1){Builtin, None, wait}
	end if
	end while
end function

function set_GRENV2_note_selection
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare hold_value : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to GRENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	GRENV2.selected_notes_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.note_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	if((GRENV2.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0) and (GRENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0))
	sort[GRENV2.selected_notes_buffer{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]
	select(GRENV2.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 1
	GRENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.selected_notes_buffer[GRENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRENV2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 2
	hold_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.selected_notes_buffer[GRENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(GRENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 1)
	if(GRENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	GRENV2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := hold_value{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	GRENV2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.selected_notes_buffer[GRENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  - 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	GRENV2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	GRENV2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	case 3
	GRENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.selected_notes_buffer[GRENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRENV2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 4
	GRENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(GRENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 1)
	GRENV2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRENV2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	GRENV2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	case 5
	GRENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRENV2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 6
	GRENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.selected_notes_buffer[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(GRENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	GRENV2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.selected_notes_buffer[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRENV2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	else
	if(GRENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  > 2)
	GRENV2.selected_notes_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.selected_notes_buffer[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRENV2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	else
	if(GRENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	GRENV2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end select
	else
	if((GRENV2.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0) and (GRENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0))
	GRENV2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
end function

function update_purge
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare s : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare n : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	if(search[loaded_instruments{unknown} {no declaration} , loaded_instruments_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ] = - 1)
	for n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to rr_nums[loaded_instruments_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	purge_group(first_groupID[loaded_instruments_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + n{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){Builtin, None, purge_group}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, first_groupID[loaded_instruments_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + n{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, - 1){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	end for
	end if
	if(loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	for n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to rr_nums[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	purge_group(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + n{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, purge_group}
	end for
	end if
	for n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to rr_nums[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} , first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + n{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, - 1){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	end for
	loaded_instruments_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	call update_key_colors{UserDefined, None, update_key_colors}
	call PanEn.update_step_settings{UserDefined, None, PanEn.update_step_settings}
	call PanEn.reset_all_mods{UserDefined, None, PanEn.reset_all_mods}
	call PanEn.update_bypass{UserDefined, None, PanEn.update_bypass}
	call PanEn.set_step_lbl_text{UserDefined, None, PanEn.set_step_lbl_text}
	call PanEn.update_head_labels{UserDefined, None, PanEn.update_head_labels}
end function

function update_key_colors
	declare min_key : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare max_key : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 127
	set_key_color(i{unknown} {no declaration} , KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_key_color}
	set_key_type(i{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_KEY_TYPE_DEFAULT{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_key_type}
	end for
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	n{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(n{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	min_key{unknown} {no declaration}  := clamp2(instr_min_key[n{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - (assigned_octave_shifts[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12), 0, 127){UserDefined, None, clamp2}
	max_key{unknown} {no declaration}  := clamp2(instr_max_key[n{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - (assigned_octave_shifts[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * 12), 0, 127){UserDefined, None, clamp2}
	for s{unknown} {no declaration}  := min_key{unknown} {no declaration}  to max_key{unknown} {no declaration} 
	set_key_color(s{unknown} {no declaration} , KEY_COLOR_BLUE{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_key_color}
	set_key_type(s{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_KEY_TYPE_DEFAULT{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_key_type}
	end for
	end if
	end for
end function

function link_control_to_ep(id : unknown, engine_par : unknown, slot : unknown, generic : unknown, motion : unknown)
	core.control_ids[core.n{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	core.engine_par[core.n{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := engine_par{unknown} {no declaration} 
	core.slot[core.n{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := slot{unknown} {no declaration} 
	core.generic[core.n{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := generic{unknown} {no declaration} 
	core.motion[core.n{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := motion{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(core.n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
end function

function relink_control_to_ep(id : unknown, engine_par : unknown, slot : unknown, generic : unknown, motion : unknown)
	declare s : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	s{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[core.control_ids{unknown} {no declaration} , id{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := engine_par{unknown} {no declaration} 
	core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := slot{unknown} {no declaration} 
	core.generic[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := generic{unknown} {no declaration} 
	core.motion[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := motion{unknown} {no declaration} 
end function

function _allow_groups(engine : unknown, eventID : unknown, slot_count : unknown)
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare s : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare n : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare v : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare idx : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare hold : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to NUM_GROUPS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	set_event_par_arr(eventID{unknown} {no declaration} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_event_par_arr}
	end for
	v{unknown} {no declaration}  := slot_count{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(engine{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	if(art_length[loaded_instruments[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	set_event_par_arr(eventID{unknown} {no declaration} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown} {no declaration} , 1, first_groupID[loaded_instruments[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + slots_rrCount[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_event_par_arr}
	if(rr_nums[loaded_instruments[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	slots_rrCount[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := slots_rrCount[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	while(slots_rrCount[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = hold{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	slots_rrCount[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := random(0, rr_nums[loaded_instruments[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1){Builtin, None, random}
	end while
	end if
	else
	s{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_instruments[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to rr_nums[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	set_event_par_arr(eventID{unknown} {no declaration} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown} {no declaration} , 1, first_groupID[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_event_par_arr}
	end for
	end if
	else
	if((engine{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1) and (art_length[loaded_instruments[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0))
	s{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[engine{unknown} {no declaration} , slot_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(s{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	set_event_par_arr(eventID{unknown} {no declaration} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown} {no declaration} , 1, first_groupID[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + slots_rrCount[slot_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_event_par_arr}
	if(slot_count{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	inc(slots_chord_subCount[1, slot_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if((ARP1.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 14) or (ARP1.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0))
	if(slots_chord_subCount[1, slot_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= ARP1.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} )
	inc(slots_rrCount[slot_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	slots_chord_subCount[1, slot_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	if((ARP1.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  # 14) and (ARP1.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0))
	inc(slots_rrCount[slot_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	else
	if(slot_count{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	inc(slots_chord_subCount[1, slot_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if((ARP2.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 14) or (ARP2.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0))
	if(slots_chord_subCount[1, slot_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= ARP2.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} )
	inc(slots_rrCount[slot_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	slots_chord_subCount[1, slot_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	if((ARP2.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  # 14) and (ARP2.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0))
	inc(slots_rrCount[slot_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	else
	if(slot_count{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	inc(slots_chord_subCount[1, slot_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if((ARP3.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 14) or (ARP3.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0))
	if(slots_chord_subCount[1, slot_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= ARP3.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} )
	inc(slots_rrCount[slot_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	slots_chord_subCount[1, slot_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	if((ARP3.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  # 14) and (ARP3.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0))
	inc(slots_rrCount[slot_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	else
	if(slot_count{unknown} {no declaration}  = 3)
	inc(slots_chord_subCount[1, slot_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if((ARP4.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 14) or (ARP4.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0))
	if(slots_chord_subCount[1, slot_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= ARP4.selected_cursor{unknown} {no declaration} )
	inc(slots_rrCount[slot_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	slots_chord_subCount[1, slot_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	if((ARP4.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  # 14) and (ARP4.note_repeat{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0))
	inc(slots_rrCount[slot_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(slots_rrCount[slot_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= rr_nums[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	slots_rrCount[slot_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	else
	if(((engine{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 1) and (engine{unknown} {no declaration}  # 3)) and (art_length[loaded_instruments[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1))
	s{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[engine{unknown} {no declaration} , slot_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(s{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	for n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to rr_nums[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	set_event_par_arr(eventID{unknown} {no declaration} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown} {no declaration} , 1, first_groupID[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_event_par_arr}
	end for
	end if
	else
	if(engine{unknown} {no declaration}  = 3)
	s{unknown} {no declaration}  := assigned_instruments[engine{unknown} {no declaration} , slot_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(s{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	for n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to rr_nums[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	set_event_par_arr(eventID{unknown} {no declaration} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{unknown} {no declaration} , 1, first_groupID[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_event_par_arr}
	end for
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
end function

function check_cursor_amount
	call ARP1.check_cursor_amount{UserDefined, None, ARP1.check_cursor_amount}
	call ARP2.check_cursor_amount{UserDefined, None, ARP2.check_cursor_amount}
	call ARP3.check_cursor_amount{UserDefined, None, ARP3.check_cursor_amount}
	call ARP4.check_cursor_amount{UserDefined, None, ARP4.check_cursor_amount}
	if(ENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	for s{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 127
	if(ENV1.last_note_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	mf_set_event_par(ENV1.mf_note_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration}  - ENV1.note_entry_time[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, mf_set_event_par}
	note_off(ENV1.last_note_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, note_off}
	ENV1.last_note_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end for
	end for
	stop_wait(ENV1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){Builtin, None, stop_wait}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[ENV1.note_buffer{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	ENV1.note_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV1.selected_notes_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  < num_elements[_ENV1.current_engine_notes{unknown} {no declaration} ])
	_ENV1.current_engine_notes[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end for
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[_ENV1.last_note_ids{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	_ENV1.last_note_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end for
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[_ENV1.active_notes{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	_ENV1.active_notes[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end for
	ENV1.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	ENV1.rhythm_indicator[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 0
	end for
	end if
	if(ENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	for s{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 127
	if(ENV2.last_note_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	mf_set_event_par(ENV2.mf_note_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration}  - ENV2.note_entry_time[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, mf_set_event_par}
	note_off(ENV2.last_note_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, note_off}
	ENV2.last_note_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end for
	end for
	stop_wait(ENV2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){Builtin, None, stop_wait}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[ENV2.note_buffer{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	ENV2.note_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV2.selected_notes_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  < num_elements[_ENV2.current_engine_notes{unknown} {no declaration} ])
	_ENV2.current_engine_notes[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end for
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[_ENV2.last_note_ids{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	_ENV2.last_note_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end for
	ENV2.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	ENV2.rhythm_indicator[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 0
	end for
	end if
	if(ENV3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	for s{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 127
	if(ENV3.last_note_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	mf_set_event_par(ENV3.mf_note_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration}  - ENV3.note_entry_time[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, mf_set_event_par}
	note_off(ENV3.last_note_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, note_off}
	ENV3.last_note_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end for
	end for
	stop_wait(ENV3.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){Builtin, None, stop_wait}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[ENV3.note_buffer{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	ENV3.note_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV3.selected_notes_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  < num_elements[_ENV3.current_engine_notes{unknown} {no declaration} ])
	_ENV3.current_engine_notes[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end for
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[_ENV3.last_note_ids{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	_ENV3.last_note_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end for
	ENV3.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	ENV3.rhythm_indicator[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 0
	end for
	end if
	if(ENV4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	for s{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 127
	if(ENV4.last_note_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	mf_set_event_par(ENV4.mf_note_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_SONG_POSITION{unknown} {no declaration}  - ENV4.note_entry_time[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, mf_set_event_par}
	note_off(ENV4.last_note_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, note_off}
	ENV4.last_note_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end for
	end for
	stop_wait(ENV4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){Builtin, None, stop_wait}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[ENV4.note_buffer{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	ENV4.note_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV4.selected_notes_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  < num_elements[_ENV4.current_engine_notes{unknown} {no declaration} ])
	_ENV4.current_engine_notes[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end for
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[_ENV4.last_note_ids{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	_ENV4.last_note_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end for
	ENV4.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	ENV4.rhythm_indicator[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 0
	end for
	end if
	if((((((((ARP1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0) and (ARP2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)) and (ARP3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)) and (ARP4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)) and (ENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)) and (ENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)) and (ENV3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)) and (ENV4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0))
	cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	if(cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	ARP1.check_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP2.check_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP3.check_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP4.check_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV1.check_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV2.check_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV3.check_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV4.check_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	if(search[KEY_DOWN{unknown} {no declaration} , 1] = - 1)
	call reset_grain_envelopes{UserDefined, None, reset_grain_envelopes}
	end if
end function

function _on_controller
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare n : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	select(n{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 0
	select(get_menu_item_value(assign_slot_menu[n{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , assign_slot_menu[n{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value})
	case 1
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ArpEn.MAX_STEPS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	if((ARP1.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP1.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) < 0)
	ARP1.rhythm_playback[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + (((ARP1.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP1.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * CC[dyn_cc_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 127)
	else
	ARP1.rhythm_playback[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - (((ARP1.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP1.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * CC[dyn_cc_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 127)
	end if
	end for
	case 2
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 100 - 1
	if((ENV1.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - ENV1.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) < 0)
	ENV1.rhythm_playback[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + (((ENV1.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - ENV1.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * CC[dyn_cc_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 127)
	else
	ENV1.rhythm_playback[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - (((ENV1.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - ENV1.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * CC[dyn_cc_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 127)
	end if
	end for
	end select
	case 1
	select(get_menu_item_value(assign_slot_menu[n{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , assign_slot_menu[n{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value})
	case 1
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ArpEn.MAX_STEPS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	if((ARP2.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP2.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) < 0)
	ARP2.rhythm_playback[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + (((ARP2.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP2.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * CC[dyn_cc_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 127)
	else
	ARP2.rhythm_playback[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - (((ARP2.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP2.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * CC[dyn_cc_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 127)
	end if
	end for
	case 2
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 100 - 1
	if((ENV2.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - ENV2.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) < 0)
	ENV2.rhythm_playback[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + (((ENV2.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - ENV2.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * CC[dyn_cc_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 127)
	else
	ENV2.rhythm_playback[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - (((ENV2.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - ENV2.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * CC[dyn_cc_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 127)
	end if
	end for
	case 3
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 100 - 1
	if((GRENV1.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - GRENV1.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) < 0)
	GRENV1.rhythm_playback[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + (((GRENV1.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - GRENV1.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * CC[dyn_cc_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 127)
	else
	GRENV1.rhythm_playback[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - (((GRENV1.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - GRENV1.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * CC[dyn_cc_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 127)
	end if
	end for
	end select
	case 2
	select(get_menu_item_value(assign_slot_menu[n{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , assign_slot_menu[n{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value})
	case 1
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ArpEn.MAX_STEPS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	if((ARP3.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP3.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) < 0)
	ARP3.rhythm_playback[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + (((ARP3.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP3.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * CC[dyn_cc_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 127)
	else
	ARP3.rhythm_playback[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - (((ARP3.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP3.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * CC[dyn_cc_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 127)
	end if
	end for
	case 2
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 100 - 1
	if((ENV3.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - ENV3.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) < 0)
	ENV3.rhythm_playback[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + (((ENV3.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - ENV3.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * CC[dyn_cc_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 127)
	else
	ENV3.rhythm_playback[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - (((ENV3.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - ENV3.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * CC[dyn_cc_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 127)
	end if
	end for
	case 3
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 100 - 1
	if((GRENV2.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - GRENV2.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) < 0)
	GRENV2.rhythm_playback[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + (((GRENV2.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - GRENV2.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * CC[dyn_cc_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 127)
	else
	GRENV2.rhythm_playback[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - (((GRENV2.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - GRENV2.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * CC[dyn_cc_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 127)
	end if
	end for
	end select
	case 3
	select(get_menu_item_value(assign_slot_menu[n{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , assign_slot_menu[n{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value})
	case 1
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ArpEn.MAX_STEPS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	if((ARP4.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP4.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) < 0)
	ARP4.rhythm_playback[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + (((ARP4.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP4.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * CC[dyn_cc_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 127)
	else
	ARP4.rhythm_playback[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - (((ARP4.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - ARP4.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * CC[dyn_cc_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 127)
	end if
	end for
	case 2
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 100 - 1
	if((ENV4.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - ENV4.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) < 0)
	ENV4.rhythm_playback[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + (((ENV4.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - ENV4.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * CC[dyn_cc_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 127)
	else
	ENV4.rhythm_playback[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - (((ENV4.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - ENV4.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) * CC[dyn_cc_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 127)
	end if
	end for
	end select
	end select
	end for
	if(see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} )
	if(in_range(see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration} , UIpage_ARP1{unknown} {no declaration} , UIpage_ENV4{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, in_range})
	call update_mod_graphics{UserDefined, None, update_mod_graphics}
	end if
	else
	if(in_range(see_page{unknown} {no declaration} , UIpage_GRAIN1{unknown} {no declaration} , UIpage_GRAIN2{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, in_range})
	call update_mod_graphics{UserDefined, None, update_mod_graphics}
	end if
	end if
end function

function set_background_animation
	lbl_knob_main_animation{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := real_to_int(round((int_to_real(bg_picturestate{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / 126) * 64){Builtin, None, round}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	lbl_main_animation_lightfx{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := bg_picturestate{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2
end function

function show_hide_solo_mute_buttons
	if(see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} )
	mixer.solo[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := (150 - 13) - 11
	mixer.solo[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_y := ((510 - 45) - 135) - 22
	mixer.solo[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := (150 - 13) - 11
	mixer.solo[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_y := 60 + 135
	mixer.solo[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := ((850 - 150) - 13) - 11
	mixer.solo[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_y := 60 + 135
	mixer.solo[3]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := ((850 - 150) - 13) - 11
	mixer.solo[3]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_y := ((510 - 45) - 135) - 22
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	mixer.solo[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	mixer.mute[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	mixer.mute[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := mixer.solo[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x + 25
	mixer.mute[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_y := mixer.solo[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y
	end for
	end if
	if(see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MIXER{unknown} {no declaration} )
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	mixer.solo[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := ((73 - 22) + 14) + (151 * slot_translation[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	mixer.solo[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_y := 100 + slot_position_offset[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	mixer.mute[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := (77 + 14) + (151 * slot_translation[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	mixer.mute[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_y := 100 + slot_position_offset[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	end if
end function

function set_current_control(control : unknown, unit : unknown, label : unknown, label_text : unknown)
	ctrl{unknown} {no declaration}  := control{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := get_ui_id(control{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}
	ctrl_unit{unknown} {no declaration}  := unit{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ctrl_label{unknown} {no declaration}  := get_ui_id(label{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}
	ctrl_label_text{unknown} {no declaration}  := label_text{unknown} {no declaration} 
	call handle_control_change{UserDefined, None, handle_control_change}
end function

function handle_control_change
	s{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[core.control_ids{unknown} {no declaration} , ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare n : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare last_cb : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare time_remaining : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	time_remaining{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1000000
	declare visible_allow : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare mod_idx : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare target_idx : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare sat_idx : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare value_label : string {Reuses: 0}
	declare fx_sat_balancer : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare control_value : real {Reuses: 0}
	declare hold : real {Reuses: 0}
	if(((ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide = HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide = HIDE_PART_BG{unknown} {no declaration} )) or (ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide = HIDE_PART_VALUE{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	visible_allow{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	if(visible_deny{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	visible_allow{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	if((s{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1) and (core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # {unknown} {no declaration} ))
	if(core.motion[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := "Motion"
	visible_allow{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	call update_fx_motion_values{UserDefined, None, update_fx_motion_values}
	else
	if(((search[attack{unknown} {no declaration} , ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration} ] # - 1) and (loaded_instruments[search[attack{unknown} {no declaration} , ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)) or ((search[decay{unknown} {no declaration} , ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration} ] # - 1) and (loaded_instruments[search[decay{unknown} {no declaration} , ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)))
	if(search[attack{unknown} {no declaration} , ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration} ] # - 1)
	slot_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[attack{unknown} {no declaration} , ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	else
	slot_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[decay{unknown} {no declaration} , ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	end if
	rr{unknown} {no declaration}  := rr_nums[loaded_instruments[slot_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to rr{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[slot_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} , "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None, find_mod}
	target_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[slot_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} , mod_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None, find_target}
	set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , ctrl{unknown} {no declaration} , first_groupID[loaded_instruments[slot_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} , mod_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , target_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	if(search[decay{unknown} {no declaration} , ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration} ] # - 1)
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown} {no declaration} , ctrl{unknown} {no declaration} , first_groupID[loaded_instruments[slot_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} , mod_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , target_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	end if
	end for
	ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , first_groupID[loaded_instruments[slot_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , mod_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , target_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp} & ctrl_unit{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	if(search[mixer.pan{unknown} {no declaration} , ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration} ] # - 1)
	slot_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[mixer.pan{unknown} {no declaration} , ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	if((PanEn.btn_active0{unknown} {no declaration}  .or. PanEn.btn_active1{unknown} {no declaration} ) = 1)
	if(((PanEn.btn_active0{unknown} {no declaration}  * PanEn.btn_slot_active[0, slot_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value) = 0) and ((PanEn.btn_active1{unknown} {no declaration}  * PanEn.btn_slot_active[1, slot_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value) = 0))
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to rr_nums[loaded_instruments[slot_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , mixer.pan[slot_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value, first_groupID[loaded_instruments[slot_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, - 1){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	end for
	ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , first_groupID[loaded_instruments[slot_id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, - 1){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp}
