	if((((((ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = get_ui_id(mixer.delay_feedback{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}) or (ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = get_ui_id(mixer.delay_hicut{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id})) or (ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = get_ui_id(mixer.delay_return{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id})) or (ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = get_ui_id(mixer.rev_predelay{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id})) or (ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = get_ui_id(mixer.rev_time{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id})) or (ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = get_ui_id(mixer.rev_return{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}))
	ctrl_label{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , core.generic[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp} & ctrl_unit{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	if(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	if(core.control_ids[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = get_ui_id(GRAIN1.density_knob{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id})
	if(GRAIN1.density_sync{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ctrl_label{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := SYNC_NAMES[GRAIN1.density{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	ctrl_label{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value & ctrl_unit{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	else
	if(core.control_ids[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = get_ui_id(GRAIN2.density_knob{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id})
	if(GRAIN2.density_sync{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	ctrl_label{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := SYNC_NAMES[GRAIN2.density{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	ctrl_label{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value & ctrl_unit{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	else
	if((search[GRAIN1.adsr_ctrl_ids{unknown} {no declaration} , core.control_ids[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ] # - 1) or (search[GRAIN2.adsr_ctrl_ids{unknown} {no declaration} , core.control_ids[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ] # - 1))
	ctrl_label{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := ctrl_unit{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	ctrl_label{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := (ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value / 10) & ctrl_unit{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	end if
	else
	if((search[trem_depth{unknown} {no declaration} , ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration} ] # - 1) or (search[trem_freq{unknown} {no declaration} , ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration} ] # - 1))
	ctrl_label{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := value_label{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	ctrl_label{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + core.generic[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp} & ctrl_unit{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	else
	if(ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = get_ui_id(mixer.delay_time{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id})
	if(mixer.delay_sync{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	ctrl_label{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TIME{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 1, 0){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp} & "ms"
	else
	ctrl_label{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := ctrl_unit{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	end if
	if(last_ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	last_ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	last_ctrl_label{unknown} {no declaration}  := ctrl_label{unknown} {no declaration} 
	last_ctrl_label_text{unknown} {no declaration}  := ctrl_label_text{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration}  # last_ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration} )
	last_ctrl_label{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := last_ctrl_label_text{unknown} {no declaration} 
	last_ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := ctrl_id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	last_ctrl_label{unknown} {no declaration}  := ctrl_label{unknown} {no declaration} 
	last_ctrl_label_text{unknown} {no declaration}  := ctrl_label_text{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	last_cb{unknown} {no declaration}  := NI_CALLBACK_ID{unknown} {no declaration} 
	while((time_remaining{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0) and (NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {no declaration}  = last_cb{unknown} {no declaration} )) 
	time_remaining{unknown} {no declaration}  := time_remaining{unknown} {no declaration}  - 10000
	wait(10000){Builtin, None, wait}
	end while
	if(NI_CALLBACK_ID{unknown} {no declaration}  = last_cb{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ctrl_label{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := ctrl_label_text{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	else
	ctrl_label{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := ctrl_label_text{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
end function

function remote_page_buttons
	main_page_button{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	mixer_page_button{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	pan_page_button{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
end function

function update_assigned_instruments
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare n : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare env_latch : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare arp_latch : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare grain_latch : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[_assigned_instruments{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	_assigned_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end for
	assigned_instruments[assign_slot_menu0{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_instruments[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	assigned_instruments[assign_slot_menu1{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_instruments[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	assigned_instruments[assign_slot_menu2{unknown} {no declaration} , 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_instruments[2]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	assigned_instruments[assign_slot_menu3{unknown} {no declaration} , 3]{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_instruments[3]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[assign_slot_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	assign_slot_menu[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := assign_slot_list[assign_slot_menu[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	lbl_engine_selector.bg_slot1{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := assign_slot_menu0{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_engine_selector.bg_slot4{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := assign_slot_menu3{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	select(get_menu_item_value(assign_slot_menu[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , assign_slot_menu[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value})
	case 0
	arp_latch{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	env_latch{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	grain_latch{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if((see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  = (UIpage_ARP1{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} )) or (see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  = (UIpage_ENV1{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} )))
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_SUBMAIN{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	case 1
	arp_latch{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	env_latch{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	grain_latch{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  = (UIpage_ENV1{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_ARP1{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} 
	call _update_shown_table{UserDefined, None, _update_shown_table}
	end if
	case 2
	arp_latch{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	env_latch{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	grain_latch{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if((see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  = (UIpage_ARP1{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} )) or (see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  = (UIpage_ENV1{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} )))
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_SUBMAIN{unknown} {no declaration} 
	call _update_shown_envelope{UserDefined, None, _update_shown_envelope}
	end if
	case 3
	grain_latch{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	if((see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_GRAIN1{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_GRAIN2{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	call _update_shown_envelope{UserDefined, None, _update_shown_envelope}
	end if
	end select
	if(loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	arp_latch{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	env_latch{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	grain_latch{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	select(i{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 0
	ARP1.latch_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  := arp_latch{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV1.latch_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  := env_latch{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	set_current_control(attack0{unknown} {no declaration} , " ms", attack0{unknown} {no declaration} , ""){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	set_current_control(decay0{unknown} {no declaration} , " ms", decay0{unknown} {no declaration} , ""){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	else
	attack0{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := "N/A"
	decay0{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := "N/A"
	end if
	case 1
	ARP2.latch_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  := arp_latch{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV2.latch_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  := env_latch{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRAIN1.active{unknown} {no declaration}  := grain_latch{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	set_current_control(attack1{unknown} {no declaration} , " ms", attack1{unknown} {no declaration} , ""){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	set_current_control(decay1{unknown} {no declaration} , " ms", decay1{unknown} {no declaration} , ""){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	else
	attack1{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := "N/A"
	decay1{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := "N/A"
	end if
	case 2
	ARP3.latch_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  := arp_latch{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV3.latch_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  := env_latch{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRAIN2.active{unknown} {no declaration}  := grain_latch{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	set_current_control(attack2{unknown} {no declaration} , " ms", attack2{unknown} {no declaration} , ""){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	set_current_control(decay2{unknown} {no declaration} , " ms", decay2{unknown} {no declaration} , ""){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	else
	attack2{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := "N/A"
	decay2{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := "N/A"
	end if
	case 3
	ARP4.latch_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  := arp_latch{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV4.latch_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  := env_latch{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	set_current_control(attack3{unknown} {no declaration} , " ms", attack3{unknown} {no declaration} , ""){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	set_current_control(decay3{unknown} {no declaration} , " ms", decay3{unknown} {no declaration} , ""){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	else
	attack3{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := "N/A"
	decay3{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := "N/A"
	end if
	end select
	end for
	if(preset.is_loading{unknown} {no declaration}  # 1)
	call update_visibility{UserDefined, None, update_visibility}
	call update_envelope_target{UserDefined, None, update_envelope_target}
	end if
	call update_key_colors{UserDefined, None, update_key_colors}
end function

function update_order_label
	message("note order " & ARP1.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, message}
	ARP1.note_order_label{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := note_order_conversion[ARP1.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.note_order_label{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := note_order_conversion[ARP2.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value]{unknown} {no declaration} 
end function

function update_octave_shifts
	assigned_octave_shifts[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := octave_shift_value_map[octave_shift_menu0{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	octave_shift_label[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := octave_shift_value_map[octave_shift_menu0{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	assigned_octave_shifts[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := octave_shift_value_map[octave_shift_menu1{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	octave_shift_label[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := octave_shift_value_map[octave_shift_menu1{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	assigned_octave_shifts[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := octave_shift_value_map[octave_shift_menu2{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	octave_shift_label[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := octave_shift_value_map[octave_shift_menu2{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	assigned_octave_shifts[3]{unknown} {no declaration}  := octave_shift_value_map[octave_shift_menu3{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	octave_shift_label[3]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := octave_shift_value_map[octave_shift_menu3{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
end function

function grain_page_switcher
	message("switcher to " & engine_active_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	select(engine_active_slot{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 1
	see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 2
	see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_grain1{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 3
	see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_grain2{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 4
	see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end select
	call change_engine_page{UserDefined, None, change_engine_page}
end function

function double_click
	click_interval{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration}  - new_click_time{unknown} {no declaration} 
	new_click_time{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(click_interval{unknown} {no declaration}  < double_klick_interval{unknown} {no declaration} )
	btn_double_click{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} 
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_SUBMAIN{unknown} {no declaration} 
	call update_visibility{UserDefined, None, update_visibility}
	end if
end function

function assign_to_page(id : unknown, page : unknown, hidemode : unknown)
	pageman.search_empty{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while(page_assigns[page{unknown} {no declaration} , pageman.search_empty{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0) 
	inc(pageman.search_empty{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	page_assigns[page{unknown} {no declaration} , pageman.search_empty{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := id{unknown} {no declaration} 
	page_assigns[page{unknown} {no declaration} , pageman.search_empty{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := hidemode{unknown} {no declaration} 
end function

function update_visibility
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare s : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare last_see_page : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare last_see_main_subpage : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	instr_browser.active_instr_slot{unknown} {no declaration}  := fx_slot{unknown} {no declaration} 
	message("SEE MAIN SUB PAGE: " & see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	for s{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1 to page_assigns.SIZE_D1{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	if(s{unknown} {no declaration}  # see_page{unknown} {no declaration} )
	if(see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} )
	if(s{unknown} {no declaration}  # see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration} )
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 399
	if(page_assigns[s{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	page_assigns[s{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end for
	end if
	else
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 399
	if(page_assigns[s{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	page_assigns[s{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end for
	end if
	end if
	end for
	settings_page{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	btn_engine_page_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_engine_page_fx{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for s{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 399
	if(page_assigns[UIpage_NONE{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	page_assigns[UIpage_NONE{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := page_assigns[UIpage_NONE{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(page_assigns[see_page{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	page_assigns[see_page{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := page_assigns[see_page{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if((see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_GRAIN1{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_GRAIN2{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	if((page_assigns[see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0) and (btn_engine_page_fx{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1))
	page_assigns[see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := page_assigns[see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	if(see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} )
	if(page_assigns[see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	page_assigns[see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := page_assigns[see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(((see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  # UIpage_SUBMAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  # UIpage_INSTR_BROWSER{unknown} {no declaration} )) and (see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  # UIpage_SETTINGS{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	if(page_assigns[see_page{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	page_assigns[see_page{unknown} {no declaration} , s{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end for
	UI_presetStrip{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y := (eq(see_page{unknown} {no declaration} , UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, eq} * 11) + (eq(see_page{unknown} {no declaration} , UIpage_PRESET_BROWSER{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, eq} * 0)
	UI_presetStrip{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := hide_state[(eq(see_page{unknown} {no declaration} , UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, eq} * lt(see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration} , UIpage_ARP1{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, lt}) + eq(see_page{unknown} {no declaration} , UIpage_PRESET_BROWSER{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, eq}]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	visibility.preset_browser(eq(see_page{unknown} {no declaration} , UIpage_PRESET_BROWSER{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, eq}){UserDefined, None, visibility.preset_browser}
	if(midi_export_animation{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide = HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} )
	midi_export_button{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if((see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (in_range(see_page{unknown} {no declaration} , UIpage_GRAIN1{unknown} {no declaration} , UIpage_GRAIN2{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, in_range} and (btn_engine_page_fx{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)))
	set_skin_offset((578 * 0) + (578 * bg_offset{unknown} {no declaration} )){Builtin, None, set_skin_offset}
	set_background_animation{UserDefined, None, set_background_animation}
	show_hide_solo_mute_buttons{UserDefined, None, show_hide_solo_mute_buttons}
	if(see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_SUBMAIN{unknown} {no declaration} )
	mainsub_exit_button{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	mainsub_exit_button{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	mainsub_exit_button{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := 815
	mainsub_exit_button{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y := 65
	if((see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_INSTR_BROWSER{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_SETTINGS{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	mainsub_exit_button{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := 585
	mainsub_exit_button{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y := 155

function main_subpage_manager
	if(btn_engine_page_engine{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	call change_engine_page{UserDefined, None, change_engine_page}
	exit{Builtin, None, exit}
	end if
	call remote_fx_page_buttons{UserDefined, None, remote_fx_page_buttons}
	call remote_fx_tab_buttons{UserDefined, None, remote_fx_tab_buttons}
	if(fx_tab{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	if(loaded_instruments[fx_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	fx_env_view{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	select(fx_slot{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 0
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_FXENV1{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 1
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_FXENV2{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 2
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_FXENV3{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 3
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_FXENV4{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end select
	else
	inc(fx_tab{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	end if
	if(fx_tab{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	fx_trem_view{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	select(fx_slot{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 0
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_TREM1{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 1
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_TREM2{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 2
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_TREM3{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 3
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_TREM4{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end select
	end if
	if(fx_tab{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	fx_mod_view{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	select(fx_slot{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 0
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_MOD1{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 1
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_MOD2{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 2
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_MOD3{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 3
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_MOD4{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end select
	end if
	if(fx_tab{unknown} {no declaration}  = 3)
	fx_sat_view{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	select(fx_slot{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 0
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_SAT1{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 1
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_SAT2{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 2
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_SAT3{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 3
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_SAT4{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end select
	end if
	if(fx_tab{unknown} {no declaration}  = 4)
	fx_filter_view{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	select(fx_slot{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 0
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_FILTER1{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 1
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_FILTER2{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 2
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_FILTER3{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 3
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_FILTER4{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end select
	end if
	call update_visibility{UserDefined, None, update_visibility}
end function

function ARP1.update_shown_table
	if(ARP1.rate{unknown} {no declaration}  > 4)
	ARP1.h{unknown} {no declaration}  := signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[ARP1.time_signature{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	ARP1.h{unknown} {no declaration}  := signature_rhythm_lengths[ARP1.time_signature{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	ARP1.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.rhythm_steps{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ARP1.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  <= ARP1.h{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_table_steps_shown(ARP1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP1.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	set_table_steps_shown(ARP1.rhythm_indicator{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP1.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	ARP1.table_bar_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int(((int_to_real(500){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / (int_to_real(ARP1.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} * 2)) * (int_to_real(ARP1.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} * 2)) / int_to_real(ARP1.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	ARP1.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := (int_to_real(500){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - int_to_real(ARP1.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) / int_to_real(ARP1.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}
	else
	set_table_steps_shown(ARP1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP1.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	set_table_steps_shown(ARP1.rhythm_indicator{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP1.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	ARP1.table_bar_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := 505 / ARP1.steps{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := (int_to_real(500){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - int_to_real(ARP1.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) / int_to_real(ARP1.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}
	end if
	ARP1.z{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ArpEn.MAX_STEPS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := 2000
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := 2000
	end for
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ArpEn.MAX_STEPS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	ARP1.label_width_indicator{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((ARP1.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(i{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) - (floor(ARP1.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * int_to_real(i{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	if((i{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP1.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ) or ((ARP1.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP1.h{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (i{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP1.h{unknown} {no declaration} )))
	if(ARP1.label_width_indicator{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP1.z{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP1.z{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.label_width_indicator{unknown} {no declaration} 
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(ARP1.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int} + 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width - 8
	else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(ARP1.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width - 8
	end if
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := ARP1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + 3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + 4
	else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := (rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + 4
	end if
	end if
	tb_idx_borders[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x
	end for
	if(ARP1.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP1.h{unknown} {no declaration} )
	engine_grey_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := (tb_idx_borders[ARP1.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  + rhythm_morph_range_indicators[ARP1.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	engine_grey_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := ((ARP1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x + ARP1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) - 3) - engine_grey_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x
	else
	engine_grey_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := 2000
	end if
	height_per_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := int_to_real(ARP1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height - 6){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / 127
	call update_arp_label_pos{UserDefined, None, update_arp_label_pos}
	call update_mod_graphics{UserDefined, None, update_mod_graphics}
end function

function ARP1.check_cursor_amount
	if(ARP1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	if(ARP1.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 14)
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[ARP1.chord_buffer{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	if(ARP1.chord_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	note_off(ARP1.chord_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, note_off}
	ARP1.chord_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end for
	else
	note_off(ARP1.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, note_off}
	end if
	stop_wait(ARP1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){Builtin, None, stop_wait}
	ARP1.bar_count{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 31
	ARP1.rhythm_indicator[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 0
	end for
	ARP1.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[ARP1.selected_notes_buffer{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	ARP1.selected_notes_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end for
	end if
end function

function ARP2.update_shown_table
	if(ARP2.rate{unknown} {no declaration}  > 4)
	ARP2.h{unknown} {no declaration}  := signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[ARP2.time_signature{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	ARP2.h{unknown} {no declaration}  := signature_rhythm_lengths[ARP2.time_signature{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	ARP2.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.rhythm_steps{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ARP2.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  <= ARP2.h{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_table_steps_shown(ARP2.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP2.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	set_table_steps_shown(ARP2.rhythm_indicator{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP2.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	ARP2.table_bar_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int(((int_to_real(500){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / (int_to_real(ARP2.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} * 2)) * (int_to_real(ARP2.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} * 2)) / int_to_real(ARP2.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	ARP2.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := (int_to_real(500){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - int_to_real(ARP2.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) / int_to_real(ARP2.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}
	else
	set_table_steps_shown(ARP2.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP2.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	set_table_steps_shown(ARP2.rhythm_indicator{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP2.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	ARP2.table_bar_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := 505 / ARP2.steps{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := (int_to_real(500){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - int_to_real(ARP2.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) / int_to_real(ARP2.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}
	end if
	ARP2.z{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ArpEn.MAX_STEPS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := 2000
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := 2000
	end for
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ArpEn.MAX_STEPS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	ARP2.label_width_indicator{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((ARP2.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(i{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) - (floor(ARP2.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * int_to_real(i{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	if((i{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP2.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ) or ((ARP2.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP2.h{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (i{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP2.h{unknown} {no declaration} )))
	if(ARP2.label_width_indicator{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP2.z{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP2.z{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.label_width_indicator{unknown} {no declaration} 
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(ARP2.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int} + 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width - 8
	else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(ARP2.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width - 8
	end if
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := ARP2.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + 3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + 4
	else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := (rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + 4
	end if
	end if
	tb_idx_borders[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x
	end for
	if(ARP2.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP2.h{unknown} {no declaration} )
	engine_grey_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := (tb_idx_borders[ARP2.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  + rhythm_morph_range_indicators[ARP2.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	engine_grey_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := ((ARP2.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x + ARP2.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) - 3) - engine_grey_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x
	else
	engine_grey_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := 2000
	end if
	height_per_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := int_to_real(ARP2.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height - 6){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / 127
	call update_arp_label_pos{UserDefined, None, update_arp_label_pos}
	call update_mod_graphics{UserDefined, None, update_mod_graphics}
end function

	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := 2000
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := 2000
	end for
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ArpEn.MAX_STEPS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	ARP3.label_width_indicator{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((ARP3.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(i{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) - (floor(ARP3.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * int_to_real(i{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, real_to_int}

	else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(ARP3.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width - 8

	else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := (rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + 4
	end if
	end if
	tb_idx_borders[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x
	end for
	if(ARP3.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP3.h{unknown} {no declaration} )
	engine_grey_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := (tb_idx_borders[ARP3.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  + rhythm_morph_range_indicators[ARP3.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1

	else
	engine_grey_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := 2000
	end if
	height_per_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := int_to_real(ARP3.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height - 6){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / 127
	call update_arp_label_pos{UserDefined, None, update_arp_label_pos}
	call update_mod_graphics{UserDefined, None, update_mod_graphics}
end function

function ARP4.update_shown_table
	if(ARP4.rate{unknown} {no declaration}  > 4)
	ARP4.h{unknown} {no declaration}  := signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[ARP4.time_signature{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	ARP4.h{unknown} {no declaration}  := signature_rhythm_lengths[ARP4.time_signature{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	ARP4.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.rhythm_steps{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(ARP4.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  <= ARP4.h{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_table_steps_shown(ARP4.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP4.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	set_table_steps_shown(ARP4.rhythm_indicator{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP4.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	ARP4.table_bar_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int(((int_to_real(500){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / (int_to_real(ARP4.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} * 2)) * (int_to_real(ARP4.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} * 2)) / int_to_real(ARP4.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	ARP4.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := (int_to_real(500){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - int_to_real(ARP4.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) / int_to_real(ARP4.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}
	else
	set_table_steps_shown(ARP4.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP4.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	set_table_steps_shown(ARP4.rhythm_indicator{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP4.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	ARP4.table_bar_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := 505 / ARP4.steps{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := (int_to_real(500){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - int_to_real(ARP4.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) / int_to_real(ARP4.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}
	end if
	ARP4.z{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ArpEn.MAX_STEPS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := 2000
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := 2000
	end for
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to ArpEn.MAX_STEPS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	ARP4.label_width_indicator{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((ARP4.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(i{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) - (floor(ARP4.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * int_to_real(i{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	if((i{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP4.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ) or ((ARP4.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP4.h{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (i{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP4.h{unknown} {no declaration} )))
	if(ARP4.label_width_indicator{unknown} {no declaration}  > ARP4.z{unknown} {no declaration} )
	ARP4.z{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.label_width_indicator{unknown} {no declaration} 
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(ARP4.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int} + 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width - 8
	else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(ARP4.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width - 8
	end if
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := ARP4.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + 3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + 4
	else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := (rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + 4
	end if
	end if
	tb_idx_borders[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x
	end for
	if(ARP4.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  < ARP4.h{unknown} {no declaration} )
	engine_grey_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := (tb_idx_borders[ARP4.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  + rhythm_morph_range_indicators[ARP4.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	engine_grey_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := ((ARP4.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x + ARP4.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) - 3) - engine_grey_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x
	else
	engine_grey_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := 2000
	end if
	height_per_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := int_to_real(ARP4.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height - 6){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / 127
	call update_arp_label_pos{UserDefined, None, update_arp_label_pos}
	call update_mod_graphics{UserDefined, None, update_mod_graphics}
end function

function ARP4.check_cursor_amount
	if(ARP4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	if(ARP4.note_order{unknown} {no declaration}  = 14)
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[ARP4.chord_buffer{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	if(ARP4.chord_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	note_off(ARP4.chord_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, note_off}
	ARP4.chord_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end for
	else
	note_off(ARP4.note_id{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, note_off}
	end if
	stop_wait(ARP4.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){Builtin, None, stop_wait}
	ARP4.bar_count{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 31
	ARP4.rhythm_indicator[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 0
	end for
	ARP4.indicator_mirror{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[ARP4.selected_notes_buffer{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	ARP4.selected_notes_buffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end for
	end if
end function

function clip(val : unknown, mn : unknown, mx : unknown)
	if(val{unknown} {no declaration}  < mn{unknown} {no declaration} )
	val{unknown} {no declaration}  := mn{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	if(val{unknown} {no declaration}  > mx{unknown} {no declaration} )
	val{unknown} {no declaration}  := mx{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
end function

function _update_shown_table
	select(see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case UIpage_ARP1{unknown} {no declaration} 
	call ARP1.update_shown_table{UserDefined, None, ARP1.update_shown_table}
	case UIpage_ARP2{unknown} {no declaration} 
	call ARP2.update_shown_table{UserDefined, None, ARP2.update_shown_table}
	case UIpage_ARP3{unknown} {no declaration} 
	call ARP3.update_shown_table{UserDefined, None, ARP3.update_shown_table}
	case UIpage_ARP4{unknown} {no declaration} 
	call ARP4.update_shown_table{UserDefined, None, ARP4.update_shown_table}
	end select
end function

function _update_shown_envelope
	message("update shown env"){Builtin, None, message}
	if(see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_GRAIN1{unknown} {no declaration} )
	if(GRENV1.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	GRENV1.table_bar_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := ((100 * 5) + 6) / 100
	GRENV1.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := (int_to_real(100 * 5){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - int_to_real(100){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) / int_to_real(100){Builtin, None, int_to_real}
	GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  := 100
	set_table_steps_shown(GRENV1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration} , 100){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	set_table_steps_shown(GRENV1.rhythm_indicator{unknown} {no declaration} , 100){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	if(GRENV1.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration}  = EDIT_A{unknown} {no declaration} )
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	GRENV1.rhythm[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	else
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	GRENV1.rhythm[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	end if
	else
	if(GRENV1.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	if(GRENV1.rate{unknown} {no declaration}  > 4)
	GRENV1.h{unknown} {no declaration}  := signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[GRENV1.time_signature{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	GRENV1.h{unknown} {no declaration}  := signature_rhythm_lengths[GRENV1.time_signature{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	GRENV1.rhythm[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end for
	GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.rhythm_steps{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  <= GRENV1.h{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_table_steps_shown(GRENV1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration} , GRENV1.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	set_table_steps_shown(GRENV1.rhythm_indicator{unknown} {no declaration} , GRENV1.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	GRENV1.table_bar_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int(((int_to_real(100 * 5){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / (int_to_real(GRENV1.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} * 2)) * (int_to_real(GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} * 2)) / int_to_real(GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	GRENV1.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := (int_to_real(100 * 5){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - int_to_real(GRENV1.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) / int_to_real(GRENV1.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}
	else
	set_table_steps_shown(GRENV1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration} , GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	set_table_steps_shown(GRENV1.rhythm_indicator{unknown} {no declaration} , GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	GRENV1.table_bar_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := ((100 * 5) + 6) / GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRENV1.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := (int_to_real(100 * 5){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - int_to_real(GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) / int_to_real(GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	GRENV1.z{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 100 - 1
	GRENV1.label_width_indicator{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((GRENV1.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(i{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) - (floor(GRENV1.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * int_to_real(i{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := 2000
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := 2000
	if((i{unknown} {no declaration}  < GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (((GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  < GRENV1.h{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (i{unknown} {no declaration}  < GRENV1.h{unknown} {no declaration} )) and (GRENV1.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)))
	if(GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  > 32)
	if(GRENV1.label_width_indicator{unknown} {no declaration}  > GRENV1.z{unknown} {no declaration} )
	GRENV1.z{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.label_width_indicator{unknown} {no declaration} 
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(GRENV1.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int} + 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width
	else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(GRENV1.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width
	end if
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := GRENV1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + 3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x
	else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := (rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x
	end if
	else
	if(GRENV1.label_width_indicator{unknown} {no declaration}  > GRENV1.z{unknown} {no declaration} )
	GRENV1.z{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.label_width_indicator{unknown} {no declaration} 
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(GRENV1.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int} + 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width - 8
	else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(GRENV1.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width - 8
	end if
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := GRENV1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + 3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + 4
	else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := (rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + 4
	end if
	end if
	end if
	tb_idx_borders[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x
	end for
	if(GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  < GRENV1.h{unknown} {no declaration} )
	engine_grey_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := (tb_idx_borders[GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  + rhythm_morph_range_indicators[GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	engine_grey_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := ((GRENV1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x + GRENV1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) - 3) - engine_grey_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x
	else
	engine_grey_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := 2000
	end if
	height_per_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := int_to_real(GRENV1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height - 6){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / 127
	if((see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ) and in_range(see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration} , UIpage_ARP1{unknown} {no declaration} , UIpage_ENV4{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, in_range})
	call update_arp_label_pos{UserDefined, None, update_arp_label_pos}
	call update_mod_graphics{UserDefined, None, update_mod_graphics}
	else
	if(in_range(see_page{unknown} {no declaration} , UIpage_GRAIN1{unknown} {no declaration} , UIpage_GRAIN2{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, in_range})
	call update_arp_label_pos{UserDefined, None, update_arp_label_pos}
	call update_mod_graphics{UserDefined, None, update_mod_graphics}
	end if
	end if
	else
	if(see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_GRAIN2{unknown} {no declaration} )
	if(GRENV2.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	GRENV2.table_bar_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := ((100 * 5) + 6) / 100
	GRENV2.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := (int_to_real(100 * 5){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - int_to_real(100){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) / int_to_real(100){Builtin, None, int_to_real}
	GRENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  := 100
	set_table_steps_shown(GRENV2.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration} , 100){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	set_table_steps_shown(GRENV2.rhythm_indicator{unknown} {no declaration} , 100){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	if(GRENV2.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration}  = EDIT_A{unknown} {no declaration} )
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	GRENV2.rhythm[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	else
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	GRENV2.rhythm[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	end if
	else
	if(GRENV2.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	if(GRENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration}  > 4)
	GRENV2.h{unknown} {no declaration}  := signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[GRENV2.time_signature{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	GRENV2.h{unknown} {no declaration}  := signature_rhythm_lengths[GRENV2.time_signature{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	GRENV2.rhythm[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end for
	GRENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.rhythm_steps{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(GRENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  <= GRENV2.h{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_table_steps_shown(GRENV2.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration} , GRENV2.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	set_table_steps_shown(GRENV2.rhythm_indicator{unknown} {no declaration} , GRENV2.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	GRENV2.table_bar_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int(((int_to_real(100 * 5){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / (int_to_real(GRENV2.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} * 2)) * (int_to_real(GRENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} * 2)) / int_to_real(GRENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	GRENV2.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := (int_to_real(100 * 5){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - int_to_real(GRENV2.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) / int_to_real(GRENV2.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}
	else
	set_table_steps_shown(GRENV2.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration} , GRENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	set_table_steps_shown(GRENV2.rhythm_indicator{unknown} {no declaration} , GRENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	GRENV2.table_bar_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := ((100 * 5) + 6) / GRENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRENV2.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := (int_to_real(100 * 5){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - int_to_real(GRENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) / int_to_real(GRENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}
	end if
	end if
