	GRENV1.table_bar_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int(((int_to_real(100 * 5){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / (int_to_real(GRENV1.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} * 2)) * (int_to_real(GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} * 2)) / int_to_real(GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	GRENV1.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := (int_to_real(100 * 5){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - int_to_real(GRENV1.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) / int_to_real(GRENV1.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}
	else
	set_table_steps_shown(GRENV1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration} , GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	set_table_steps_shown(GRENV1.rhythm_indicator{unknown} {no declaration} , GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	GRENV1.table_bar_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := ((100 * 5) + 6) / GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRENV1.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := (int_to_real(100 * 5){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - int_to_real(GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) / int_to_real(GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	GRENV1.z{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 100 - 1
	GRENV1.label_width_indicator{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((GRENV1.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(i{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) - (floor(GRENV1.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * int_to_real(i{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := 2000
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := 2000
	if((i{unknown} {no declaration}  < GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (((GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  < GRENV1.h{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (i{unknown} {no declaration}  < GRENV1.h{unknown} {no declaration} )) and (GRENV1.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)))
	if(GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  > 32)
	if(GRENV1.label_width_indicator{unknown} {no declaration}  > GRENV1.z{unknown} {no declaration} )
	GRENV1.z{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.label_width_indicator{unknown} {no declaration} 
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(GRENV1.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int} + 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width
	else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(GRENV1.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width
	end if
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := GRENV1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + 3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x
	else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := (rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x
	end if
	else
	if(GRENV1.label_width_indicator{unknown} {no declaration}  > GRENV1.z{unknown} {no declaration} )
	GRENV1.z{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.label_width_indicator{unknown} {no declaration} 
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(GRENV1.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int} + 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width - 8
	else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(GRENV1.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width - 8
	end if
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := GRENV1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + 3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + 4
	else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := (rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + 4
	end if
	end if
	end if
	tb_idx_borders[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x
	end for
	if(GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  < GRENV1.h{unknown} {no declaration} )
	engine_grey_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := (tb_idx_borders[GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  + rhythm_morph_range_indicators[GRENV1.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	engine_grey_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := ((GRENV1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x + GRENV1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) - 3) - engine_grey_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x
	else
	engine_grey_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := 2000
	end if
	height_per_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := int_to_real(GRENV1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height - 6){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / 127
	if((see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ) and in_range(see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration} , UIpage_ARP1{unknown} {no declaration} , UIpage_ENV4{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, in_range})
	call update_arp_label_pos{UserDefined, None, update_arp_label_pos}
	call update_mod_graphics{UserDefined, None, update_mod_graphics}
	else
	if(in_range(see_page{unknown} {no declaration} , UIpage_GRAIN1{unknown} {no declaration} , UIpage_GRAIN2{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, in_range})
	call update_arp_label_pos{UserDefined, None, update_arp_label_pos}
	call update_mod_graphics{UserDefined, None, update_mod_graphics}
	end if
	end if
	if(GRENV2.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	GRENV2.table_bar_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := ((100 * 5) + 6) / 100
	GRENV2.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := (int_to_real(100 * 5){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - int_to_real(100){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) / int_to_real(100){Builtin, None, int_to_real}
	GRENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  := 100
	set_table_steps_shown(GRENV2.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration} , 100){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	set_table_steps_shown(GRENV2.rhythm_indicator{unknown} {no declaration} , 100){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	if(GRENV2.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration}  = EDIT_A{unknown} {no declaration} )
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	GRENV2.rhythm[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	else
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	GRENV2.rhythm[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	end if
	else
	if(GRENV2.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	if(GRENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration}  > 4)
	GRENV2.h{unknown} {no declaration}  := signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[GRENV2.time_signature{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	GRENV2.h{unknown} {no declaration}  := signature_rhythm_lengths[GRENV2.time_signature{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	GRENV2.rhythm[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end for
	GRENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.rhythm_steps{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(GRENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  <= GRENV2.h{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_table_steps_shown(GRENV2.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration} , GRENV2.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	set_table_steps_shown(GRENV2.rhythm_indicator{unknown} {no declaration} , GRENV2.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	GRENV2.table_bar_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int(((int_to_real(100 * 5){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / (int_to_real(GRENV2.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} * 2)) * (int_to_real(GRENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} * 2)) / int_to_real(GRENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	GRENV2.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := (int_to_real(100 * 5){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - int_to_real(GRENV2.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) / int_to_real(GRENV2.h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}
	else
	set_table_steps_shown(GRENV2.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration} , GRENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	set_table_steps_shown(GRENV2.rhythm_indicator{unknown} {no declaration} , GRENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_table_steps_shown}
	GRENV2.table_bar_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := ((100 * 5) + 6) / GRENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRENV2.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  := (int_to_real(100 * 5){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - int_to_real(GRENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) / int_to_real(GRENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	GRENV2.z{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 100 - 1
	GRENV2.label_width_indicator{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((GRENV2.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(i{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) - (floor(GRENV2.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor} * int_to_real(i{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := 2000
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := 2000
	if((i{unknown} {no declaration}  < GRENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (((GRENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  < GRENV2.h{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (i{unknown} {no declaration}  < GRENV2.h{unknown} {no declaration} )) and (GRENV2.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)))
	if(GRENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  > 32)
	if(GRENV2.label_width_indicator{unknown} {no declaration}  > GRENV2.z{unknown} {no declaration} )
	GRENV2.z{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.label_width_indicator{unknown} {no declaration} 
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(GRENV2.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int} + 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width
	else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(GRENV2.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width
	end if
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := GRENV2.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + 3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x
	else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := (rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x
	end if
	else
	if(GRENV2.label_width_indicator{unknown} {no declaration}  > GRENV2.z{unknown} {no declaration} )
	GRENV2.z{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.label_width_indicator{unknown} {no declaration} 
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(GRENV2.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int} + 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width - 8
	else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := real_to_int(GRENV2.label_width_dynamic{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width - 8
	end if
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := GRENV2.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + 3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + 4
	else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := (rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> pos_x + 4
	end if
	end if
	end if
	tb_idx_borders[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x
	end for
	if(GRENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  < GRENV2.h{unknown} {no declaration} )
	engine_grey_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := (tb_idx_borders[GRENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  + rhythm_morph_range_indicators[GRENV2.steps{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) + 1
	engine_grey_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width := ((GRENV2.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x + GRENV2.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width) - 3) - engine_grey_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x
	else
	engine_grey_out{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := 2000
	end if
	height_per_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := int_to_real(GRENV2.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height - 6){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / 127
	if((see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ) and in_range(see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration} , UIpage_ARP1{unknown} {no declaration} , UIpage_ENV4{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, in_range})
	call update_arp_label_pos{UserDefined, None, update_arp_label_pos}
	call update_mod_graphics{UserDefined, None, update_mod_graphics}
	else
	if(in_range(see_page{unknown} {no declaration} , UIpage_GRAIN1{unknown} {no declaration} , UIpage_GRAIN2{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, in_range})
	call update_arp_label_pos{UserDefined, None, update_arp_label_pos}
	call update_mod_graphics{UserDefined, None, update_mod_graphics}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
end function

function update_envelope_target
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare n : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare group_id : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare midi_velo_value : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare midi_1_value : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare midi_102_value : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare midi_103_value : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare midi_104_value : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare midi_105_value : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare midi_106_value : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare is_stutter : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	if(art_length[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	midi_velo_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	midi_1_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	midi_102_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	midi_103_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	midi_104_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	midi_105_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	midi_106_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	is_stutter{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	select(assign_slot_menu[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value)
	case 0
	midi_1_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 1
	midi_velo_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 2
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	midi_102_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	is_stutter{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	midi_103_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	is_stutter{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	midi_104_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	is_stutter{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  = 3)
	midi_105_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	is_stutter{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end select
	if(length_hdr[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	for n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to rr_nums[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	group_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + n{unknown} {no declaration} 
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY{unknown} {no declaration} , 1000000 * midi_velo_value{unknown} {no declaration} , group_id{unknown} {no declaration} , find_mod(group_id{unknown} {no declaration} , "mod_velo"){Builtin, None, find_mod}, - 1){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY{unknown} {no declaration} , 1000000 * midi_1_value{unknown} {no declaration} , group_id{unknown} {no declaration} , find_mod(group_id{unknown} {no declaration} , "mod_1"){Builtin, None, find_mod}, - 1){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY{unknown} {no declaration} , 1000000 * midi_102_value{unknown} {no declaration} , group_id{unknown} {no declaration} , find_mod(group_id{unknown} {no declaration} , "mod_102"){Builtin, None, find_mod}, - 1){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY{unknown} {no declaration} , (1000000 * midi_102_value{unknown} {no declaration} ) * is_stutter{unknown} {no declaration} , group_id{unknown} {no declaration} , find_mod(group_id{unknown} {no declaration} , "mod_102_stut"){Builtin, None, find_mod}, - 1){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY{unknown} {no declaration} , 1000000 * midi_103_value{unknown} {no declaration} , group_id{unknown} {no declaration} , find_mod(group_id{unknown} {no declaration} , "mod_103"){Builtin, None, find_mod}, - 1){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}

	message(""){Builtin, None, message}

	group_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + n{unknown} {no declaration}

function reset_env_last_mode
	ENV1.last_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	ENV2.last_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	ENV3.last_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	ENV4.last_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	GRENV1.last_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	GRENV2.last_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
end function

function _set_env_mode
	select(ENV1.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 0
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[arp_rates_list{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV1.rate{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
	end for
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := num_elements[arp_rates_list{unknown} {no declaration} ] to num_elements[arp_rates_list{unknown} {no declaration} ] + (ENV1.env_entries{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1)
	set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV1.rate{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
	end for
	if((ENV1.last_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  # ENV1.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (ENV1.last_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1))
	ENV1.rate{unknown} {no declaration}  := 96
	if(ENV1.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration}  = EDIT_A{unknown} {no declaration} )
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	ENV1.rhythm[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	else
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	ENV1.rhythm[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	end if
	end if
	ENV1.last_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	case 1
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[arp_rates_list{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV1.rate{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
	end for
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := num_elements[arp_rates_list{unknown} {no declaration} ] to num_elements[arp_rates_list{unknown} {no declaration} ] + (ENV1.env_entries{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1)
	set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV1.rate{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
	end for
	if((ENV1.last_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  # ENV1.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (ENV1.last_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1))
	ENV1.rate{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	ENV1.rhythm[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end for
	end if
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[_rhythm_steps_list{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV1.rhythm_steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
	end for
	s{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.time_signature{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(s{unknown} {no declaration}  > 2)
	if(ENV1.rate{unknown} {no declaration}  > 4)
	ENV1.rate{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.rate{unknown} {no declaration}  - 3
	end if
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 5 to 7
	set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV1.rate{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
	end for
	else
	if(s{unknown} {no declaration}  < 3)
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 5 to 7
	set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV1.rate{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
	end for
	end if
	end if
	a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4
	if(ENV1.rate{unknown} {no declaration}  > 4)
	n{unknown} {no declaration}  := rhythm_steps_list_triplets[s{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	n{unknown} {no declaration}  := rhythm_steps_list[s{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(n{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV1.rhythm_steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_value}
	set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(ENV1.rhythm_steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_str}
	set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV1.rhythm_steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
	inc(a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	else
	set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV1.rhythm_steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_value}
	end if
	end for
	if(ENV1.rhythm_steps{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1)
	ENV1.rhythm_steps{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := a{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	end if
	ENV1.last_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end select
	if(((NI_CALLBACK_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration}  # NI_CB_TYPE_INIT{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (NI_CALLBACK_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration}  # NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGED{unknown} {no declaration} )) and (preset.is_loading{unknown} {no declaration}  # 1))
	call update_visibility{UserDefined, None, update_visibility}
	call _update_shown_envelope{UserDefined, None, _update_shown_envelope}
	call update_envelope_target{UserDefined, None, update_envelope_target}
	end if
	select(ENV2.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 0
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[arp_rates_list{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
	end for
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := num_elements[arp_rates_list{unknown} {no declaration} ] to num_elements[arp_rates_list{unknown} {no declaration} ] + (ENV2.env_entries{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1)
	set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(ENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
	end for
	if((ENV2.last_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  # ENV2.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (ENV2.last_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1))
	ENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration}  := 96
	if(ENV2.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration}  = EDIT_A{unknown} {no declaration} )
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	ENV2.rhythm[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for

	if((GRENV2.last_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  # GRENV2.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (GRENV2.last_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1))
	GRENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration}  := 96
	if(GRENV2.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration}  = EDIT_A{unknown} {no declaration} )
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	GRENV2.rhythm[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	else
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	GRENV2.rhythm[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	end if
	end if
	GRENV2.last_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	case 1
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[arp_rates_list{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
	end for
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := num_elements[arp_rates_list{unknown} {no declaration} ] to num_elements[arp_rates_list{unknown} {no declaration} ] + (GRENV2.env_entries{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1)
	set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
	end for
	if((GRENV2.last_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  # GRENV2.mode_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (GRENV2.last_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1))
	GRENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	GRENV2.rhythm[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end for
	end if
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[_rhythm_steps_list{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV2.rhythm_steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
	end for
	s{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.time_signature{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(s{unknown} {no declaration}  > 2)
	if(GRENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration}  > 4)
	GRENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration}  - 3
	end if
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 5 to 7
	set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
	end for
	else
	if(s{unknown} {no declaration}  < 3)
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 5 to 7
	set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
	end for
	end if
	end if
	a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4
	if(GRENV2.rate{unknown} {no declaration}  > 4)
	n{unknown} {no declaration}  := rhythm_steps_list_triplets[s{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	n{unknown} {no declaration}  := rhythm_steps_list[s{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(n{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(GRENV2.rhythm_steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_value}
	set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(GRENV2.rhythm_steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_str}
	set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(GRENV2.rhythm_steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
	inc(a{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	else
	set_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(GRENV2.rhythm_steps{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_value}
	end if
	end for
	if(GRENV2.rhythm_steps{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1)
	GRENV2.rhythm_steps{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := a{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	end if
	GRENV2.last_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end select
	if(((NI_CALLBACK_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration}  # NI_CB_TYPE_INIT{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (NI_CALLBACK_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration}  # NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGED{unknown} {no declaration} )) and (preset.is_loading{unknown} {no declaration}  # 1))
	call update_visibility{UserDefined, None, update_visibility}
	call _update_shown_envelope{UserDefined, None, _update_shown_envelope}
	call update_envelope_target{UserDefined, None, update_envelope_target}
	end if
end function

function load_grain_data
	GRAIN1.slices{unknown} {no declaration}  := num_slices_zone(zone_id_group[loaded_instruments[GRAIN1.slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, num_slices_zone}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[GRAIN1.slice_positions{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  < GRAIN1.slices{unknown} {no declaration} )
	GRAIN1.slice_positions[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := zone_slice_start(zone_id_group[loaded_instruments[GRAIN1.slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, zone_slice_start}
	else
	GRAIN1.slice_positions[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	end if
	end for
	GRAIN2.slices{unknown} {no declaration}  := num_slices_zone(zone_id_group[loaded_instruments[GRAIN2.slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, num_slices_zone}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[GRAIN2.slice_positions{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  < GRAIN2.slices{unknown} {no declaration} )
	GRAIN2.slice_positions[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := zone_slice_start(zone_id_group[loaded_instruments[GRAIN2.slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, zone_slice_start}
	else
	GRAIN2.slice_positions[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	end if
	end for
	if((preset.is_loading{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0) and (NI_CALLBACK_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration}  = NI_CB_TYPE_UI_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	if(btn_grain_load_setting{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	GRAIN1.position_A{unknown} {no declaration}  := grain_load_pos_A[loaded_instruments[GRAIN1.slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRAIN1.position_B{unknown} {no declaration}  := grain_load_pos_B[loaded_instruments[GRAIN1.slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	GRAIN1.position_A{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	GRAIN1.position_B{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1000
	end if
	set_current_control(GRAIN1.position_A{unknown} {no declaration} , "%", GRAIN1.pos_A_value_label{unknown} {no declaration} , "Pos A"){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	set_current_control(GRAIN1.position_B{unknown} {no declaration} , "%", GRAIN1.pos_B_value_label{unknown} {no declaration} , "Pos B"){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	call set_pos_label_position{UserDefined, None, set_pos_label_position}
	if(btn_grain_load_setting{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	GRAIN2.position_A{unknown} {no declaration}  := grain_load_pos_A[loaded_instruments[GRAIN2.slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRAIN2.position_B{unknown} {no declaration}  := grain_load_pos_B[loaded_instruments[GRAIN2.slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	GRAIN2.position_A{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	GRAIN2.position_B{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1000
	end if
	set_current_control(GRAIN2.position_A{unknown} {no declaration} , "%", GRAIN2.pos_A_value_label{unknown} {no declaration} , "Pos A"){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	set_current_control(GRAIN2.position_B{unknown} {no declaration} , "%", GRAIN2.pos_B_value_label{unknown} {no declaration} , "Pos B"){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	call set_pos_label_position{UserDefined, None, set_pos_label_position}
	end if
end function

function set_pos_label_position
	GRAIN1.pos_A_label{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := (GRAIN1.wave_display{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x - 5) + real_to_int((int_to_real(GRAIN1.wave_display{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / 1000) * int_to_real(GRAIN1.position_A{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	GRAIN1.pos_B_label{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := (GRAIN1.wave_display{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x - 5) + real_to_int((int_to_real(GRAIN1.wave_display{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / 1000) * int_to_real(GRAIN1.position_B{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	GRAIN2.pos_A_label{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := (GRAIN2.wave_display{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x - 5) + real_to_int((int_to_real(GRAIN2.wave_display{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / 1000) * int_to_real(GRAIN2.position_A{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	GRAIN2.pos_B_label{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := (GRAIN2.wave_display{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x - 5) + real_to_int((int_to_real(GRAIN2.wave_display{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / 1000) * int_to_real(GRAIN2.position_B{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	GRAIN1.position_A{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := (GRAIN1.position_A{unknown} {no declaration}  / 10) & " %"
	GRAIN1.position_B{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := (GRAIN1.position_B{unknown} {no declaration}  / 10) & " %"
	GRAIN2.position_A{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := (GRAIN2.position_A{unknown} {no declaration}  / 10) & " %"
	GRAIN2.position_B{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := (GRAIN2.position_B{unknown} {no declaration}  / 10) & " %"
end function

function grain_pos_to_px(x : unknown)
	return (170 + real_to_int(round(x{unknown} {no declaration}  * int_to_real(510){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, round}){Builtin, None, real_to_int})
end function

function reset_grain_envelopes
	message("GrainEnv Reset"){Builtin, None, message}
	stop_wait(GRENV1.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){Builtin, None, stop_wait}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	GRENV1.rhythm_indicator[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 0
	end for
	GRENV1.check_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	stop_wait(GRENV2.callback_id{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){Builtin, None, stop_wait}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 99
	GRENV2.rhythm_indicator[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := 0
	end for
	GRENV2.check_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
end function

function check_env_latch_mode
	if((GRAIN1.dynamic_link{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1) or (GRAIN1.position_choice{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2))
	GRENV1.latch_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	else
	GRENV1.latch_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	if((GRAIN2.dynamic_link{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1) or (GRAIN2.position_choice{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2))
	GRENV2.latch_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	else
	GRENV2.latch_mode{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	call update_mod_graphics{UserDefined, None, update_mod_graphics}
end function

function update_arp_label_pos
	declare array_A[100] : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare label_pos_y_A : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare array_B[100] : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare label_pos_y_B : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare rhythm_table_pos_y : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare rhythm_table_height : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare rhythm_edit : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare SIZE : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	if(see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} )
	select(see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case UIpage_ARP1{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 32 - 1
	array_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	array_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	rhythm_table_pos_y{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y + 3
	rhythm_table_height{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height - 6
	rhythm_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration} 
	SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  := 32
	case UIpage_ARP2{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 32 - 1
	array_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	array_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	rhythm_table_pos_y{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y + 3
	rhythm_table_height{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height - 6
	rhythm_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration} 
	SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  := 32
	case UIpage_ARP3{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 32 - 1
	array_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	array_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	rhythm_table_pos_y{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y + 3
	rhythm_table_height{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height - 6
	rhythm_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration} 
	SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  := 32
	case UIpage_ARP4{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 32 - 1
	array_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	array_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	rhythm_table_pos_y{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y + 3
	rhythm_table_height{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height - 6
	rhythm_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration} 
	SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  := 32
	case UIpage_ENV1{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 100 - 1
	array_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	array_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	rhythm_table_pos_y{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y + 3
	rhythm_table_height{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height - 6
	rhythm_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration} 
	SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  := 100
	case UIpage_ENV2{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 100 - 1
	array_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	array_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	rhythm_table_pos_y{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y + 3
	rhythm_table_height{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height - 6
	rhythm_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration} 
	SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  := 100
	case UIpage_ENV3{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 100 - 1
	array_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	array_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	rhythm_table_pos_y{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y + 3
	rhythm_table_height{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height - 6
	rhythm_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration} 
	SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  := 100
	case UIpage_ENV4{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 100 - 1
	array_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	array_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	rhythm_table_pos_y{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y + 3
	rhythm_table_height{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height - 6
	rhythm_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration} 
	SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  := 100
	end select
	else
	if(see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_GRAIN1{unknown} {no declaration} )
	message("Update arp label pos GRAIN 1"){Builtin, None, message}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 100 - 1
	array_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	array_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	rhythm_table_pos_y{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y + 3
	rhythm_table_height{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height - 6
	rhythm_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration} 
	SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  := 100
	else
	if(see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_GRAIN2{unknown} {no declaration} )
	message("Update arp label pos GRAIN 2"){Builtin, None, message}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 100 - 1
	array_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	array_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	rhythm_table_pos_y{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y + 3
	rhythm_table_height{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.rhythm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height - 6
	rhythm_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration} 
	SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  := 100
	end if
	end if
	end if
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	label_pos_y_A{unknown} {no declaration}  := rhythm_table_pos_y{unknown} {no declaration}  + real_to_int((int_to_real(rhythm_table_height{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / 127) * int_to_real(127 - array_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	label_pos_y_B{unknown} {no declaration}  := rhythm_table_pos_y{unknown} {no declaration}  + real_to_int((int_to_real(rhythm_table_height{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / 127) * int_to_real(127 - array_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	if((array_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - array_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) < 0)
	if(rhythm_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  = EDIT_A{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{unknown} {no declaration} , "lbl_engine_morph_bottom"){Builtin, None, set_control_par_str}
	morph_label_shift[i{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	if(rhythm_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  = EDIT_B{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{unknown} {no declaration} , "lbl_engine_morph_top"){Builtin, None, set_control_par_str}
	morph_label_shift[i{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	end if
	end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y := label_pos_y_B{unknown} {no declaration} 
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height := label_pos_y_A{unknown} {no declaration}  - rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y
	morph_label_shift[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height < 4)
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height := 4
	end if
	else
	if(rhythm_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  = EDIT_A{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{unknown} {no declaration} , "lbl_engine_morph_top"){Builtin, None, set_control_par_str}
	morph_label_shift[i{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	else
	if(rhythm_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  = EDIT_B{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_control_par_str(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{unknown} {no declaration} , "lbl_engine_morph_bottom"){Builtin, None, set_control_par_str}
	morph_label_shift[i{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y := label_pos_y_A{unknown} {no declaration} 
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height := label_pos_y_B{unknown} {no declaration}  - rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y
	morph_label_shift[tb_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	if(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height < 4)
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height := 4
	end if
	end if
	end for
end function

function update_mod_graphics
	declare playback_array[100] : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare label_pos_y : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare rhythm_edit : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare array_A[100] : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare array_B[100] : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare n : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare SIZE : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	if(see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} )
	select(see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case UIpage_ARP1{unknown} {no declaration} 
	SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  := 32
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	array_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	array_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	rhythm_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP1.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case UIpage_ARP2{unknown} {no declaration} 
	SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  := 32
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	array_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	array_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	rhythm_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP2.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case UIpage_ARP3{unknown} {no declaration} 
	SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  := 32
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	array_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	array_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	rhythm_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP3.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case UIpage_ARP4{unknown} {no declaration} 
	SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  := 32
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	array_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	array_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	rhythm_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := ARP4.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case UIpage_ENV1{unknown} {no declaration} 
	SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  := 100
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	array_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	array_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	rhythm_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV1.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case UIpage_ENV2{unknown} {no declaration} 
	SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  := 100
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	array_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	array_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	rhythm_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV2.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case UIpage_ENV3{unknown} {no declaration} 
	SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  := 100
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	array_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	array_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	rhythm_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV3.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case UIpage_ENV4{unknown} {no declaration} 
	SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  := 100
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	array_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	array_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	rhythm_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENV4.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end select
	else
	if(see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_GRAIN1{unknown} {no declaration} )
	SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  := 100
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	array_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	array_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	rhythm_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV1.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	if(see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_GRAIN2{unknown} {no declaration} )
	SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  := 100
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	array_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.rhythm_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	array_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.rhythm_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	rhythm_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRENV2.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	end if
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to SIZE{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	if((array_A[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - array_B[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) <= 0)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y := (rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height - 6){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / 127) * int_to_real(127 - CC[dyn_cc_num{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	else
	rhythm_morph_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y := (rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y + 3) + real_to_int((int_to_real(rhythm_morph_range_indicators[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height - 6){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / 127) * int_to_real(CC[dyn_cc_num{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	end if
	end for
end function
