function update_note_selection
	ARP1.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP1.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ARP1.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value}
	ARP2.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP2.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ARP2.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value}
	ARP3.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP3.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ARP3.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value}
	ARP4.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP4.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ARP4.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value}
	ENV1.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV1.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ENV1.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value}
	ENV2.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV2.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ENV2.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value}
	ENV3.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV3.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ENV3.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value}
	ENV4.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV4.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ENV4.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value}
end function

function note_selection_backward_check
	if(ARP1.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  # get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP1.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ARP1.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value})
	ARP1.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := search[note_selection_values{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP1.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value]
	ARP1.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP1.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ARP1.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value}
	end if
	if(ARP2.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  # get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP2.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ARP2.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value})
	ARP2.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := search[note_selection_values{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP2.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value]
	ARP2.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP2.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ARP2.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value}
	end if
	if(ARP3.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  # get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP3.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ARP3.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value})
	ARP3.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := search[note_selection_values{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP3.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value]
	ARP3.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP3.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ARP3.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value}
	end if
	if(ARP4.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  # get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP4.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ARP4.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value})
	ARP4.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := search[note_selection_values{unknown} {no declaration} , ARP4.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value]
	ARP4.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ARP4.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ARP4.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value}
	end if
	if(ENV1.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  # get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV1.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ENV1.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value})
	ENV1.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := search[note_selection_values{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV1.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value]
	ENV1.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV1.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ENV1.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value}
	end if
	if(ENV2.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  # get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV2.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ENV2.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value})
	ENV2.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := search[note_selection_values{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV2.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value]
	ENV2.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV2.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ENV2.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value}
	end if
	if(ENV3.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  # get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV3.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ENV3.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value})
	ENV3.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := search[note_selection_values{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV3.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value]
	ENV3.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV3.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ENV3.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value}
	end if
	if(ENV4.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  # get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV4.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ENV4.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value})
	ENV4.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := search[note_selection_values{unknown} {no declaration} , ENV4.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value]
	ENV4.note_selection_hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := get_menu_item_value(get_ui_id(ENV4.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ENV4.note_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, get_menu_item_value}
	end if
end function

function change_engine_page
	message("Change Engine Slot to " & engine_active_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	select(engine_active_slot{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 1
	if(assign_slot_menu0{unknown} {no declaration}  <= 1)
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_ARP1{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP1.rhythm_A_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP1.rhythm_B_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	ARP1.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration}  := EDIT_B{unknown} {no declaration} 
	call update_visibility{UserDefined, None, update_visibility}
	call _update_shown_table{UserDefined, None, _update_shown_table}
	else
	if(assign_slot_menu0{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_ENV1{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV1.envelope_A_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV1.envelope_B_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	ENV1.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration}  := EDIT_B{unknown} {no declaration} 
	call update_visibility{UserDefined, None, update_visibility}
	call _update_shown_envelope{UserDefined, None, _update_shown_envelope}
	end if
	end if
	call _on_controller{UserDefined, None, _on_controller}
	case 2
	message("Assign Slot Menu value is " & assign_slot_menu1{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	if(assign_slot_menu1{unknown} {no declaration}  <= 1)
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_ARP2{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP2.rhythm_A_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP2.rhythm_B_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	ARP2.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration}  := EDIT_B{unknown} {no declaration} 
	call update_visibility{UserDefined, None, update_visibility}
	call _update_shown_table{UserDefined, None, _update_shown_table}
	else
	if(assign_slot_menu1{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_ENV2{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV2.envelope_A_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV2.envelope_B_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	ENV2.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration}  := EDIT_B{unknown} {no declaration} 
	call update_visibility{UserDefined, None, update_visibility}
	call _update_shown_envelope{UserDefined, None, _update_shown_envelope}
	else
	if(assign_slot_menu1{unknown} {no declaration}  = 3)
	message("assign_slot_menu is 3"){Builtin, None, message}
	see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_GRAIN1{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRENV1.envelope_A_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	GRENV1.envelope_B_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	GRENV1.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration}  := EDIT_B{unknown} {no declaration} 
	call update_visibility{UserDefined, None, update_visibility}
	message("assign_slot_menu is 3"){Builtin, None, message}
	call _update_shown_envelope{UserDefined, None, _update_shown_envelope}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	call _on_controller{UserDefined, None, _on_controller}
	case 3
	if(assign_slot_menu2{unknown} {no declaration}  <= 1)
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_ARP3{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP3.rhythm_A_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP3.rhythm_B_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	ARP3.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration}  := EDIT_B{unknown} {no declaration} 
	call update_visibility{UserDefined, None, update_visibility}
	call _update_shown_table{UserDefined, None, _update_shown_table}
	else
	if(assign_slot_menu2{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_ENV3{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV3.envelope_A_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV3.envelope_B_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	ENV3.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration}  := EDIT_B{unknown} {no declaration} 
	call update_visibility{UserDefined, None, update_visibility}
	call _update_shown_envelope{UserDefined, None, _update_shown_envelope}
	else
	if(assign_slot_menu2{unknown} {no declaration}  = 3)
	see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_GRAIN2{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRENV2.envelope_A_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	GRENV2.envelope_B_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	GRENV2.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration}  := EDIT_B{unknown} {no declaration} 
	call update_visibility{UserDefined, None, update_visibility}
	call _update_shown_envelope{UserDefined, None, _update_shown_envelope}
	end if
	end if
	end if
	call _on_controller{UserDefined, None, _on_controller}
	case 4
	if(assign_slot_menu3{unknown} {no declaration}  <= 1)
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_ARP4{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ARP4.rhythm_A_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP4.rhythm_B_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	ARP4.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration}  := EDIT_B{unknown} {no declaration} 
	call update_visibility{UserDefined, None, update_visibility}
	call _update_shown_table{UserDefined, None, _update_shown_table}
	else
	if(assign_slot_menu3{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2)
	see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration}  := UIpage_ENV4{unknown} {no declaration} 
	ENV4.envelope_A_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV4.envelope_B_edit{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	ENV4.edit_active{unknown} {no declaration}  := EDIT_B{unknown} {no declaration} 
	call update_visibility{UserDefined, None, update_visibility}
	call _update_shown_envelope{UserDefined, None, _update_shown_envelope}
	end if
	end if
	call _on_controller{UserDefined, None, _on_controller}
	end select
end function

function vol_compensation(l : unknown)
	return (- abs(real_to_int(pow(int_to_real(l{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / int_to_real(64000){Builtin, None, int_to_real}, 2){Builtin, None, pow} * int_to_real(64000){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}){Builtin, None, abs})
end function

function show_instr_button
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare n : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare s : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	hide_instr_buttons{UserDefined, None, hide_instr_buttons}
	if((instr_browser.current_art_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1) and (instr_browser.current_character_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1))
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[instr_browser.instr_button_ids{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	instr_browser.instr_button_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	end if
end function

function build_instrument_scroll_menu
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare n : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	instr_browser.menu_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := instr_browser.current_character_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  + (4 * instr_browser.current_art_selection{unknown} {no declaration} )
	message("MENU IDX: " & instr_browser.menu_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  & "; Art: " & instr_browser.current_art_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  & "; Char: " & instr_browser.current_character_selection{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	if(instr_browser.menu_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 7)
	instr_browser.menu_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := 7 - 1
	end if
	if(instr_browser.menu_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  # instr_browser.last_menu_idx{unknown} {no declaration} )
	instr_browser.current_scrollstep{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	instr_browser.last_menu_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := instr_browser.menu_idx{unknown} {no declaration} 
	n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 300 - 1
	if(instr_browser.instr_id_on_button[instr_browser.menu_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	inc(n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	end for
	instr_browser.scrollitems{unknown} {no declaration}  := n{unknown} {no declaration} 
end function

function update_instrument_buttons
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare n : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[instr_browser.instr{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	instr_browser.instr[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := 0
	instr_browser.current_instr_button_states[1, i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	instr_browser.current_instr_button_states[0, i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := instr_browser.instr_id_on_button[instr_browser.menu_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration}  + (1 * instr_browser.current_scrollstep{unknown} {no declaration} )]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	instr_browser.instr[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> font_type := font_main_big_white{unknown} {no declaration} 
	instr_browser.instr[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> font_type_off_hover := font_main_big_white{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(instr_browser.current_instr_button_states[0, i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	set_control_par_str(instr_browser.instr[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{unknown} {no declaration} , instr_names[instr_browser.current_instr_button_states[0, i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par_str}
	else
	set_control_par_str(instr_browser.instr[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{unknown} {no declaration} , ""){Builtin, None, set_control_par_str}
	end if
	for n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	if(instr_browser.current_instr_button_states[0, i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = loaded_instruments[n{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	instr_browser.instr[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := 1
	instr_browser.current_instr_button_states[1, i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	end for
	end for
end function

function hide_character_buttons
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[instr_browser.btn_cat{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	instr_browser.btn_cat[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
end function

function show_character_buttons
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare character_buttons_shown : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	if(instr_browser.current_art_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	character_buttons_shown{unknown} {no declaration}  := num_elements[instr_browser.btn_cat{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	else
	if(instr_browser.current_art_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	character_buttons_shown{unknown} {no declaration}  := num_elements[instr_browser.btn_cat{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	end if
	end if
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to character_buttons_shown{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	instr_browser.btn_cat[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	instr_browser.btn_cat[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := instr_browser.cat_names[(4 * instr_browser.current_art_selection{unknown} {no declaration} ) + i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{string[]} {no declaration} 
	end for
end function

function hide_instr_buttons
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[instr_browser.instr{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	instr_browser.instr_button_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	instr_browser.instr_button_ids[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := 0
	end for
end function

function remote_character_buttons
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[instr_browser.btn_cat{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	instr_browser.btn_cat[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := 0
	end for
	instr_browser.current_character_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
end function

function remote_instr_buttons
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[instr_browser.instr{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	instr_browser.instr[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := 0
	end for
end function

function update_instr_labels
	set_text(instr_slot_button0{unknown} {no declaration} , instr_names[loaded_instruments[0]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_text}
	set_text(instr_slot_button1{unknown} {no declaration} , instr_names[loaded_instruments[1]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_text}
	set_text(instr_slot_button2{unknown} {no declaration} , instr_names[loaded_instruments[2]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_text}
	set_text(instr_slot_button3{unknown} {no declaration} , instr_names[loaded_instruments[3]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_text}
	set_text(mixer.instr_labels0{unknown} {no declaration} , instr_names[loaded_instruments[0]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_text}
	set_text(mixer.instr_labels1{unknown} {no declaration} , instr_names[loaded_instruments[1]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_text}
	set_text(mixer.instr_labels2{unknown} {no declaration} , instr_names[loaded_instruments[2]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_text}
	set_text(mixer.instr_labels3{unknown} {no declaration} , instr_names[loaded_instruments[3]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_text}
end function

function update_engine_visibility
	lbl_engine_selector.bg_slot1{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := "tgl_sphere_mode"
	lbl_engine_selector.bg_slot4{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := "tgl_sphere_mode"
	lbl_engine_selector.bg_slot1{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := 262
	lbl_engine_selector.bg_slot4{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := 512
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 2
	btn_engine_selector.interact_slot1[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := 262 + (i{unknown} {no declaration}  * 25)
	btn_engine_selector.interact_slot1[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_engine_selector.interact_slot4[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := 512 + (i{unknown} {no declaration}  * 25)
	btn_engine_selector.interact_slot4[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare n : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 2
	for n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	set_menu_item_visibility(assign_slot_menu[n{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
	end for
	end for
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[loaded_instruments{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	if((loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0) and (art_length[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0))
	if(assign_slot_menu[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value = 2)
	assign_slot_menu[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := 0
	end if
	set_menu_item_visibility(assign_slot_menu[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , 2, 0){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	lbl_engine_selector.bg_slot1{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := "tgl_sphere_mode_dual"
	btn_engine_selector.interact_slot1[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_engine_selector.bg_slot1{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := 275
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 2
	btn_engine_selector.interact_slot1[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := 275 + (i{unknown} {no declaration}  * 25)
	end for
	else
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  = 3)
	lbl_engine_selector.bg_slot4{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := "tgl_sphere_mode_dual"
	btn_engine_selector.interact_slot4[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_engine_selector.bg_slot4{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := 525
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 2
	btn_engine_selector.interact_slot4[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := 525 + (i{unknown} {no declaration}  * 25)
	end for
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end for
end function

function update_scroll
	declare permil : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare handle_height : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare handle_max_dist : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare label_posY : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare browser_height : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	browser_height{unknown} {no declaration}  := instr_browser.row_height{unknown} {no declaration}  * instr_browser.scrollitems{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(browser_height{unknown} {no declaration}  < instr_browser.page_height{unknown} {no declaration} )
	browser_height{unknown} {no declaration}  := instr_browser.page_height{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	handle_height{unknown} {no declaration}  := (instr_browser.page_height{unknown} {no declaration}  * instr_browser.page_height{unknown} {no declaration} ) / browser_height{unknown} {no declaration} 
	handle_max_dist{unknown} {no declaration}  := instr_browser.page_height{unknown} {no declaration}  - handle_height{unknown} {no declaration} 
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(instr_browser.scroll_handle_label{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT{unknown} {no declaration} , handle_height{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	if(instr_browser.scroll_handle_label{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height < 20)
	instr_browser.scroll_handle_label{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height := 20
	end if
	if(instr_browser.scrollitems{unknown} {no declaration}  > 7)
	if(instr_browser.scrollstep_is_set{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	permil{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1000 - instr_browser.scroll_handle{unknown} {no declaration} 
	label_posY{unknown} {no declaration}  := instr_browser.scroll_top_ypos{unknown} {no declaration}  + ((handle_max_dist{unknown} {no declaration}  * permil{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 1000)
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(instr_browser.scroll_handle_label{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{unknown} {no declaration} , label_posY{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	instr_browser.current_scrollstep{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int(round(int_to_real(label_posY{unknown} {no declaration}  - instr_browser.scroll_top_ypos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / (int_to_real(handle_max_dist{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / int_to_real(instr_browser.scrollitems{unknown} {no declaration}  - 7){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, round}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	else
	label_posY{unknown} {no declaration}  := instr_browser.scroll_top_ypos{unknown} {no declaration}  + real_to_int((int_to_real(handle_max_dist{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / int_to_real(instr_browser.scrollitems{unknown} {no declaration}  - 7){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) * int_to_real(instr_browser.current_scrollstep{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	permil{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int((int_to_real(label_posY{unknown} {no declaration}  - instr_browser.scroll_top_ypos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} * 1000) / int_to_real(handle_max_dist{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(instr_browser.scroll_handle_label{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{unknown} {no declaration} , label_posY{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	instr_browser.scroll_handle{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1000 - permil{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	else
	instr_browser.current_scrollstep{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	instr_browser.scroll_handle{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1000
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(instr_browser.scroll_handle_label{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y{unknown} {no declaration} , instr_browser.scroll_top_ypos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	end if
end function

function go_to_active_art
	declare s : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare p : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare n : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare slt : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	slt{unknown} {no declaration}  := instr_browser.active_instr_slot{unknown} {no declaration} 
	call remote_character_buttons{UserDefined, None, remote_character_buttons}
	call remote_instr_buttons{UserDefined, None, remote_instr_buttons}
	i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	s{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	p{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	while((s{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1) and (i{unknown} {no declaration}  < 7)) 
	for n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 300 - 1
	if(instr_browser.instr_id_on_button[i{unknown} {no declaration} , n{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = loaded_instruments[slt{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	s{unknown} {no declaration}  := i{unknown} {no declaration} 
	p{unknown} {no declaration}  := n{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end for
	inc(i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	select(s{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case - 1
	instr_browser.current_character_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	call remote_character_buttons{UserDefined, None, remote_character_buttons}
	call hide_instr_buttons{UserDefined, None, hide_instr_buttons}
	case 0
	instr_browser.current_art_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	instr_browser.current_character_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	instr_browser.btn_cat0{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 1
	instr_browser.current_art_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	instr_browser.current_character_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	instr_browser.btn_cat1{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 2
	instr_browser.current_art_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	instr_browser.current_character_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	instr_browser.btn_cat2{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 3
	instr_browser.current_art_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	instr_browser.current_character_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	instr_browser.btn_cat3{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 4
	instr_browser.current_art_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	instr_browser.current_character_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	instr_browser.btn_cat0{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 5
	instr_browser.current_art_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	instr_browser.current_character_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	instr_browser.btn_cat1{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	case 6
	instr_browser.current_art_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	instr_browser.current_character_selection{unknown} {no declaration}  := 2
	instr_browser.btn_cat2{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end select
	if(in_range(s{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, 6){Builtin, None, in_range})
	call build_instrument_scroll_menu{UserDefined, None, build_instrument_scroll_menu}
	if(p{unknown} {no declaration}  > (instr_browser.scrollitems{unknown} {no declaration}  - 7))
	instr_browser.current_scrollstep{unknown} {no declaration}  := instr_browser.scrollitems{unknown} {no declaration}  - 7
	else
	instr_browser.current_scrollstep{unknown} {no declaration}  := p{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	instr_browser.scrollstep_is_set{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	call update_scroll{UserDefined, None, update_scroll}
	instr_browser.scrollstep_is_set{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	instr_browser.current_scrollstep{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	instr_browser.scrollstep_is_set{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	call update_scroll{UserDefined, None, update_scroll}
	instr_browser.scrollstep_is_set{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	call show_instr_button{UserDefined, None, show_instr_button}
	call update_instrument_buttons{UserDefined, None, update_instrument_buttons}
end function

function update_nks_labels
	GRAIN1.ATT{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := (GRAIN1.ATT{unknown} {no declaration}  / GRAIN1.ATT_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration} ) & "." & ((abs(GRAIN1.ATT{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} mod GRAIN1.ATT_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration} ) / (GRAIN1.ATT_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration}  / 10)) & ((abs(GRAIN1.ATT{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} mod (GRAIN1.ATT_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration}  / 10)) / (GRAIN1.ATT_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration}  / 100)) & GRAIN1.ATT.unit{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRAIN2.ATT{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := (GRAIN2.ATT{unknown} {no declaration}  / GRAIN1.ATT_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration} ) & "." & ((abs(GRAIN2.ATT{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} mod GRAIN2.ATT_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration} ) / (GRAIN2.ATT_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration}  / 10)) & ((abs(GRAIN2.ATT{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} mod (GRAIN2.ATT_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration}  / 10)) / (GRAIN2.ATT_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration}  / 100)) & GRAIN2.ATT.unit{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRAIN1.DEC{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := (GRAIN1.DEC{unknown} {no declaration}  / GRAIN1.DEC_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration} ) & "." & ((abs(GRAIN1.DEC{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} mod GRAIN1.DEC_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration} ) / (GRAIN1.DEC_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration}  / 10)) & ((abs(GRAIN1.DEC{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} mod (GRAIN1.DEC_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration}  / 10)) / (GRAIN1.DEC_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration}  / 100)) & GRAIN1.DEC.unit{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRAIN2.DEC{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := (GRAIN2.DEC{unknown} {no declaration}  / GRAIN1.DEC_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration} ) & "." & ((abs(GRAIN2.DEC{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} mod GRAIN2.DEC_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration} ) / (GRAIN2.DEC_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration}  / 10)) & ((abs(GRAIN2.DEC{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} mod (GRAIN2.DEC_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration}  / 10)) / (GRAIN2.DEC_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration}  / 100)) & GRAIN2.DEC.unit{unknown} {no declaration} 
	h{unknown} {no declaration}  := vol_compensation(GRAIN1.SUS{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, vol_compensation}
	GRAIN1.SUS{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := (GRAIN1.SUS{unknown} {no declaration}  / GRAIN1.SUS_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration} ) & "." & ((abs(h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} mod GRAIN1.SUS_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration} ) / (GRAIN1.SUS_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration}  / 10)) & ((abs(h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} mod (GRAIN1.SUS_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration}  / 10)) / (GRAIN1.SUS_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration}  / 100)) & GRAIN1.SUS.unit{unknown} {no declaration} 
	h{unknown} {no declaration}  := vol_compensation(GRAIN2.SUS{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, vol_compensation}
	GRAIN2.SUS{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := (GRAIN2.SUS{unknown} {no declaration}  / GRAIN2.SUS_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration} ) & "." & ((abs(h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} mod GRAIN2.SUS_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration} ) / (GRAIN2.SUS_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration}  / 10)) & ((abs(h{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} mod (GRAIN2.SUS_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration}  / 10)) / (GRAIN2.SUS_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration}  / 100)) & GRAIN2.SUS.unit{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRAIN1.REL{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := (GRAIN1.REL{unknown} {no declaration}  / GRAIN1.REL_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration} ) & "." & ((abs(GRAIN1.REL{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} mod GRAIN1.REL_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration} ) / (GRAIN1.REL_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration}  / 10)) & ((abs(GRAIN1.REL{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} mod (GRAIN1.REL_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration}  / 10)) / (GRAIN1.REL_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration}  / 100)) & GRAIN1.REL.unit{unknown} {no declaration} 
	GRAIN2.REL{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := (GRAIN2.REL{unknown} {no declaration}  / GRAIN1.REL_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration} ) & "." & ((abs(GRAIN2.REL{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} mod GRAIN2.REL_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration} ) / (GRAIN2.REL_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration}  / 10)) & ((abs(GRAIN2.REL{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} mod (GRAIN2.REL_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration}  / 10)) / (GRAIN2.REL_dis_div{unknown} {no declaration}  / 100)) & GRAIN2.REL.unit{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(GRAIN1.density_sync{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	GRAIN1.density{unknown} {no declaration}  := (GRAIN1.density_knob{unknown} {no declaration}  - 20) / (70 / SYNC_NAMES.SIZE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	GRAIN1.density_knob{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := SYNC_NAMES[GRAIN1.density{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	GRAIN1.density{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRAIN1.density_knob{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	GRAIN1.density_knob{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := GRAIN1.density{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(GRAIN2.density_sync{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	GRAIN2.density{unknown} {no declaration}  := (GRAIN2.density_knob{unknown} {no declaration}  - 20) / (70 / SYNC_NAMES.SIZE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	GRAIN2.density_knob{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := SYNC_NAMES[GRAIN2.density{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	GRAIN2.density{unknown} {no declaration}  := GRAIN2.density_knob{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	GRAIN2.density_knob{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := GRAIN2.density{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	GRAIN1.pos_rand_knob{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := (GRAIN1.pos_rand_knob{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value / 10) & " %"
	GRAIN2.pos_rand_knob{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := (GRAIN2.pos_rand_knob{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value / 10) & " %"
end function

function mirror_comp_settings
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS{unknown} {no declaration} , 1 - mixer.comp_bypass{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SCOMP_THRESHOLD{unknown} {no declaration} , mixer.comp_threshold{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SCOMP_MAKEUP{unknown} {no declaration} , mixer.comp_makeup{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 6, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	end for
end function

function update_delay_time
	if(mixer.delay_sync{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	v{unknown} {no declaration}  := (mixer.delay_time{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) / (1000000 / mixer.SYNC_UNITS.SIZE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TIME_UNIT{unknown} {no declaration} , mixer.SYNC_UNITS[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 1, 0){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TIME{unknown} {no declaration} , mixer.SYNC_EP[mixer.SYNC_COUNTER[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 1, 0){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	mixer.delay_time{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := mixer.SYNC_NAMES[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	set_current_control(mixer.delay_time{unknown} {no declaration} , mixer.SYNC_NAMES[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , mixer.delay_time_label{unknown} {no declaration} , "TIME"){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	else
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TIME_UNIT{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_SYNC_UNIT_ABS{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 1, 0){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TIME{unknown} {no declaration} , mixer.delay_time{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 1, 0){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	mixer.delay_time{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TIME{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 1, 0){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp} & " ms"
	set_current_control(mixer.delay_time{unknown} {no declaration} , "ms", mixer.delay_time_label{unknown} {no declaration} , "TIME"){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	end if
end function

function update_rev_type
	load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , mixer.REVERB_TYPES[mixer.rev_type{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 0, 0){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	while(load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0) 
	wait(2000){Builtin, None, wait}
	end while
	if(mixer.REVERB_SUBTYPES[mixer.rev_type{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , mixer.REVERB_SUBTYPES[mixer.rev_type{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 0, 0){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	end if
	if(((NI_CALLBACK_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration}  # NI_CB_TYPE_INIT{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (NI_CALLBACK_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration}  # NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGED{unknown} {no declaration} )) and (preset.is_loading{unknown} {no declaration}  # 1))
	call update_visibility{UserDefined, None, update_visibility}
	end if
	visible_deny{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	if(mixer.rev_type{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	call update_ir{UserDefined, None, update_ir}
	end if
	if(mixer.rev_type{unknown} {no declaration}  < 3)
	relink_control_to_ep(get_ui_id(mixer.rev_predelay{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ENGINE_PAR_RV2_PREDELAY{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, 0, 0){UserDefined, None, relink_control_to_ep}
	set_current_control(mixer.rev_predelay{unknown} {no declaration} , " ms", mixer.rev_predelay{unknown} {no declaration} , ""){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	relink_control_to_ep(get_ui_id(mixer.rev_time{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ENGINE_PAR_RV2_TIME{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, 0, 0){UserDefined, None, relink_control_to_ep}
	set_current_control(mixer.rev_time{unknown} {no declaration} , "", mixer.rev_time{unknown} {no declaration} , ""){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	else
	relink_control_to_ep(get_ui_id(mixer.rev_predelay{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ENGINE_PAR_PR_PREDELAY{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, 0, 0){UserDefined, None, relink_control_to_ep}
	set_current_control(mixer.rev_predelay{unknown} {no declaration} , "", mixer.rev_predelay{unknown} {no declaration} , ""){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	relink_control_to_ep(get_ui_id(mixer.rev_time{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, ENGINE_PAR_PR_DECAY{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, 0, 0){UserDefined, None, relink_control_to_ep}
	set_current_control(mixer.rev_time{unknown} {no declaration} , "", mixer.rev_time{unknown} {no declaration} , ""){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	end if
	if(mixer.rev_type{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	mixer.rev_predelay{unknown} {no declaration}  -> automation_name := "N/A"
	mixer.rev_time{unknown} {no declaration}  -> automation_name := "N/A"
	mixer.rev_predelay{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := "N/A"
	mixer.rev_time{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := "N/A"
	mixer.rev_return{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := 710
	mixer.rev_return_value_label{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := 710 - 18
	else
	mixer.rev_predelay{unknown} {no declaration}  -> automation_name := "Predelay"
	mixer.rev_time{unknown} {no declaration}  -> automation_name := "Time"
	if(mixer.rev_type{unknown} {no declaration}  < 3)
	mixer.rev_predelay{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_PREDELAY{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 0, 0){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp} & " ms"
	mixer.rev_time{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RV2_TIME{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 0, 0){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp} & " ms"
	else
	mixer.rev_predelay{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_PR_PREDELAY{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 0, 0){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp} & " ms"
	mixer.rev_time{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_PR_DECAY{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 0, 0){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp} & " ms"
	end if
	mixer.rev_return{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := 765
	mixer.rev_return_value_label{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x := 765 - 18
	end if
	visible_deny{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
end function

function update_rev_preset_menu
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[rev_preset_names{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(mixer.rev_preset_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
	end for
	if(mixer.rev_type{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value > 0)
	mixer.rev_preset_menu{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 + (6 * (mixer.rev_type{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value - 1))
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 5
	set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(mixer.rev_preset_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{unknown} {no declaration}  + (6 * (mixer.rev_type{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value - 1)), 1){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
	end for
	end if
end function

function update_ir
	load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := load_ir_sample(mixer.ir_names[mixer.ir_menu{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, 0){Builtin, None, load_ir_sample}
	while(load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0) 
	wait(1){Builtin, None, wait}
	end while
end function

function update_solo
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	solo_active{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	if(mixer.solo[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value = 1)
	solo_active{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	end for
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	if(solo_active{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	if((mixer.solo[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value = 1) and (loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0))
	mixer.solo_hold[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	else
	mixer.solo_hold[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	else
	if((mixer.mute[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value = 1) or (loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  <= 0))
	mixer.solo_hold[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	else
	mixer.solo_hold[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	end if
	if(mixer.solo_hold[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	set_control_par(octave_shift_label[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_small_blue{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(instr_slot_button[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_instr_labels_array[0]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(instr_slot_button[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_instr_labels_array[1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(instr_slot_button[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_instr_labels_array[2]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(instr_slot_button[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_instr_labels_array[3]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(assign_slot_menu[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , font_assign_slot_menu_array[0]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(assign_slot_menu[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON{unknown} {no declaration} , font_assign_slot_menu_array[1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(assign_slot_menu[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_assign_slot_menu_array[2]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(assign_slot_menu[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_assign_slot_menu_array[3]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(mixer.instr_labels[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_white{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	else
	set_control_par(octave_shift_label[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_white{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(instr_slot_button[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_array[0]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(instr_slot_button[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_array[1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(instr_slot_button[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_array[2]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(instr_slot_button[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_array[3]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(assign_slot_menu[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_array[0]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(assign_slot_menu[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_array[1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(assign_slot_menu[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_array[2]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(assign_slot_menu[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_array[3]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(mixer.instr_labels[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_white{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	end if
	end for
	set_current_control(mixer.vol0{unknown} {no declaration} , "dB", mixer.vol_value0{unknown} {no declaration} , "LEVEL"){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	set_current_control(mixer.vol1{unknown} {no declaration} , "dB", mixer.vol_value1{unknown} {no declaration} , "LEVEL"){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	set_current_control(mixer.vol2{unknown} {no declaration} , "dB", mixer.vol_value2{unknown} {no declaration} , "LEVEL"){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	set_current_control(mixer.vol3{unknown} {no declaration} , "dB", mixer.vol_value3{unknown} {no declaration} , "LEVEL"){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
end function

	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[mixer.solo{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	mixer.solo[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := 0
	end for

	mixer.mute[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := 0
	end for
