function accumulate_categories(array_variable : unknown)
	declare local hold : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local i : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local ii : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 6 - 1
	for ii{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to i{unknown} {no declaration} 
	hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := hold{unknown} {no declaration}  + category_elements[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	array_variable[i{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := hold{unknown} {no declaration} 
	hold{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end for
end function

function visibility.preset_browser(Boolean : unknown)
	file_browser{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_scan_animation{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	UI_preset_browser{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := hide_state[Boolean{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_preset_browser_bg{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := hide_state[Boolean{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_preset_browser_front{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := hide_state[Boolean{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_presetBrowser{unknown} {no declaration}  := Boolean{unknown} {no declaration} 
	UI_preset_save_dialog{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
end function

function update.preset_browser
	if(search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ] = - 1)
	preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := max(0, search[preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]){UserDefined, None, max}
	end if
	btn_scan_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	call on_btn_scan_presets{UserDefined, None, on_btn_scan_presets}
	call update.btn_active_status{UserDefined, None, update.btn_active_status}
	call on_button_tag{UserDefined, None, on_button_tag}
end function

function clear_tags
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[tag_button_array{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	tag_button_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := 0
	end for
end function

function update.btn_active_status
	if(preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	btn_presetBrowser{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_current_favorite{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_current_favorite{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := favorite_presets_array[preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if(search[btn_tags_state{unknown} {no declaration} , 1] = - 1)
	btn_clear_tags{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := "btn_clear_disabled"
	else
	btn_clear_tags{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := "btn_clear"
	end if
	if((preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1) or (is_user_preset{UserDefined, None, is_user_preset} = 0))
	saving_disabled{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	btn_edit_tags{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := "btn_edit_disabled"
	btn_delete_preset{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := "btn_delete_disabled"
	else
	if(is_user_preset{UserDefined, None, is_user_preset} = 1)
	btn_edit_tags{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := "btn_edit2"
	btn_delete_preset{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := "btn_delete"
	saving_disabled{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	if((search[final_favorite_presets_array{unknown} {no declaration} , 1] = - 1) and (btn_tags_state[27 - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0))
	tag_button_array[27 - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := "btn_favorite_disabled"
	else
	tag_button_array[27 - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := "btn_favorite"
	end if
end function

function update.scrollarea
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 15 - 1
	btn_preset_button[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_preset_favorite[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_preset_button[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := "      " & final_preset_title_array[i{unknown} {no declaration}  + scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_preset_button[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := btn_preset_onoff[i{unknown} {no declaration}  + scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_preset_favorite[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := final_favorite_presets_array[i{unknown} {no declaration}  + scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(end_of_presets_array[i{unknown} {no declaration}  + scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1)
	btn_preset_button[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_preset_favorite[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end for
	if(search[btn_tags_state{unknown} {no declaration} , 1] = - 1)
	scroll.up_origin{unknown} {no declaration}  := scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	sli_scrollbar{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1000000 - ((1000000 / (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 15)) * scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration} )
	lbl_scrollhandle{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y := sli_scrollbar{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y + ((310 - handle_size{unknown} {no declaration} ) - ((sli_scrollbar{unknown} {no declaration}  * (310 - handle_size{unknown} {no declaration} )) / 1000000))
end function

function filter.toggle_tag_buttons
	declare local q : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	if(tag_active{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 6 - 1
	if((filtermethodPerCategory[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 2) or (tag_button_array[tag_active{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> key_alt = 1))
	for q{unknown} {no declaration}  := category_accum[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  to category_accum[i{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	if((q{unknown} {no declaration}  # (tag_active{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1)) and in_range(tag_active{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1, category_accum[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , category_accum[i{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1){Builtin, None, in_range})
	tag_button_array[q{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := 0
	end if
	end for
	end if
	end for
	end if
end function

function on_button_tag override

	declare local form1 : real {Reuses: 0}
	declare local form2 : real {Reuses: 0}
	declare local z : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare local q : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[btn_tags_state{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	FS_btn_tags_state[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := tag_button_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	end for
	if((saving_preset{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0) and (tag_button_pressed{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0))
	tag_button_pressed{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	call preset_tags_action{UserDefined, None, preset_tags_action}
	if(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	p{unknown} {no declaration}  := num_elements[btn_tags_state{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	while((NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0) and (p{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0)) 
	if(btn_tags_state[p{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	tag_button_array[p{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := 0
	btn_tags_state[p{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	call preset_tags_action{UserDefined, None, preset_tags_action}
	wait(10){Builtin, None, wait}
	end if
	dec(p{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}
	end while
	end if
	call tag_state_handling{UserDefined, None, tag_state_handling}
	if(preset_scan{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	lbl_presetcount{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  & " I " & NUM_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[end_of_presets_array{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  < NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration} )
	end_of_presets_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	else
	end_of_presets_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	end if
	end for
	form1{real} {no declaration}  := int_to_real(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 15){Builtin, None, int_to_real}
	form2{real} {no declaration}  := int_to_real(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS_OLD{unknown} {no declaration}  - 15){Builtin, None, int_to_real}
	if(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS_OLD{unknown} {no declaration}  <= 15)
	form2{real} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	if(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  <= 15)
	form1{real} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	scroll.realup{real} {no declaration}  := (scroll.realup{real} {no declaration}  * form1{real} {no declaration} ) / form2{real} {no declaration} 
	scroll.up{int} {no declaration}  := real_to_int(round(scroll.realup{real} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, round}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	call update.preset_button_focus{UserDefined, None, update.preset_button_focus}
	if(btn_clear_tags{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value = 1)
	if(preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	if(search[btn_tags_state{unknown} {no declaration} , 1] = - 1)
	scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration}  := scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	scroll.realup{real} {no declaration}  := int_to_real(search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]){Builtin, None, int_to_real}
	scroll.up{int} {no declaration}  := real_to_int(floor(scroll.realup{real} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, floor}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	end if
	else
	scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration}  := scroll.up_origin{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	btn_clear_tags{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	if(btn_presetBrowser{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 15 - 1
	btn_preset_button[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := "      " & final_preset_title_array[i{unknown} {no declaration}  + scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_preset_button[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := btn_preset_onoff[i{unknown} {no declaration}  + scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_preset_favorite[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := final_favorite_presets_array[i{unknown} {no declaration}  + scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(end_of_presets_array[i{unknown} {no declaration}  + scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1)
	btn_preset_button[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_preset_favorite[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	btn_preset_button[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_preset_favorite[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end for
	if(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  > 15)
	sli_scrollbar{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1000000 - ((1000000 / (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 15)) * scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration} )
	sli_scrollbar{unknown} {no declaration}  -> mouse_behaviour := - (((510 - 310) * 15) + (2 * (NUM_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  - NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration} )))
	handle_size{unknown} {no declaration}  := real_to_int(round(int_to_real(310){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / (int_to_real(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / int_to_real(15){Builtin, None, int_to_real})){Builtin, None, round}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	if(handle_size{unknown} {no declaration}  < 30)
	handle_size{unknown} {no declaration}  := 30
	end if
	else
	sli_scrollbar{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1000000
	handle_size{unknown} {no declaration}  := 310
	end if
	lbl_scrollhandle{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height := handle_size{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_scrollhandle{unknown} {no declaration}  -> POS_Y := sli_scrollbar{unknown} {no declaration}  -> POS_Y + ((310 - handle_size{unknown} {no declaration} ) - ((sli_scrollbar{unknown} {no declaration}  * (310 - handle_size{unknown} {no declaration} )) / 1000000))
	end if
	tag_button_pressed{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
end function

function update.preset_button_focus : (): unknown
	if((search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ] # - 1) and (preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1))
	btn_preset_onoff[search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	if((scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration}  > search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]) and (scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration}  <= (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 15)))
	scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ] + (ge(scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration}  - 3, 0){UserDefined, None, ge} * - 3)
	if(scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration}  > (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 15))
	scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	end if
	else
	if(((search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ] - scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration} ) > 15) and (scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration}  <= (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 15)))
	scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration}  := ((search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 15) + 1) + (le(scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration}  + 3, NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, le} * 3)
	end if
	end if
	if((search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ] > (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 15)) and (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  > 15))
	scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration}  := NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 15
	end if
	scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration}  := ge(scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){UserDefined, None, ge} * scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	if(preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1)
	scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	if(scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration}  > (NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 15))
	scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration}  := NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 15
	end if
	if(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  < 15)
	scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
end function

function preset_tags_action override

	declare local game_over : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local z : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local v : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare local q : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare local allowed : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local bitCount : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local decimal : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare local bitmask : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[final_favorite_presets_array{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	final_preset_numbers_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	final_favorite_presets_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end for
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 27 - 1
	btn_tags_state[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := tag_button_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	end for
	bitmask{unknown} {no declaration}  := binary.to.decimal(27, btn_tags_state{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, binary.to.decimal}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 6 - 1
	activeTagsPerCategory[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := countBits(sh_right(bitmask{unknown} {no declaration} , 27 - category_accum[i{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_right} .and. sh_right(2147483647, 31 - category_elements[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_right}){UserDefined, None, countBits}
	end for
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to NUM_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	decimal{unknown} {no declaration}  := add_fav_state(preset_tags[preset_numbers_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , favorite_presets_array[preset_numbers_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, add_fav_state}
	v{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	while((v{unknown} {no declaration}  < 6) and (game_over{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)) 
	if(filtermethodPerCategory[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = filter.ADDITIVE{unknown} {no declaration} )
	bitCount{unknown} {no declaration}  := countBits(sh_right(decimal{unknown} {no declaration} , 27 - category_accum[v{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_right} .and. sh_right(bitmask{unknown} {no declaration} , 27 - category_accum[v{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_right}){UserDefined, None, countBits}
	allowed{unknown} {no declaration}  := allowed{unknown} {no declaration}  + ((bool(bitCount{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, bool} .or. ne(bool(activeTagsPerCategory[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, bool}){UserDefined, None, ne}) * category_elements[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	game_over{unknown} {no declaration}  := ne(bool(bitCount{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, bool} .or. abs(bool(activeTagsPerCategory[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, bool} - 1){Builtin, None, abs}){UserDefined, None, ne}
	else
	if((filtermethodPerCategory[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = filter.SUBTRACTIVE{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (filtermethodPerCategory[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = filter.TOGGLE{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	bitCount{unknown} {no declaration}  := .not. sh_right(bitmask{unknown} {no declaration} , 27 - category_accum[v{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_right} .or. sh_right(decimal{unknown} {no declaration} , 27 - category_accum[v{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_right}
	bitCount{unknown} {no declaration}  := countBits(bitCount{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. sh_right(2147483647, 31 - category_elements[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_right}){UserDefined, None, countBits}
	allowed{unknown} {no declaration}  := allowed{unknown} {no declaration}  + bitCount{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	inc(v{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	tags_wait{UserDefined, None, tags_wait}
	end while
	if(allowed{unknown} {no declaration}  = 27)
	final_preset_title_array[z{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset_title_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	final_preset_numbers_array[z{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset_numbers_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	final_preset_info[z{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset_info[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	final_favorite_presets_array[z{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := favorite_presets_array[preset_numbers_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(z{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	game_over{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	allowed{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end_of_presets_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := i{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_preset_onoff[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	bitCount{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end for
	if(NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)
	NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS_OLD{unknown} {no declaration}  := NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  := z{unknown} {no declaration} 
end function

function tags_wait
	wait(1){Builtin, None, wait}
end function

function add_fav_state(decimal : unknown, state : unknown)
	return ((sh_left(decimal{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, sh_left} + (isBitSet(decimal{unknown} {no declaration} , 27 - 1){UserDefined, None, isBitSet} * real_to_int(pow(2, int_to_real(27 - 1){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, pow}){Builtin, None, real_to_int})) + state{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function bitmask.to.tag_state(bitmask : unknown)
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[tag_button_array{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	tag_button_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := isTagSet(bitmask{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, isTagSet}
	btn_tags_state[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := isTagSet(bitmask{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, isTagSet}
	end for
end function

function show_current_preset override

	if(search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ] = - 1)
	bitmask{unknown} {no declaration}  := binary.to.decimal(num_elements[btn_tags_state{unknown} {no declaration} ], btn_tags_state{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, binary.to.decimal}
	bitmask{unknown} {no declaration}  := bitmask{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. add_fav_state(preset_tags[preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , favorite_presets_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, add_fav_state}
	bitmask.to.tag_state(bitmask{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, bitmask.to.tag_state}
	message(preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	end if
	call on_button_tag{UserDefined, None, on_button_tag}
end function

function countBits(input : unknown) -> result : unknown
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := (input{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. 1431655765) + (sh_right(input{unknown} {no declaration} , 1){Builtin, None, sh_right} .and. 1431655765)
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := (result{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. 858993459) + (sh_right(result{unknown} {no declaration} , 2){Builtin, None, sh_right} .and. 858993459)
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := (result{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. 252645135) + (sh_right(result{unknown} {no declaration} , 4){Builtin, None, sh_right} .and. 252645135)
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := (result{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. 16711935) + (sh_right(result{unknown} {no declaration} , 8){Builtin, None, sh_right} .and. 16711935)
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := (result{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. 65535) + (sh_right(result{unknown} {no declaration} , 16){Builtin, None, sh_right} .and. 65535)
end function

function tag_state_handling override

	declare local u : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare local z : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare local btn_state_save[27] : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare local allowed : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local bitCount : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local decimal : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare local bitmask : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare local bitmask2 : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for iii{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 6 - 1
	for ii{unknown} {no declaration}  := category_accum[iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  to category_accum[iii{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	decimal{unknown} {no declaration}  := add_fav_state(preset_tags[final_preset_numbers_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , favorite_presets_array[final_preset_numbers_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, add_fav_state}
	i{unknown} {no declaration}  := ((NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) * eq(isTagSet(decimal{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, isTagSet}, 1){UserDefined, None, eq}) + (eq(isTagSet(decimal{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, isTagSet}, 0){UserDefined, None, eq} * i{unknown} {no declaration} )
	tag_mask_array[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := (- 1 * eq(isTagSet(decimal{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, isTagSet}, 1){UserDefined, None, eq}) + (eq(isTagSet(decimal{unknown} {no declaration} , ii{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, isTagSet}, 0){UserDefined, None, eq} * ii{unknown} {no declaration} )
	end for
	end for
	end for
	for ii{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to (6 - 1) - 1
	if((filtermethodPerCategory[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = filter.TOGGLE{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (filtermethodPerCategory[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = filter.ADDITIVE{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	bitmask{unknown} {no declaration}  := binary.to.decimal(27 - 1, btn_tags_state{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, binary.to.decimal}
	for z{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to (6 - 1) - 1
	if((filtermethodPerCategory[z{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = filter.ADDITIVE{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (activeTagsPerCategory[z{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 1))
	bitmask2{unknown} {no declaration}  := sh_left(2147483647, (27 - 1) - category_accum[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left} .or. sh_right(2147483647, 31 - ((27 - 1) - category_accum[ii{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration} )){Builtin, None, sh_right}
	bitmask{unknown} {no declaration}  := bitmask{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. bitmask2{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end for
	end if
	z{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	for iii{unknown} {no declaration}  := category_accum[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  to category_accum[ii{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	if((filtermethodPerCategory[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = filter.TOGGLE{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (filtermethodPerCategory[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = filter.ADDITIVE{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	bitmask2{unknown} {no declaration}  := sh_left(2147483647, (27 - 1) - category_accum[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left} .or. sh_right(2147483647, 31 - ((27 - 1) - category_accum[ii{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration} )){Builtin, None, sh_right}
	bitmask{unknown} {no declaration}  := bitmask{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. bitmask2{unknown} {no declaration} 
	bitmask{unknown} {no declaration}  := setTag(bitmask{unknown} {no declaration} , iii{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1){UserDefined, None, setTag}
	bitCount{unknown} {no declaration}  := countBits(sh_right(bitmask{unknown} {no declaration} , (27 - 1) - category_accum[ii{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_right}){UserDefined, None, countBits}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to NUM_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	allowed{unknown} {no declaration}  := countBits(sh_right(preset_tags[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , (27 - 1) - category_accum[ii{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_right} .and. sh_right(bitmask{unknown} {no declaration} , (27 - 1) - category_accum[ii{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_right}){UserDefined, None, countBits}
	if((allowed{unknown} {no declaration}  >= bitCount{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (bitCount{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0))
	i{unknown} {no declaration}  := NUM_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	tag_mask_array[iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	end if
	end for
	if(NUM_USER_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	tag_mask_array[3]{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 1
	else
	tag_mask_array[3]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 3
	end if
	end if
	if(tag_mask_array[iii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	inc(z{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	category_active[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := z{unknown} {no declaration}  / category_elements[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	tags_wait{UserDefined, None, tags_wait}
	end for
	end for
	for ii{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to (6 - 1) - 1
	lbl_categories[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> font_type := fonts.category_font[category_active[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := category_accum[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  to category_accum[ii{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	if(tag_mask_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1)
	for u{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[font_types{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	set_control_par(tag_button_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , font_types[u{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , fonts.base_font[u{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	end for
	else
	for u{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[font_types{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	set_control_par(tag_button_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , font_types[u{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , fonts.base_font[6]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	end for
	end if
	end for
	end for
end function

function tag_state_decimal -> result : unknown
	declare local bumms : unknown := 0 {Reuses: 0}
	declare local z : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare local i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	z{unknown} {no declaration}  := (6 - 1) - 1
	while(z{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 0) 
	i{unknown} {no declaration}  := category_accum[z{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	while(i{unknown} {no declaration}  >= category_accum[z{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) 
	bumms{unknown} {no declaration}  := bumms{unknown} {no declaration}  + (btn_tags_state[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * real_to_int(pow(2, int_to_real(((27 - 1) - 1) - i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, pow}){Builtin, None, real_to_int})
	dec(i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}
	end while
	dec(z{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, dec}
	end while
end function

function isTagSet(x : unknown, pos : unknown)
	return (sh_right(x{unknown} {no declaration} , (27 - 1) - pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_right} .and. 1)
end function

function setTag(x : unknown, bit : unknown)
	return (x{unknown} {no declaration}  .or. sh_left(1, (27 - 1) - bit{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left})
end function

function doubleclick_start(uiControl : unknown, doubleclickControl : unknown)
	set_bounds(doubleclickControl{unknown} {no declaration} , uiControl{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x, uiControl{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y, uiControl{unknown} {no declaration}  -> width, uiControl{unknown} {no declaration}  -> height){Property, None, set_bounds}
	doubleclickControl{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	doubleclickControl{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	clicktime[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := get_ui_id(uiControl{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}
	clicktime[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration} 
end function

function doubleclick_check(doubleclickControl : unknown)
	wait((CLICKK_INTERVAL{unknown} {no declaration}  * 1000) + 2000){Builtin, None, wait}
	if((ENGINE_UPTIME{unknown} {no declaration}  - clicktime[1]{unknown} {no declaration} ) > CLICKK_INTERVAL{unknown} {no declaration} )
	doubleclickControl{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	clicktime[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
end function

function update.preset_situation
	ii{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	NUM_USER_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[user_preset_tags{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]
	set_preset_numbers{UserDefined, None, set_preset_numbers}
	if(NUM_USER_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to NUM_USER_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	if(user_deleted_presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	user_preset_titles[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := user_preset_titles[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	user_preset_tags[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := user_preset_tags[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	user_preset_numbers[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := user_preset_numbers[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	user_preset_info[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := user_preset_info[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(ii{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	end for
	NUM_USER_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  := ii{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to NUM_USER_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	preset_title_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := user_preset_titles[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	final_preset_title_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := user_preset_titles[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	file_name_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := user_preset_titles[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	preset_tags[user_preset_numbers[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := user_preset_tags[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	preset_numbers_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := user_preset_numbers[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	preset_info[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := user_preset_info[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	end if
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[user_deleted_presets{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  < NUM_USER_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration} )
	user_deleted_presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	else
	user_deleted_presets[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	user_preset_titles[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	user_preset_tags[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	user_preset_numbers[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	user_preset_info[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end for
	NUM_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  := NUM_USER_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  + NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration} 
	file_browser{unknown} {no declaration}  -> basepath := basepath{string} {no declaration} 
end function

function check.preset_overwrite
	i{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	preset.load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]} {no declaration} , basepath{string} {no declaration}  & txt_presetname{string} {no declaration}  -> text & ".nka"){Builtin, None, load_array_str}
	wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{int[]} {no declaration} , basepath{string} {no declaration}  & txt_presetname{string} {no declaration}  -> text & ".nka"){Builtin, None, load_array_str}){Builtin, None, wait_async}
	if(saving_preset{unknown} {no declaration}  = user.EDITS_TAGS{unknown} {no declaration} )
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  = preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	preset.load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end if
	if(((preset.load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1) and (preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0)) and (preset.overwrite{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1))
	txt_presetname{string} {no declaration}  -> font_type := menu_fonts[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_overwrite{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := "File already exists. Overwrite?"
	btn_overwrite{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_PART_NOTHING{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	txt_presetname{string} {no declaration}  -> font_type := fonts.current_preset_font[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_overwrite{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	preset.overwrite{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
end function

function visibility.preset.save.dialog(Boolean : unknown)
	declare favorite_button_pics[2] : string[] := ["btn_favorite_small", "btn_favorite_small_blurr"] {Reuses: 0}
	lbl_save_dialog{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := hide_state[Boolean{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_save_confirm{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := hide_state[Boolean{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_save_cancel{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := hide_state[Boolean{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	txt_presetname{string} {no declaration}  -> hide := hide_state[Boolean{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_scan_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	on_btn_scan_presets{UserDefined, None, on_btn_scan_presets}
	btn_disable_input{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := hide_state[Boolean{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_save{unknown} {no declaration}  := Boolean{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_warning{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := hide_state[Boolean{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}

	btn_presetBrowser{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := hide_state[ne(Boolean{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, ne}]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[btn_preset_button{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	btn_preset_favorite[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture := favorite_button_pics[Boolean{unknown} {no declaration} ]{string[]} {no declaration} 
	if(Boolean{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	btn_preset_button[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> font_type := fonts.base_font_blurred[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_preset_button[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> font_type_on := fonts.base_font_blurred[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	for ii{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[font_types{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	set_control_par(btn_preset_button[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , font_types[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , fonts.base_font[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	end for
	end if
	end for
	if(in_range(search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ] - scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, 15 - 1){Builtin, None, in_range})
	end if
end function

function on_saving_preset_dialog
	visibility.preset.save.dialog(1){UserDefined, None, visibility.preset.save.dialog}
	UI_preset_save_dialog{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := hide_state[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1)
	select(saving_preset{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case user.EDITS_TAGS{unknown} {no declaration} 
	txt_presetname{string} {no declaration}  -> text := preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case user.SAVES_NEW{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(is_user_preset{UserDefined, None, is_user_preset} = 0)
	txt_presetname{string} {no declaration}  -> text := preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration}  & " (User)"
	else
	txt_presetname{string} {no declaration}  -> text := preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end select
	lbl_warning{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := "Choose a selection of tags"
	add_text_line(lbl_warning{unknown} {no declaration} , "that apply to your preset"){Builtin, None, add_text_line}
	lbl_warning{unknown} {no declaration}  -> font_type := fonts.base_font[1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_warning{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y := preset_matrix_coord[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  + 80
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to (27 - 1) - 1
	FS_btn_tags_state[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := btn_tags_state[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	decimal.to.binary(preset_tags[preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , binary_array{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, decimal.to.binary}
	binary_array[27 - 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := favorite_presets_array[preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for ii{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[font_types{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	set_control_par(tag_button_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , font_types[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , fonts.base_font[ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	end for
	tag_button_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := binary_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_tags_state[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := binary_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := category_accum[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  to category_accum[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	tag_button_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := 0
	end for
	btn_current_favorite{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := favorite_presets_array[preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	tag_button_array[3]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := 1
	end if
end function

	return ("")

function save.preset
	preset.usr_name{string} {no declaration}  := txt_presetname{string} {no declaration}  -> text
	if(saving_preset{unknown} {no declaration}  = user.EDITS_TAGS{unknown} {no declaration} )
	preset.usr_name{string} {no declaration}  := preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	preset.load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]} {no declaration} , basepath{string} {no declaration}  & preset.usr_name{string} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, load_array_str}
	wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{int[]} {no declaration} , basepath{string} {no declaration}  & preset.usr_name{string} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, load_array_str}){Builtin, None, wait_async}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 27 - 1
	btn_tags_state[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := tag_button_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	end for
	preset.array[2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := binary.to.decimal(num_elements[btn_tags_state{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1, btn_tags_state{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, binary.to.decimal}
	user_deleted_presets[NUM_USER_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	if((preset.load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1) and (preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  # 0))
	user_preset_tags[search[user_preset_numbers{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.array[preset.TAGS_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	user_preset_titles[search[user_preset_numbers{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{string[]} {no declaration}  := preset.usr_name{string} {no declaration} 
	user_deleted_presets[search[user_preset_numbers{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	else
	user_preset_tags[NUM_USER_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := binary.to.decimal(num_elements[btn_tags_state{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1, btn_tags_state{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, binary.to.decimal}
	user_preset_titles[NUM_USER_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration} ]{string[]} {no declaration}  := txt_presetname{string} {no declaration}  -> text
	preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := validate.user.preset.idx(NUM_USER_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  + 999){UserDefined, None, validate.user.preset.idx}
	user_preset_numbers[NUM_USER_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	preset.array[preset.VERSION_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := NORDIC_SPHERES_PRESET_VERSION{unknown} {no declaration} 
	preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	call save_preset{UserDefined, None, save_preset}
	save_array_str(preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} , basepath{string} {no declaration}  & preset.usr_name{string} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, save_array_str}
	preset.last_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} 
	call update.preset_situation{UserDefined, None, update.preset_situation}
	if(saving_preset{unknown} {no declaration}  = user.SAVES_NEW{unknown} {no declaration} )
	preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	call preset_tags_action{UserDefined, None, preset_tags_action}
	end if
	save.resource_arrays{UserDefined, None, save.resource_arrays}
	btn_save{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	call off_saving_preset_dialog{UserDefined, None, off_saving_preset_dialog}
	message("preset.idx: " & preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	browser.load_preset{UserDefined, None, browser.load_preset}
end function

function validate.user.preset.idx(idx : unknown) -> result : unknown
	declare local preset_exists : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	preset_exists{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	if(search[user_preset_numbers{unknown} {no declaration} , idx{unknown} {no declaration} ] # - 1)
	preset.count{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	preset_exists{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	while(preset_exists{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1) 
	if(search[user_preset_numbers{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.count{unknown} {no declaration}  + 999] # - 1)
	inc(preset.count{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	else
	preset_exists{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end while
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.count{unknown} {no declaration}  + 999
	else
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := idx{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
end function

function edit.tags
	preset.usr_name{string} {no declaration}  := preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	message("@preset.usr_name: " & preset.usr_name{string} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	preset.load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]} {no declaration} , basepath{string} {no declaration}  & preset.usr_name{string} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, load_array_str}
	wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{int[]} {no declaration} , basepath{string} {no declaration}  & preset.usr_name{string} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, load_array_str}){Builtin, None, wait_async}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 27 - 1
	btn_tags_state[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := tag_button_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	end for
	preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	save_array_str(preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} , basepath{string} {no declaration}  & preset.usr_name{string} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, save_array_str}
	wait_async(save_array_str(preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} , basepath{string} {no declaration}  & preset.usr_name{string} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, save_array_str}){Builtin, None, wait_async}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	preset.arrayBuffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	preset.arrayBuffer[preset.DELETED_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	preset.arrayBuffer[preset.TAGS_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := binary.to.decimal(num_elements[btn_tags_state{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1, btn_tags_state{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, binary.to.decimal}
	preset.load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]} {no declaration} , basepath{string} {no declaration}  & txt_presetname{string} {no declaration}  -> text & ".nka"){Builtin, None, load_array_str}
	wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{int[]} {no declaration} , basepath{string} {no declaration}  & txt_presetname{string} {no declaration}  -> text & ".nka"){Builtin, None, load_array_str}){Builtin, None, wait_async}
	user_deleted_presets[search[user_preset_numbers{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	user_deleted_presets[search[user_preset_numbers{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.arrayBuffer[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	user_preset_tags[search[user_preset_numbers{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.arrayBuffer[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.arrayBuffer[preset.TAGS_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	user_preset_titles[search[user_preset_numbers{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.arrayBuffer[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{string[]} {no declaration}  := txt_presetname{string} {no declaration}  -> text
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	preset.array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.arrayBuffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	preset.arrayBuffer[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end for
	save_array_str(preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} , basepath{string} {no declaration}  & txt_presetname{string} {no declaration}  -> text & ".nka"){Builtin, None, save_array_str}
	message("SAVED AS: " & basepath{string} {no declaration}  & txt_presetname{string} {no declaration}  -> text & ".nka"){Builtin, None, message}
	call update.preset_situation{UserDefined, None, update.preset_situation}
	preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	save.resource_arrays{UserDefined, None, save.resource_arrays}
	btn_save{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	call off_saving_preset_dialog{UserDefined, None, off_saving_preset_dialog}
	browser.load_preset{UserDefined, None, browser.load_preset}
end function

function delete.preset
	preset.load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]} {no declaration} , basepath{string} {no declaration}  & final_preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, load_array_str}
	wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{int[]} {no declaration} , basepath{string} {no declaration}  & final_preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, load_array_str}){Builtin, None, wait_async}
	preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	user_deleted_presets[search[user_preset_numbers{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	save_array_str(preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} , basepath{string} {no declaration}  & final_preset_title_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, save_array_str}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ] to num_elements[favorite_presets_array{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	if(i{unknown} {no declaration}  < (num_elements[favorite_presets_array{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1))
	favorite_presets_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := favorite_presets_array[i{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end for
	save.favorite_array{UserDefined, None, save.favorite_array}
	preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset_numbers_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	call update.preset_situation{UserDefined, None, update.preset_situation}
	save.resource_arrays{UserDefined, None, save.resource_arrays}
	saving_preset{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	call on_button_tag{UserDefined, None, on_button_tag}
	if(search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ] # - 1)
	preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := final_preset_numbers_array[search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ] mod NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	btn_preset_onoff[search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	if(in_range(search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ] - scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, 15 - 1){Builtin, None, in_range})
	btn_preset_button[search[final_preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ] - scroll.up{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := 1
	end if
	call update.btn_active_status{UserDefined, None, update.btn_active_status}
	if(search[preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.last_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ] = - 1)
	message("loaded preset has been deleted"){Builtin, None, message}
	browser.load_preset{UserDefined, None, browser.load_preset}
	end if
end function

function off_saving_preset_dialog
	saving_disabled{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	saving_preset{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	btn_save{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	btn_edit_tags{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	preset.overwrite{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	txt_presetname{string} {no declaration}  -> font_type := fonts.current_preset_font[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_overwrite{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	visibility.preset.save.dialog(0){UserDefined, None, visibility.preset.save.dialog}
	UI_preset_save_dialog{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := hide_state[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[btn_tags_state{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	btn_tags_state[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := FS_btn_tags_state[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	tag_button_array[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := btn_tags_state[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
	btn_scan_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	call on_btn_scan_presets{UserDefined, None, on_btn_scan_presets}
	call on_button_tag{UserDefined, None, on_button_tag}
	call update.btn_active_status{UserDefined, None, update.btn_active_status}
end function

function on_btn_scan_presets
	lbl_scan_animation{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := hide_state[btn_scan_presets{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	set_bounds(lbl_scan_animation{unknown} {no declaration} , btn_scan_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  -> x + 1, btn_scan_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  -> y + 1){Property, None, set_bounds}
	btn_scan_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := hide_state[ne(btn_scan_presets{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, ne}]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	btn_disable_input{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := hide_state[btn_scan_presets{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_scan_info{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := hide_state[btn_scan_presets{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_scan_info{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := "Scanning files..."
	if(btn_scan_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value = 0)
	file_browser{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_scan_info{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := ""
	end if
end function

function scanning_automation
	if((preset_scan_info{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0) and (btn_scan_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value = 1))
	if(preset_scan{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	lbl_scan_animation{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := preset.frame_count{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	if((preset_scan{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0) and in_range(preset.frame_count{unknown} {no declaration} , 1, 50){Builtin, None, in_range})
	lbl_scan_animation{unknown} {no declaration}  -> picture_state := preset.frame_count{unknown} {no declaration} 
	if(preset.frame_count{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 50)
	preset_scan_info{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	preset.frame_count{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	btn_scan_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := 0
	call on_btn_scan_presets{UserDefined, None, on_btn_scan_presets}
	end if
	end if
	preset.frame_rate{unknown} {no declaration}  := (preset.frame_rate{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1) mod real_to_int(round((1 / int_to_real(30){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) / (int_to_real(15000){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / 1e+06)){Builtin, None, round}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	preset.frame_count{unknown} {no declaration}  := (preset.frame_count{unknown} {no declaration}  + (sh_right(- preset.frame_rate{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} + 1)) mod 51
	else
	if((preset_scan_info{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1) and (preset_scan{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0))
	preset.frame_rate{unknown} {no declaration}  := (preset.frame_rate{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1) mod real_to_int(round((1 / int_to_real(30){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) / (int_to_real(15000){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / 1e+06)){Builtin, None, round}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}
	preset.frame_count{unknown} {no declaration}  := (preset.frame_count{unknown} {no declaration}  + (sh_right(- preset.frame_rate{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} + 1)) mod 100
	if(preset.frame_count{unknown} {no declaration}  >= 99)
	preset_scan_info{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	lbl_scan_info{unknown} {no declaration}  -> hide := HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL{unknown} {no declaration} 
	lbl_presetcount{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  & "I" & NUM_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	if(btn_scan_presets{unknown} {no declaration}  -> key_alt = 0)
	lbl_scan_info{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := "User Presets found: " & preset.usr_display_num{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	lbl_scan_info{unknown} {no declaration}  -> text := "Files recovered: " & preset.usr_display_num{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
	end if
	end if
	end if
end function

function save_scanned_preset_vars
	user_preset_titles[preset.usr_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := fs_get_filename(get_ui_id(file_browser{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, 0){Builtin, None, fs_get_filename}
	user_preset_tags[preset.usr_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{int[]} {no declaration}  := (gt(preset.array[preset.TAGS_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){UserDefined, None, gt} * preset.array[preset.TAGS_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) + (ne(gt(preset.array[preset.TAGS_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){UserDefined, None, gt}){UserDefined, None, ne} * - 1)
	user_deleted_presets[preset.usr_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.array[preset.DELETED_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := validate.user.preset.idx(preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, validate.user.preset.idx}
	user_preset_numbers[preset.usr_count{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(preset.usr_count{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
end function

function get_user_preset_after_scan
	if(is_user_preset{UserDefined, None, is_user_preset} = 1)
	preset.load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]} {no declaration} , basepath{string} {no declaration}  & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, load_array_str}
	message(basepath{string} {no declaration}  & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, message}
	wait_async(load_array_str(preset.array{int[]} {no declaration} , basepath{string} {no declaration}  & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, load_array_str}){Builtin, None, wait_async}
	if(preset.load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1)
	load_new{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.array[preset.NUMBER_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	else
	preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset_numbers_array[NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	load_new{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end if
end function

function browser.load_preset
	if((preset.is_loading{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0) and (preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1))
	if(preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration}  # preset.last_idx{unknown} {no declaration} )
	preset.last_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} 
	load_preset_array{UserDefined, None, load_preset_array}
	if(preset.load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  = - 1)
	call load_preset{UserDefined, None, load_preset}
	update_purge{UserDefined, None, update_purge}
	end if
	end if
	end if
end function

function is_user_preset
	return (isBitSet(preset_tags[preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , ((27 - 1) - 3) - 1){UserDefined, None, isBitSet})
end function

function is_user_preset_save
	return (saving_preset{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function load_preset_array override

	message("preset_numbers_array: " & preset_numbers_array[preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  & ", preset.idx: " & preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	if(is_user_preset{UserDefined, None, is_user_preset} = 1)
	preset.load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := load_array_str(preset.array{int[]} {no declaration} , basepath{string} {no declaration}  & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, load_array_str}
	message("loading user_preset"){Builtin, None, message}
	else
	preset.load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := load_array_str(preset.array{unknown} {no declaration} , presetpath{string} {no declaration}  & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, load_array_str}
	message(presetpath{string} {no declaration}  & file_name_array[search[preset_numbers_array{unknown} {no declaration} , preset.idx{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration}  & ".nka"){Builtin, None, message}
	message("loading factory_preset"){Builtin, None, message}
	end if
	while(preset.load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0) 
	wait(10){Builtin, None, wait}
	end while
end function

function save_preset
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare c : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	preset.n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 + (is_user_preset_save{UserDefined, None, is_user_preset_save} * preset.CONTENT_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} )
	preset.array[preset.n{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := NORDIC_SPHERES_PRESET_VERSION{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(preset.n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[loaded_instruments{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	preset.array[preset.n{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}

	inc(preset.n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}

end function

function load_preset
	fade_out(ALL_EVENTS{unknown} {no declaration} , 50000, 1){Builtin, None, fade_out}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , EFFECT_TYPE_NONE{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 0, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , EFFECT_TYPE_NONE{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 1, NI_SEND_BUS{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	preset.load_cb{unknown} {no declaration}  := NI_CALLBACK_ID{unknown} {no declaration} 
	preset.is_loading{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	preset.n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 + (is_user_preset{UserDefined, None, is_user_preset} * preset.CONTENT_IDX{unknown} {no declaration} )
	inc(preset.n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	message("PRESET N: " & preset.n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ARP4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV1.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV2.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV3.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	ENV4.cursor{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	call check_cursor_amount{UserDefined, None, check_cursor_amount}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[loaded_instruments{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := preset.array[preset.n{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(preset.n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end for
	ARP1.time_signature{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := preset.array[preset.n{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(preset.n{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
