function array.erase(array : unknown, idx : unknown)
	lib.ii{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	for lib.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[array{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	if(lib.i{unknown} {no declaration}  # idx{unknown} {no declaration} )
	array[lib.ii{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := array[lib.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	inc(lib.ii{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end if
	end for
end function

function array.clear(array : unknown)
	for lib.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[array{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	array[lib.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end for
end function

function array.reset(array : unknown, val : unknown)
	for lib.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[array{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	array[lib.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := val{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
end function

function array.max(array : unknown) -> result : unknown
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := - 268435455
	for lib.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[array{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := max(array[lib.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , result{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, max}
	end for
end function

function array.copy(original : unknown, empty : unknown)
	for lib.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[original{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 1
	empty[lib.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := original[lib.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end for
end function

function decimal.to.binary(input : unknown, output_array : unknown)
	for lib.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to num_elements[output_array{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 2
	output_array[(num_elements[output_array{unknown} {no declaration} ] - 2) - lib.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := abs(sh_right(- (input{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. sh_left(1, lib.i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}), 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}){Builtin, None, abs}
	end for
end function

function binary.to.decimal(length : unknown, input_array : unknown) -> result : unknown
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	for lib.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to length{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := result{unknown} {no declaration}  + (input_array[(length{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1) - lib.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  * real_to_int(pow(2, int_to_real(lib.i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, pow}){Builtin, None, real_to_int})
	end for
end function

function frames.to.microseconds(frames : unknown, samplerate : unknown)
	return (real_to_int((int_to_real(frames{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} / int_to_real(samplerate{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}) * 1e+06){Builtin, None, real_to_int})
end function

function scale.range(input : unknown, currentMin : unknown, currentMax : unknown, scaleToMin : unknown, scaleToMax : unknown)
	return ((((input{unknown} {no declaration}  - currentMin{unknown} {no declaration} ) * (scaleToMax{unknown} {no declaration}  - scaleToMin{unknown} {no declaration} )) / (currentMax{unknown} {no declaration}  - currentMin{unknown} {no declaration} )) + scaleToMin{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function scale.range.real(input : unknown, currentMin : unknown, currentMax : unknown, scaleToMin : unknown, scaleToMax : unknown)
	return (real_to_int((((int_to_real(input{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - currentMin{unknown} {no declaration} ) * (scaleToMax{unknown} {no declaration}  - scaleToMin{unknown} {no declaration} )) / (currentMax{unknown} {no declaration}  - currentMin{unknown} {no declaration} )) + scaleToMin{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int})
end function

function scale.range.slider(input : unknown, scaleToMin : unknown, scaleToMax : unknown)
	return (real_to_int(((input{unknown} {no declaration}  * (scaleToMax{unknown} {no declaration}  - scaleToMin{unknown} {no declaration} )) / 1e+06) + scaleToMin{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int})
end function

function scale.slider(input : unknown, scaleToMin : unknown, scaleToMax : unknown)
	return (real_to_int(((int_to_real(input{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} * (scaleToMax{unknown} {no declaration}  - scaleToMin{unknown} {no declaration} )) / 1e+06) + scaleToMin{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, real_to_int})
end function

function scale.range.log(input : unknown, currentMin : unknown, currentMax : unknown, scaleToMin : unknown, scaleToMax : unknown)
	return (pow(10, (log(scaleToMin{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, log} / log(10){Builtin, None, log}) + (((input{unknown} {no declaration}  - currentMin{unknown} {no declaration} ) / (currentMax{unknown} {no declaration}  - currentMin{unknown} {no declaration} )) * ((log(scaleToMax{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, log} / log(10){Builtin, None, log}) - (log(scaleToMin{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, log} / log(10){Builtin, None, log})))){Builtin, None, pow})
end function

function scale.clamp.to(input : unknown, fromMin : unknown, fromMax : unknown, toMin : unknown, toMax : unknown)
	return (real_to_int(scale.range(int_to_real(((input{unknown} {no declaration}  * (1 + (sh_right(fromMax{unknown} {no declaration}  - input{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} .or. sh_right(input{unknown} {no declaration}  - fromMin{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))) - (fromMin{unknown} {no declaration}  * sh_right(input{unknown} {no declaration}  - fromMin{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})) - (fromMax{unknown} {no declaration}  * sh_right(fromMax{unknown} {no declaration}  - input{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})){Builtin, None, int_to_real}, int_to_real(fromMin{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}, int_to_real(fromMax{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}, int_to_real(toMin{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}, int_to_real(toMax{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){UserDefined, None, scale.range}){Builtin, None, real_to_int})
end function

function isBitSet(x : unknown, pos : unknown)
	return (sh_right(x{unknown} {no declaration} , pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_right} .and. 1)
end function

function set_bit(x : unknown, pos : unknown)
	return (x{unknown} {no declaration}  .or. sh_left(1, pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left})
end function

function clear_bit(x : unknown, pos : unknown)
	return (x{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. .not. sh_left(1, pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left})
end function

function flip_bit(x : unknown, pos : unknown)
	return (.not. (.not. (x{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. .not. (x{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. sh_left(1, pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left})) .and. .not. (sh_left(1, pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left} .and. .not. (x{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. sh_left(1, pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}))))
end function

function modify_bit(x : unknown, pos : unknown, state : unknown)
	return (.not. (.not. ((x{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. .not. sh_left(1, pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}) .and. .not. ((x{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. .not. sh_left(1, pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}) .and. (- state{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. sh_left(1, pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}))) .and. .not. ((- state{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. sh_left(1, pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}) .and. .not. ((x{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. .not. sh_left(1, pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left}) .and. (- state{unknown} {no declaration}  .and. sh_left(1, pos{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, sh_left})))))
end function

function clamp(x : unknown, min : unknown, max : unknown)
	return (((abs(x{unknown} {no declaration}  - min{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} - abs(((x{unknown} {no declaration}  + min{unknown} {no declaration} ) + abs(x{unknown} {no declaration}  - min{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs}) - (2 * max{unknown} {no declaration} )){Builtin, None, abs}) / 4) + (((x{unknown} {no declaration}  + (2 * max{unknown} {no declaration} )) + min{unknown} {no declaration} ) / 4))
end function

function clamp2(x : unknown, min : unknown, max : unknown)
	return (((x{unknown} {no declaration}  * is_in_range(x{unknown} {no declaration} , min{unknown} {no declaration} , max{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, is_in_range}) - (min{unknown} {no declaration}  * sh_right(x{unknown} {no declaration}  - min{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})) - (max{unknown} {no declaration}  * sh_right(max{unknown} {no declaration}  - x{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))
end function

function clamp.slider(x : unknown)
	return ((x{unknown} {no declaration}  * is_in_range(x{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, 1000000){UserDefined, None, is_in_range}) - (1000000 * sh_right(1000000 - x{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))
end function

function clamp0(x : unknown, max : unknown)
	return ((x{unknown} {no declaration}  * is_in_range(x{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, max{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, is_in_range}) - (max{unknown} {no declaration}  * sh_right(max{unknown} {no declaration}  - x{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))
end function

function is_in_range(value : unknown, a : unknown, b : unknown)
	return (1 + (sh_right(b{unknown} {no declaration}  - value{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} .or. sh_right(value{unknown} {no declaration}  - a{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))
end function

function max(a : unknown, b : unknown)
	return (a{unknown} {no declaration}  - ((a{unknown} {no declaration}  - b{unknown} {no declaration} ) .and. sh_right(a{unknown} {no declaration}  - b{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))
end function

function max4(a : unknown, b : unknown, c : unknown, d : unknown)
	return (max(a{unknown} {no declaration} , b{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, max} - ((max(a{unknown} {no declaration} , b{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, max} - max(c{unknown} {no declaration} , d{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, max}) .and. sh_right(max(a{unknown} {no declaration} , b{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, max} - max(c{unknown} {no declaration} , d{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, max}, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))
end function

function min(a : unknown, b : unknown)
	return (a{unknown} {no declaration}  - ((a{unknown} {no declaration}  - b{unknown} {no declaration} ) .and. sh_right(b{unknown} {no declaration}  - a{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))
end function

function min4(a : unknown, b : unknown, c : unknown, d : unknown)
	return (min(a{unknown} {no declaration} , b{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, min} - ((min(a{unknown} {no declaration} , b{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, min} - min(c{unknown} {no declaration} , d{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, min}) .and. sh_right(min(c{unknown} {no declaration} , d{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, min} - min(a{unknown} {no declaration} , b{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, min}, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))
end function

function gt(a : unknown, b : unknown)
	return (- sh_right(b{unknown} {no declaration}  - a{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
end function

function ge(a : unknown, b : unknown)
	return (sh_right(a{unknown} {no declaration}  - b{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} + 1)
end function

function eq(a : unknown, b : unknown)
	return (- sh_right(abs(a{unknown} {no declaration}  - b{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
end function

function lt(a : unknown, b : unknown)
	return (- sh_right(a{unknown} {no declaration}  - b{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
end function

function le(a : unknown, b : unknown)
	return (1 + sh_right(b{unknown} {no declaration}  - a{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
end function

function ne(x : unknown)
	return (abs(sh_right(abs(x{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}){Builtin, None, abs})
end function

function neg(x : unknown)
	return (- sh_right(x{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
end function

function bool(x : unknown)
	return (1 + sh_right(abs(x{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, abs} - 1, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
end function

function sign(x : unknown)
	return (sh_right(x{unknown} {no declaration} , 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} .or. 1)
end function

function sign3(x : unknown)
	return (sign(x{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, sign} .and. - bool(x{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, bool})
end function

function div(x : unknown, y : unknown)
	return ((x{unknown} {no declaration}  + (x{unknown} {no declaration}  mod y{unknown} {no declaration} )) / y{unknown} {no declaration} )
end function

function non_rpt_random(last_random : unknown, min_random : unknown, max_random : unknown) -> result : unknown
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := Rand(min_random{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1, max_random{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, Rand}
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := (last_random{unknown} {no declaration}  + result{unknown} {no declaration} ) mod (max_random{unknown} {no declaration}  + 1)
	last_random{unknown} {no declaration}  := result{unknown} {no declaration} 
end function

function Rand(min : unknown, max : unknown) -> result : unknown
	___M.Seed{unknown} {no declaration}  := (8088405 * ___M.Seed{unknown} {no declaration} ) + 1
	result{unknown} {no declaration}  := ((sh_right(___M.Seed{unknown} {no declaration} , 8){Builtin, None, sh_right} .and. 16777215) mod ((max{unknown} {no declaration}  - min{unknown} {no declaration} ) + 1)) + min{unknown} {no declaration} 
end function

function RandomSeed
	___M.Seed{unknown} {no declaration}  := KSP_TIMER{unknown} {no declaration} 
end function

function ResetRand
	___M.Seed{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1107155288
end function

function read_grain_load_setting
	while(settings_load_id[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0) 
	wait(2000){Builtin, None, wait}
	end while
	if(settings_load_id[1]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	grain_load_setting_nsp[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	btn_grain_load_setting{unknown} {no declaration}  := grain_load_setting_nsp[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
end function

function read_animation_setting
	while(settings_load_id[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0) 
	wait(2000){Builtin, None, wait}
	end while
	if(settings_load_id[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0)
	animation_setting_nsp[0]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	end if
	btn_animation_setting{unknown} {no declaration}  := animation_setting_nsp[0]{unknown} {no declaration} 
end function

function PanEn.stop_all_engines
	for PanEn.i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 2 - 1
	PanEn.state[PanEn.i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end for
end function

function PanEn.run(id : unknown)
	declare group_id : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare n : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare p : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare c : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	PanEn.is_running[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	PanEn.act_step[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	message("PanEn " & id{unknown} {no declaration}  & " tries running"){Builtin, None, message}
	message("PanEn.state: " & PanEn.state[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	while((PanEn.state[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1) and (PanEn.btn_active[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value # 0)) 
	message("PanEn " & id{unknown} {no declaration}  & " is running"){Builtin, None, message}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to PanEn.steps[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	set_control_par_arr(PanEn.tbl_step_indicator[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par_arr}
	end for
	set_control_par_arr(PanEn.tbl_step_indicator[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{unknown} {no declaration} , 1, PanEn.act_step[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par_arr}
	if(get_control_par_arr(PanEn.tbl_panstep[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{unknown} {no declaration} , PanEn.act_step[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_control_par_arr} < 0)
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	for n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to rr_nums[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	group_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + n{unknown} {no declaration} 
	set_engine_par(MOD_TARGET_INVERT_SOURCE{unknown} {no declaration} , 1, group_id{unknown} {no declaration} , find_mod(group_id{unknown} {no declaration} , PanEn.mod_names[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, find_mod}, - 1){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	end for
	end for
	else
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	for n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to rr_nums[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	group_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + n{unknown} {no declaration} 
	set_engine_par(MOD_TARGET_INVERT_SOURCE{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, group_id{unknown} {no declaration} , find_mod(group_id{unknown} {no declaration} , PanEn.mod_names[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, find_mod}, - 1){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	end for
	end for
	end if
	set_controller(PanEn.CCs[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , abs(get_control_par_arr(PanEn.tbl_panstep[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{unknown} {no declaration} , PanEn.act_step[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_control_par_arr}){Builtin, None, abs}){Builtin, None, set_controller}
	select(PanEn.mnu_rate[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value)
	case 0
	PanEn.step_length[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration}  / 4
	case 1
	PanEn.step_length[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration}  / 2
	case 2
	PanEn.step_length[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 3
	PanEn.step_length[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 4
	PanEn.step_length[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_QUARTER{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 5
	PanEn.step_length[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 6
	PanEn.step_length[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	case 7
	PanEn.step_length[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET{unknown} {no declaration} 
	end select
	message("Error Catch " & id{unknown} {no declaration}  & " " & PanEn.step_length[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, message}
	wait(PanEn.step_length[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, wait}
	inc(PanEn.act_step[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	if(PanEn.act_step[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  >= PanEn.steps[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} )
	PanEn.act_step[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	end if
	end while
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to PanEn.steps[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	set_control_par_arr(PanEn.tbl_step_indicator[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par_arr}
	end for
	Panen.is_running[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
end function

function PanEn.panstep_bypass(id : unknown)
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare n : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare group_id_bypass : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	if(PanEn.btn_active[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value # 0)
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	for n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to rr_nums[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	group_id_bypass{unknown} {no declaration}  := first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + n{unknown} {no declaration} 
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY{unknown} {no declaration} , PanEn.btn_slot_active[id{unknown} {no declaration} , i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value * 1000000, group_id_bypass{unknown} {no declaration} , find_mod(group_id_bypass{unknown} {no declaration} , PanEn.mod_names[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, find_mod}, - 1){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	end for
	end for
	else
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	for n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to rr_nums[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	group_id_bypass{unknown} {no declaration}  := first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + n{unknown} {no declaration} 
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, group_id_bypass{unknown} {no declaration} , find_mod(group_id_bypass{unknown} {no declaration} , PanEn.mod_names[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, find_mod}, - 1){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	end for
	end for
	end if
	set_current_control(mixer.pan0{unknown} {no declaration} , "", mixer.pan_value0{unknown} {no declaration} , "PAN"){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	set_current_control(mixer.pan1{unknown} {no declaration} , "", mixer.pan_value1{unknown} {no declaration} , "PAN"){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	set_current_control(mixer.pan2{unknown} {no declaration} , "", mixer.pan_value2{unknown} {no declaration} , "PAN"){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	set_current_control(mixer.pan3{unknown} {no declaration} , "", mixer.pan_value3{unknown} {no declaration} , "PAN"){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
end function

function PanEn.update_head_label(id : unknown)
	if(PanEn.btn_active[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value = 1)
	set_control_par(PanEn.lbl_headline[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_white{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	else
	set_control_par(PanEn.lbl_headline[id{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_blue{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	end if
end function

function PanEn.reset_all_mods
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare n : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare v : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare group_id_modres : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	for n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to rr_nums[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	group_id_modres{unknown} {no declaration}  := first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + n{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for v{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 2 - 1
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, group_id_modres{unknown} {no declaration} , find_mod(group_id_modres{unknown} {no declaration} , PanEn.mod_names[v{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, find_mod}, - 1){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	end for
	end for
	end for
end function

	end for

end function

	call PanEn.panstep_setting0{UserDefined, None, PanEn.panstep_setting0}
	call PanEn.panstep_setting1{UserDefined, None, PanEn.panstep_setting1}
end function

function update_fx_motion_values
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	fx_control_values[0 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := attack_min[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value * attack_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[1 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := decay_min[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value * decay_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[2 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := sli_lc_freq_min[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value * sli_lc_freq_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[3 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := sli_bell_freq_min[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value * sli_bell_freq_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[4 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := sli_hc_freq_min[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value * sli_hc_freq_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[5 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := mod_mix_min[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value * mod_mix_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[6 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := sat_gain_min[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value * sat_gain_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[7 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := mod_freq_min[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value * mod_freq_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[8 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := mixer.senddel_min[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value * mixer.senddel_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[9 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := trem_depth_min[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value * trem_depth_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[10 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  := trem_freq_min[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value * trem_freq_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[0 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := attack_max[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value * attack_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[1 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := decay_max[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value * decay_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[2 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := sli_lc_freq_max[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value * sli_lc_freq_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[3 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := sli_bell_freq_max[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value * sli_bell_freq_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[4 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := sli_hc_freq_max[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value * sli_hc_freq_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[5 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := mod_mix_max[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value * mod_mix_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[6 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := sat_gain_max[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value * sat_gain_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[7 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := mod_freq_max[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value * mod_freq_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[8 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := mixer.senddel_max[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value * mixer.senddel_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[9 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := trem_depth_max[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value * trem_depth_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[10 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  := trem_freq_max[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value * trem_freq_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[0 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 3]{unknown} {no declaration}  := attack_motion_invert[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[1 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 3]{unknown} {no declaration}  := decay_motion_invert[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[2 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 3]{unknown} {no declaration}  := sli_lc_freq_motion_invert[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[3 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 3]{unknown} {no declaration}  := sli_bell_freq_motion_invert[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[4 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 3]{unknown} {no declaration}  := sli_hc_freq_motion_invert[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[5 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 3]{unknown} {no declaration}  := mod_mix_motion_invert[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[6 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 3]{unknown} {no declaration}  := sat_gain_motion_invert[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[7 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 3]{unknown} {no declaration}  := mod_freq_motion_invert[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[8 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 3]{unknown} {no declaration}  := mixer.senddel_motion_invert[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[9 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 3]{unknown} {no declaration}  := trem_depth_motion_invert[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	fx_control_values[10 + (11 * i{unknown} {no declaration} ), 3]{unknown} {no declaration}  := trem_freq_motion_invert[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	end for
	call motion_fx{UserDefined, None, motion_fx}
end function

function motion_fx
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare a : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare n : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare mod_idx : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare rr : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare fx_sat_balancer : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	for a{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	for n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 11 - 1
	if((fx_control_values[n{unknown} {no declaration}  + (11 * a{unknown} {no declaration} ), 1]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0) and (fx_control_values[n{unknown} {no declaration}  + (11 * a{unknown} {no declaration} ), 2]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 0))
	fx_motion_values[n{unknown} {no declaration} , a{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  := fx_control_values[n{unknown} {no declaration}  + (11 * a{unknown} {no declaration} ), 0]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	else

function fix_filter_output_gains
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	for n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 2
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{unknown} {no declaration} , 397000, - 1, n{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	end for
	end for
end function

function update_sat_type
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare menu_value : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	visible_deny{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	menu_value{unknown} {no declaration}  := sat_menu[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value
	if((get_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 3, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_engine_par} # sat_types[menu_value{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ) or (NI_CALLBACK_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration}  = NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGED{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	if((NI_CALLBACK_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration}  # NI_CB_TYPE_INIT{unknown} {no declaration} ) and (NI_CALLBACK_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration}  # NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGED{unknown} {no declaration} ))
	load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  := set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , sat_types[menu_value{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, 3, NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	while(load_id{unknown} {no declaration}  # - 1) 
	wait(1){Builtin, None, wait}
	end while
	end if
	relink_control_to_ep(sat_tone[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , sat_type_links[menu_value{unknown} {no declaration} , 0]{unknown} {no declaration} , 3, i{unknown} {no declaration} , 0){UserDefined, None, relink_control_to_ep}
	relink_control_to_ep(sat_gain[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , sat_type_links[menu_value{unknown} {no declaration} , 1]{unknown} {no declaration} , 3, i{unknown} {no declaration} , core.motion[search[core.control_ids{unknown} {no declaration} , sat_gain[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]]{unknown} {no declaration} ){UserDefined, None, relink_control_to_ep}
	select(i{unknown} {no declaration} )
	case 0
	set_current_control(sat_bypass0{unknown} {no declaration} , "", sat_bypass0{unknown} {no declaration} , ""){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	set_current_control(sat_tone0{unknown} {no declaration} , "", sat_tone0{unknown} {no declaration} , ""){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	set_current_control(sat_gain0{unknown} {no declaration} , "", sat_gain0{unknown} {no declaration} , ""){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	case 1
	set_current_control(sat_bypass1{unknown} {no declaration} , "", sat_bypass1{unknown} {no declaration} , ""){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	set_current_control(sat_tone1{unknown} {no declaration} , "", sat_tone1{unknown} {no declaration} , ""){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	set_current_control(sat_gain1{unknown} {no declaration} , "", sat_gain1{unknown} {no declaration} , ""){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	case 2
	set_current_control(sat_bypass2{unknown} {no declaration} , "", sat_bypass2{unknown} {no declaration} , ""){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	set_current_control(sat_tone2{unknown} {no declaration} , "", sat_tone2{unknown} {no declaration} , ""){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	set_current_control(sat_gain2{unknown} {no declaration} , "", sat_gain2{unknown} {no declaration} , ""){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	case 3
	set_current_control(sat_bypass3{unknown} {no declaration} , "", sat_bypass3{unknown} {no declaration} , ""){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	set_current_control(sat_tone3{unknown} {no declaration} , "", sat_tone3{unknown} {no declaration} , ""){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	set_current_control(sat_gain3{unknown} {no declaration} , "", sat_gain3{unknown} {no declaration} , ""){UserDefined, None, set_current_control}
	end select
	end if
	end for
	visible_deny{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
end function

function update_fx_active_labels
	if(see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MIXER{unknown} {no declaration} )
	if(mixer.comp_bypass{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(mixer.comp_head_label{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_white{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	else
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(mixer.comp_head_label{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_blue{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	end if
	if(mixer.delay_bypass{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(mixer.delay_head_label{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_white{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	else
	set_control_par(get_ui_id(mixer.delay_head_label{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_blue{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	end if
	if(mixer.rev_bypass{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	set_control_par(mixer.rev_type{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_array[0]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(mixer.rev_type{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_array[1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(mixer.rev_type{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_array[2]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(mixer.rev_type{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_array[3]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	else
	set_control_par(mixer.rev_type{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_big_array[0]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(mixer.rev_type{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_big_array[1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(mixer.rev_type{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_big_array[2]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(mixer.rev_type{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_big_array[3]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	end if
	end if
	if((see_page{unknown} {no declaration}  = UIpage_MAIN{unknown} {no declaration} ) and in_range(see_main_subpage{unknown} {no declaration} , UIpage_FXENV1{unknown} {no declaration} , UIpage_FILTER5{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, in_range})
	if(loaded_instruments[fx_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	set_control_par(fx_env_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_array[0]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_env_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_array[1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_env_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_array[2]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_env_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_array[3]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	else
	set_control_par(fx_env_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_grey_array[0]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_env_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_grey_array[1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_env_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_grey_array[2]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_env_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_grey_array[3]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	end if
	if(filter_bypass[fx_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value = 1)
	set_control_par(fx_filter_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_array[0]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_filter_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_array[1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_filter_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_array[2]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_filter_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_array[3]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	else
	set_control_par(fx_filter_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_big_array[0]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_filter_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_big_array[1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_filter_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_big_array[2]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_filter_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_big_array[3]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	end if
	if(sat_bypass[fx_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value = 1)
	set_control_par(fx_sat_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_array[0]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_sat_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_array[1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_sat_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_array[2]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_sat_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_array[3]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	else
	set_control_par(fx_sat_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_big_array[0]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_sat_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_big_array[1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_sat_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_big_array[2]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_sat_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_big_array[3]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	end if
	if(mod_bypass[fx_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value = 1)
	set_control_par(fx_mod_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_array[0]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_mod_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_array[1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_mod_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_array[2]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_mod_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_array[3]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	else
	set_control_par(fx_mod_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_big_array[0]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_mod_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_big_array[1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_mod_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_big_array[2]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_mod_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_big_array[3]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	end if
	if(trem_bypass[fx_slot{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value = 1)
	set_control_par(fx_trem_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_array[0]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_trem_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_array[1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_trem_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_array[2]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_trem_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_main_big_array[3]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	else
	set_control_par(fx_trem_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_big_array[0]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_trem_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_big_array[1]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_trem_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_big_array[2]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	set_control_par(fx_trem_view{unknown} {no declaration} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER{unknown} {no declaration} , font_deactivated_big_array[3]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
	end if
	end if
end function

function remote_fx_page_buttons
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	fx_page_button[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value := 0
	end for
end function

function remote_fx_tab_buttons
	fx_env_view{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	fx_filter_view{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	fx_sat_view{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	fx_mod_view{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	fx_trem_view{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
end function

function update_fx_controls
	declare i : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare n : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare s : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare mod_idx : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare target_idx : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare fx_sat_type : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	declare fx_sat_balancer : unknown {Reuses: 0}
	visible_deny{unknown} {no declaration}  := 1
	message("Update_FX_CONTROLS"){Builtin, None, message}
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	relink_control_to_ep(attack[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, - 1, attack_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){UserDefined, None, relink_control_to_ep}
	relink_control_to_ep(decay[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , ENGINE_PAR_DECAY{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, - 1, decay_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){UserDefined, None, relink_control_to_ep}
	relink_control_to_ep(trem_depth[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_INTENSITY{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, i{unknown} {no declaration} , trem_depth_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){UserDefined, None, relink_control_to_ep}
	relink_control_to_ep(trem_freq[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_FREQUENCY{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, i{unknown} {no declaration} , trem_freq_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){UserDefined, None, relink_control_to_ep}
	relink_control_to_ep(sli_lc_freq[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , ENGINE_PAR_CUTOFF{unknown} {no declaration} , 0, i{unknown} {no declaration} , sli_lc_freq_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){UserDefined, None, relink_control_to_ep}
	relink_control_to_ep(sli_bell_freq[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , ENGINE_PAR_FREQ1{unknown} {no declaration} , 1, i{unknown} {no declaration} , sli_bell_freq_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){UserDefined, None, relink_control_to_ep}
	relink_control_to_ep(sli_hc_freq[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , ENGINE_PAR_CUTOFF{unknown} {no declaration} , 2, i{unknown} {no declaration} , sli_hc_freq_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){UserDefined, None, relink_control_to_ep}
	relink_control_to_ep(mod_mix[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN{unknown} {no declaration} , 4, i{unknown} {no declaration} , mod_mix_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){UserDefined, None, relink_control_to_ep}
	relink_control_to_ep(sat_gain[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , sat_type_links[sat_menu[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value, 1]{unknown} {no declaration} , 3, i{unknown} {no declaration} , sat_gain_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){UserDefined, None, relink_control_to_ep}
	relink_control_to_ep(mod_freq[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , ENGINE_PAR_CH_SPEED{unknown} {no declaration} , 4, i{unknown} {no declaration} , mod_freq_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){UserDefined, None, relink_control_to_ep}
	relink_control_to_ep(mixer.senddel[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_1{unknown} {no declaration} , 7, i{unknown} {no declaration} , mixer.senddel_motion[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){UserDefined, None, relink_control_to_ep}
	end for
	for i{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to 4 - 1
	if(loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  > 0)
	s{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[core.control_ids{unknown} {no declaration} , attack[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	if(core.motion[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	attack[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := "Motion"
	else
	for n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to rr_nums[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + n{unknown} {no declaration} , "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None, find_mod}
	target_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + n{unknown} {no declaration} , mod_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None, find_target}
	set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , attack[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value, first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + n{unknown} {no declaration} , mod_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , target_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	end for
	attack[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , mod_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , target_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp} & " ms"
	end if
	s{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[core.control_ids{unknown} {no declaration} , decay[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	if(core.motion[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	decay[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := "Motion"
	else
	for n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to rr_nums[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	mod_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + n{unknown} {no declaration} , "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None, find_mod}
	target_idx{unknown} {no declaration}  := find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + n{unknown} {no declaration} , mod_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"){Builtin, None, find_target}
	set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , decay[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value, first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + n{unknown} {no declaration} , mod_lfo{unknown} {no declaration} , target_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE{unknown} {no declaration} , decay[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value, first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + n{unknown} {no declaration} , mod_lfo{unknown} {no declaration} , target_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	end for
	decay[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , mod_idx{unknown} {no declaration} , target_idx{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp} & " ms"
	end if
	else
	attack[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := "N/A"
	decay[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := "N/A"
	end if
	s{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[core.control_ids{unknown} {no declaration} , mod_bypass[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , 1 - mod_bypass[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value, - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	s{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[core.control_ids{unknown} {no declaration} , mod_depth[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , mod_depth[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value, - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	mod_depth[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp} & ""
	s{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[core.control_ids{unknown} {no declaration} , mod_phase[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , mod_phase[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value, - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	mod_phase[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp} & ""
	s{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[core.control_ids{unknown} {no declaration} , mod_freq[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	if(core.motion[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	mod_freq[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := "Motion"
	else
	set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , mod_freq[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value, - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	mod_freq[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp} & ""
	end if
	s{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[core.control_ids{unknown} {no declaration} , mod_mix[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	if(core.motion[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  = 1)
	mod_mix[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := "Motion"
	else
	set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , real_to_int(int_to_real(mod_mix[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, int_to_real} * 0.397){Builtin, None, real_to_int}, - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_DRY_LEVEL{unknown} {no declaration} , 397000 - real_to_int(exp(3.24728e-05 * int_to_real(mod_mix[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value){Builtin, None, int_to_real}){Builtin, None, exp}){Builtin, None, real_to_int}, - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	mod_mix[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp} & ""
	end if
	s{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[core.control_ids{unknown} {no declaration} , trem_bypass[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]
	if(trem_bypass[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value = 0)
	rr{unknown} {no declaration}  := rr_nums[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} 
	for n{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0 to rr{unknown} {no declaration}  - 1
	mod_lfo{unknown} {no declaration}  := find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + n{unknown} {no declaration} , "LFO_SINE_1"){Builtin, None, find_mod}
	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_BYPASS{unknown} {no declaration} , 1, first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  + n{unknown} {no declaration} , mod_lfo{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	end for
	else
	rr{unknown} {no declaration}  := rr_nums[loaded_instruments[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}

	set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , mixer.sendrev[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value, - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	mixer.sendrev[i{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + i{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp} & " dB"
	end for
	s{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[core.control_ids{unknown} {no declaration} , get_ui_id(mixer.comp_threshold{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}]
	set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , mixer.comp_threshold{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value, - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + core.generic[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	mixer.comp_threshold{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + core.generic[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp} & " dB"
	s{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[core.control_ids{unknown} {no declaration} , get_ui_id(mixer.comp_makeup{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}]
	set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , mixer.comp_makeup{unknown} {no declaration}  -> value, - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + core.generic[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	mixer.comp_makeup{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , NI_BUS_OFFSET{unknown} {no declaration}  + core.generic[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp} & " dB"
	s{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[core.control_ids{unknown} {no declaration} , get_ui_id(mixer.delay_bypass{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}]
	set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , 1 - mixer.delay_bypass{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , core.generic[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	update_delay_time{UserDefined, None, update_delay_time}
	s{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[core.control_ids{unknown} {no declaration} , get_ui_id(mixer.delay_feedback{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}]
	set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , mixer.delay_feedback{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , core.generic[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	mixer.delay_feedback{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , core.generic[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp} & " %"
	s{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[core.control_ids{unknown} {no declaration} , get_ui_id(mixer.delay_hicut{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}]
	set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , mixer.delay_hicut{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , core.generic[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	mixer.delay_hicut{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , core.generic[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp} & " Hz"
	s{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[core.control_ids{unknown} {no declaration} , get_ui_id(mixer.delay_return{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}]
	set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , mixer.delay_return{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , core.generic[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	mixer.delay_return{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , core.generic[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp} & " dB"
	s{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[core.control_ids{unknown} {no declaration} , get_ui_id(mixer.rev_bypass{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}]
	set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , 1 - mixer.rev_bypass{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , core.generic[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	s{unknown} {no declaration}  := search[core.control_ids{unknown} {no declaration} , get_ui_id(mixer.rev_return{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}]
	set_engine_par(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , mixer.rev_return{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , core.generic[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	mixer.rev_return{unknown} {no declaration}  -> label := get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , - 1, core.slot[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} , core.generic[s{unknown} {no declaration} ]{unknown} {no declaration} ){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp} & " dB"
	visible_deny{unknown} {no declaration}  := 0
	call update_fx_motion_values{UserDefined, None, update_fx_motion_values}
	call motion_fx{UserDefined, None, motion_fx}
end function
